title: Billing Manager
description:
About the Role



We are looking for an experienced and detail-oriented Billing Manager to oversee our billing, accounts receivable, and accounts payable processes. This role is responsible for making sure invoices are accurate, payments are collected on time, vendor bills are handled properly, and financial records are well organized.



The ideal candidate has strong billing or bookkeeping experience, good communication skills, and the ability to improve processes as the company grows.



Responsibilities



- Manage customer billing and invoice generation

- Oversee accounts receivable and payment collection

- Monitor overdue accounts and follow up professionally

- Review and process credits, adjustments, and refunds

- Manage accounts payable and vendor bill tracking

- Help schedule and track outgoing payments

- Reconcile invoices, customer payments, vendor bills, and account balances

- Maintain accurate customer and vendor billing records

- Respond to billing questions from customers and internal tea
mbers

- Prepare billing, AR, AP, and collection reports for management

- Identify billing errors and resolve account discrepancies

- Improve billing procedures and internal accounting workflows

- Work with management on financial reporting and cash flow tracking

- Ensure billing processes are completed accurately and on time



Requirements



- Previous experience in billing, accounts receivable, accounts payable, bookkeeping, or accounting operations

- Strong attention to detail and accuracy

- Ability to manage billing deadlines and recurring monthly processes

- Good communication skills for working with customers, vendors, and internal teams

- Experience using accounting software, billing systems, spreadsheets, and

- Ability to handle confidential financial information responsibly

- Strong organization and problem-solving skills

- Ability to work independently and take ownership of billing operations



Preferred Qualifications



- Experience as a Billing Manager, Accounting Manager, Bookkeeper, Accountant or similar role

- Experience with QuickBooks, Xero, WHMCS, Stripe, PayPal, or similar platforms

- Experience in hosting, IT, SaaS, telecom, or another service-based business

- Understanding of recurring billing, subscriptions, customer credits, and payment gateways

- Experience improving billing processes or creating billing procedures



Schedule



This is a full-time position with a schedule of 9 AM to 5 PM, Monday to Friday. Some flexibility may be available depending on experience and business needs.



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who can take ownership of billing operations, keep financial records accurate, and help make sure customers and vendors are handled professionally. The right person should be dependable, organized, and comfortable managing both routine billing tasks and larger process improvements.



How to Apply



Please send your resume and a short message explaining your experience with billing, accounts receivable, accounts payable, and accounting or billing software.

title: Growth Role Manager (WFH, Full-Time Only)
description:
We are hiring a Growth Manager to act as the bridge between marketing and finance, working closely with our bookkeeper/report analyst to ensure all efforts are profitable, aligned, and scalable.



This is a hands-on role where you’ll help guide execution, analyze performance, and ensure the business is growing in a data-driven and sustainable way.



Work closely with the bookkeeper/report analyst to:



Forecast profitability

Track marketing spend vs actual returns

Ensure campaigns are financially sound



You will also:



Oversee and support marketing execution (ads,
, funnels, etc.)

Identify what’s working and scale it quickly

Troubleshoot underperforming campaigns

Ensure alignment across marketing, operations, and reporting

Jump in where needed (testing, analysis, coordination, strategy)



What This Role Really Is

Growth Strategist

Marketing Manager

Data & Profit Analyst

Team Coordinator



This is not a passive role—you are expected to think, d
, and execute.



 KPIs You Own

Overall profitability

Marketing efficiency 

Campaign performance

Consistent, sustainable growth



Requirements

Strong experience in marketing (ads, funnels, or growth)

Comfortable with numbers, reporting, and forecasting

Experience working with finance/bookkeeping teams

Highly organized and proactive

Able to manage multiple priorities



IMPORTANT

Full-time only (no side jobs or clients)

Must be responsive and available during shift

Must be comfortable taking ownership and making decisions

If you are purely task-based, this is not for you



HOW TO APPLY

Complete this application form:







Message us on OnlineJobs PH confirming you’ve submitted the form



Incomplete applications will not be considered.

title: Are you fluent in Spanish and English? Then we want YOU!
description:
We are looking for an admin VA that wants to be a true member of our team as we continue to grow and scale our business.



Short summary of job description: Our ideal administrative VA will speak fluently Spanish and English, to feel comfortable speaking with tenants on the phone in both languages.  The role entails making monthly calls to tenants that are delinquent , making notes in our CRM system, setting up specific dates to follow up with them if needed and creating a daily report. 

The role could expand to touch upon coordination of maintenance and a number of various tasks as needed to allow our business to continue to run smoothly.



Softwares that you need to know are MS suite (Word, Excel, Outlook, Teams, OneDrive etc.)



About us: We are a friendly open-mined property management company that strive to change the way management and tenants interact and correspond together. We are always seeking to improve and are always open to hearing feedback. We value honesty and clear communication and we believe it is a vital component of any successful employee/ employer relationship. We look forward to hearing from you!



When applying please MAKE SURE you do the following:



- subject says (My name is [your name] and Si Hablo Español!)

- please use 3 apply points

title: Administrative Assistant / Online Support Specialist (Remote)
description:
About Us

Global Nexus Co. is an international electronics wholesaler operating across Canada, the United States, and the UAE. We specialize in sourcing and distributing high-demand consumer electronics to a global network of clients.



We are currently seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Administrative Assistant / Online Support Specialist to support our daily operations and client communications.



Role Overview

This role is essential to maintaining smooth day-to-day operations. You will be responsible for handling communications, supporting internal processes, and managing our online presence. The ideal candidate is organized, tech-savvy, and able to work efficiently in a fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities



Respond to client
s in a timely and professional manner

Support management with daily administrative tasks

Communicate with members and clients to provide updates and assistance

Manage and maintain social media channels, including regular posting

Track communications, tasks, and ongoing activities

Assist in organizing internal workflows and improving efficiency



Requirements



Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)

Access to a computer or laptop

Comfortable using
 platforms, online tools, and social media

Highly organized with strong attention to detail

Ability to multitask and manage time effectively

Fast learner with a proactive and problem-solving mindset

Flexible availability



Preferred Qualifications



Previous experience in administrative, customer support, or similar roles

Familiarity with social media management tools and content posting

Experience working in a remote team environment



Compensation



Fixed compensation (based on experience)

Bi-weekly payments in USD

Flexible working hours

Opportunity for long-term growth and increased responsibility



Why Join Global Nexus Co.



Fully remote position

Work with an international team across multiple markets

Stable and growing company

Opportunity to grow into higher-responsibility roles over time

title: Paralegal
description: We are seeking a detail-oriented and highly organized paralegal to join our team and provide essential support for individuals representing themselves in legal proceedings (pro se cases). The ideal candidate will possess either prior experience working within the state of Georgia or a solid background in assisting lawyers with litigation matters. A strong understanding of case organization techniques, efficient filing procedures, and familiarity with state-specific submission requirements are crucial for this role.

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Waiterix | Harmonia Enterprises LLC



About Waiterix



Waiterix is an AI-powered hospitality platform designed to help restaurants operate more efficiently, increase revenue, and deliver better customer experiences. Our solution includes:



•An AI receptionist that answers calls and manages reservations

•An AI waiter integrated into a digital menu for seamless ordering and payment

•A business insights dashboard that enables data-driven decision-making



Waiterix addresses critical operational challenges in the restaurant industry, including missed calls, staff shortages, slow service, and limited visibility into performance. This is a mission-critical solution, not a discretionary tool.



 Role Overview



We are expanding across the United States and are seeking a Sales Development Representative (SDR) based in the Philippines to support our growth.



This is a remote, performance-driven role focused on:



•Cold calling restaurant owners and decision-makers in the U.S.

•Delivering product demonstrations

•Closing new business

•Managing client relationships to ensure retention



You will play a key role in introducing Waiterix to prospective clients and maintaining long-term relationships that generate recurring revenue.



Key Responsibilities



•Conduct outbound cold calls to restaurants across the U.S.

•Engage directly with owners and managers

•Present Waiterix in a clear, concise, and value-driven manner

•Identify operational challenges and position appropriate solutions

•Deliver product demonstrations

•Close new client accounts

•Onboard new customers and ensure successful activation

•Maintain ongoing client relationships to support retention and recurring revenue



 Compensation



•Base Pay: $5 USD per hour

•Commission: 3% recurring monthly commission on each closed and retained client ($3,000 per month)

•Earning Potential: Performance-based, with scalable recurring income tied to client retention



Candidate Profile



We are looking for candidates who demonstrate:



•Strong spoken English with a clear, neutral or American-accented tone

•Confidence in cold calling and sales conversations

•Ability to communicate value clearly and persuasively

•Comfort with technology and ability to learn SaaS products quickly

•Self-motivation and the ability to work independently

•Resilience and professionalism in handling objections





Preferred:



•Prior experience in sales, customer service, or call center environments

•Experience with SaaS or technology products





What You’ll Gain



•Experience in a high-growth AI and SaaS company

•Exposure to the U.S. business and hospitality market

•Opportunity to build recurring commission-based income

•Flexible, remote work environment with autonomy

•Direct contribution to scaling an innovative technology product



Why Join Waiterix



Waiterix is at a critical growth stage, building a global end-to-end AI platform for the hospitality industry. This role offers the opportunity to be part of that expansion while developing valuable skills in technology sales and client management.

title: Administrative Assistant (Long-Term | EST Hours | Immediate Start)
description:
Must be available to start immediately.



We are looking for a dependable, highly organized, detail-oriented Administrative Assistant to support our growing online education business.



This role is ideal for someone who is strong in administrative support, digital organization, website content updates, customer communication, scheduling, file management, data tracking, and helping keep a fast-moving online business organized and efficient.



Our website is hosted on Go High Level, so solid working knowledge of Go High Level is important for page edits, content updates, landing pages, and website management tasks.



You should be highly skilled with Google Sheets, Google Drive, online organization systems, AI productivity tools, content management, website page updates, and digital workflow support.



We need someone proactive, fast, accurate, reliable, and ready to grow long-term with our company.



This is a full-time long-term opportunity with performance-based raises, yearly increases, and advancement opportunities for the right person.



PAY & SCHEDULE



• Starting at $3.25/hour

• Full-time (8 hours per day / 40 hours per week)

• Must work during U.S. EST hours

• Must be available to start immediately

• Long-term position with growth opportunities



You must stay on Zoom during work hours (camera not required).



You must send a screenshot of your internet speed (upload and download).



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

title: Social Media Strategist — Power Cleaning Company
description:
We're a growing power cleaning and interior cleaning company in Northeast Ohio serving residential and commercial clients. We do exterior work (house washing, roof cleaning, driveways, concrete, pavers, decks, fences, gutters, windows, stain removal) AND interior work (carpet cleaning, tile & grout, upholstery, commercial cleaning). We also offer holiday lighting and maintenance plans.

Our work is visual, satisfying, and perfect for social media. We already have a tea
mber who can schedule posts and follow directions. What we need is the STRATEGIST — someone who thinks bigger, builds a real growth plan, and turns followers into paying customers.

WHAT YOU'LL DO:



Create a monthly social media strategy across
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube

Develop content calendars covering ALL our services — exterior, interior, commercial, maintenance, and seasonal (holiday lighting)

Create finished content from raw photos and video we send you — edit clips into reels, shorts, TikToks, design graphics, add text, music, and captions. We film on the job site, you turn it into scroll-stopping content.

If you have your own team (video editors, designers), you're welcome to delegate production — as long as quality and deadlines are met

Write captions, hashtags, and calls-to-action that convert

Run small paid ad campaigns ($
/mo budget to start) with local targeting

Track performance weekly and adjust strategy based on results

Help us grow our interior/commercial cleaning division — targeting small and medium businesses (offices, medical practices, restaurants, retail, gyms, churches, daycares)

Coach our team on what to film during jobs (angles, lighting, timing)

Engage with local community and business groups on
 for organic leads

Promote seasonal services (holiday lighting Q4, spring exterior cleaning, etc.)



WHAT YOU WON'T DO:



No filming — we send you the raw footage, you create the content

No phone calls or customer service

No SEO or Google Business Profile work (separate team handles that)



MUST-HAVES:



Proven experience growing social media accounts for a service business, home improvement, or cleaning company — show us the accounts you've grown with actual results

Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, DaVinci, or similar) OR your own team you can delegate editing to

Can create a strategy document, not just post content — you think in campaigns, audience segments, and funnels

Experience running
/Instagram ads on a small budget with measurable results

Strong conversational English — captions and comments need to sound natural and relatable to American homeowners and business owners, not translated or robotic

Understanding of US culture and consumer behavior — you know what resonates with Americans on social media (humor, local pride, seasonal trends, neighborhood culture)

Experience marketing to BOTH residential consumers AND commercial clients

Self-starter who brings ideas without being asked

Available during US Eastern business hours for overlap



NICE-TO-HAVES:



Experience with pressure washing, cleaning, janitorial, landscaping, or similar businesses

Experience marketing commercial cleaning or facility services to business owners

Canva skills

Experience with scheduling tools (Later, Buffer, Hootsuite)

Local/community marketing experience 
 groups, Nextdoor, local business networks)



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

Month 1: Audit our social presence, deliver a 90-day strategy, set up content calendar, start posting 4-5x/week.

Month 3: Measurable follower growth. 2-3 inbound leads/month from social. Paid campaigns running. Commercial content generating interest.

Month 6: Social media is a reliable lead source for both residential and commercial. We're the cleaning company people think of in our area.

HOW TO APPLY:



Brief intro — who you are and why you're a fit

Links to 2-3 social media accounts you've personally managed and grown (with results)

One example of a content strategy or campaign you planned and executed

Your availability and hourly rate



BONUS: Send a 3-minute Loom video walking through an account you've grown.

Do NOT send a generic application. We want to see your work. If you've grown a service business on social media before, tell us that story.

WHY THIS ROLE IS GREAT:



Power cleaning content goes VIRAL — satisfying transformations, before/afters, oddly satisfying cleaning videos

Multiple service lines means fresh content always available

Creative freedom to build from the ground up

Small team, direct access to the owner

Potential to grow into more hours and higher pay as results come in

We already have someone to execute your plans — you focus on strategy

title: U.S. Residential Real Estate Transaction Coordinator / Legal Assistant
description:
Job Title: U.S. Residential Real Estate Transaction Coordinator / Legal Assistant



Schedule: Full-time or near full-time



Time Zone: Must be able to overlap with U.S. Central Time



Compensation: Based on experience.



Initial trial period: 60 days at $6/hour. 

Compensation may be reviewed after the trial period based on performance, reliability, experience, and fit.



About the Role:

We are a U.S.-based real estate law firm looking for a detail-oriented, organized, and proactive Residential Real Estate Transaction Coordinator / Legal Assistant.



This is not a general virtual assistant role. We are looking for someone who has experience supporting U.S. residential real estate transactions, ideally from contract to closing.



You will help keep real estate files moving, organized, and properly documented so the attorney can focus on legal review, client strategy, and issue resolution.



Main Responsibilities: 

- Open and set up new real estate matters

- Review contracts and
s to identify key transaction details

- Enter and update client, agent, lender, attorney, and title company contact information

- Track key dates, deadlines, and missing information

- Coordinate with real estate agents, lenders, title companies, opposing counsel, and clients

- Prepare standard documents and
s using templates

- Organize
s, documents, and matter files

- Follow up on missing information or pending items

- Prepare files for attorney review

- Flag unusual, unclear, urgent, or non-standard issues for the attorney

- Support closing preparation and post-closing follow-up

- Maintain task lists and update matter status clearly



Experience We Are Looking For



Strong candidates will have experience with some of the following:

- U.S. residential real estate transactions

- Contract-to-closing coordination

- Buyer-side and/or seller-side transaction support

- Real estate law firm support

- Real estate transaction coordination

- Title company, escrow, mortgage, or brokerage transaction support

- Attorney review process

- Inspection deadlines

- Lender coordination

- Title coordination

- HOA or condo document requests

- Closing preparation

- Closing statements or settlement statements

- Real estate document organization



Experience with Illinois residential real estate transactions is a plus, but not required.



Tools and Systems



Experience with these tools is helpful, but not required:

- Microsoft Outlook

- Microsoft Teams

- Microsoft To Do

- Microsoft SharePoint or OneDrive

- Smokeball, Clio, Odoo, or similar practice management systems

- Adobe Acrobat

- E-signature platforms

- Real estate transaction management systems



You do not need to know every system before starting, but you must be comfortable learning new tools and following detailed SOPs.



This Role Is a Good Fit If You Are: 

- Able to think in context, not just complete isolated tasks

- Very organized

- Detail-oriented

- Careful with deadlines

- Comfortable following written instructions and SOPs

- Able to communicate clearly in writing

- Proactive about asking good questions

- Able to notice when something needs attorney review

- Comfortable working with many
s, documents, deadlines, and exceptions

- Reliable, consistent, and accountable

- Calm under pressure

- Interested in long-term work with a small professional team

- Impeccable written and spoken English



This Role Is Not a Good Fit If:

- You treat each instruction as a separate task without considering the full status of the matter

- You only have general admin or data entry experience

- You have never worked with U.S. real estate transactions

- Your legal experience is mainly with local court filings, municipal courts, litigation, criminal matters, family law, immigration, or court-based legal work outside the U.S.

- You have general legal experience but no direct experience with U.S. residential real estate transactions

- Your real estate experience is limited to property research, data entry, lead generation, cold calling, or CRM updates

- You need constant reminders about what to do next

- You are uncomfortable reading contracts,
s, and transaction documents

- You are not detail-oriented

- You do not like documenting your work clearly

- You struggle to follow multi-step processes

- You prefer simple repetitive tasks with no judgment involved



Important Expectation:



This role requires initiative, context, and judgment.



The best real estate transaction coordinators do not treat each instruction as an isolated task. They constantly ask: What is the status of this matter, what has already happened, and what needs to happen next without creating confusion, duplication, or risk?



For example, before sending a document, a strong coordinator should think through whether the document is complete, whether it is the correct version, who needs to receive it, whether it has already been sent, whether it is meant for internal or external use, and whether sending it could create a deadline, legal issue, duplicate file, or client confusion.



You will not be expected to provide legal advice. However, you will be expected to understand the context of the matter, notice when something is missing, unusual, unclear, urgent, or outside the normal process, and flag those items for attorney review.



For example, a strong tea
mber should be able to notice when:



- The contract is missing the buyer’s attorney information

- The inspection deadline appears to be tomorrow

- The title company contact is not listed

- The client’s phone number is missing

- A transaction appears to involve a condo or HOA

- An issue should be flagged for attorney review



How to Apply: 



Please send your resume, a link to your OnlineJobs.ph profile, and a cover letter answering the questions below to 
 A short summary of your experience with U.S. residential real estate transactions

- Have you supported buyer-side transactions, seller-side transactions, both?

- Describe one U.S. residential real estate transaction you personally supported from contract to closing

- What stages did you handle?

- Who did you coordinate with?

- What documents or deadlines were involved?

- What were you personally responsible for?

- What real estate, legal, title, mortgage, or transaction management tools have you used?

- What is your availability in U.S. Central Time?

- What is your expected hourly rate or monthly salary?



To show that you read the full job post carefully and can follow written instructions, please include the words "red jellyfish" in the subject line of your
.



Applications that do not answer these questions or do not follow the application instructions may not be reviewed.

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
Company Overview

Join our SaaS Customer Engagement Platform company as a Remote DevOps Engineer. We are looking for a highly motivated, self-starting candidate who is ready to take ownership of our infrastructure and security compliance initiatives.



Role Description

As a DevOps Engineer, you'll own the full lifecycle of our cloud infrastructure and deployment systems. You'll build CI/CD pipelines, manage Azure resources, drive security certification initiatives, and work with our team to optimize costs. We're looking for someone with genuine drive and curiosity who digs into problems, learns quickly, and keeps pushing forward. You don't need to know everything on day one, but you need the hunger to master it.



Key Responsibilities



Infrastructure & Deployment

- Architect, develop, deploy, and evolve CI/CD systems for our cloud applications

- Write application deployment automation using industry-standard tools like Jenkins

- Deploy and manage Azure services including App Services, SQL Database, and Virtual Machines

- Monitor system performance and respond to monitoring alerts

- Provide systems support and perform emergency deployments outside standard hours when needed



Security Certifications & Compliance

- Lead the initiative to achieve and maintain key security certifications including ISO 27001 and FedRAMP

- Develop a strategic roadmap for pursuing multiple certifications, identifying overlaps and dependencies

- Execute certification initiatives incrementally, building knowledge and compliance over time

- Write comprehensive documentation for security certification applications and audits

- Implement and maintain security best practices across infrastructure



Data & Database Management

- Demonstrate strong understanding of database systems including MongoDB and SQL databases

- Implement and manage backup strategies and disaster recovery procedures

- Apply security best practices in data storage, access, and management



Cost Optimization

- Identify and recommend Azure cost-saving opportunities and optimization techniques

- Collaborate with development teams to determine cost-efficient architectural solutions

- Provide guidance on resource utilization and cloud spending optimization



User & System Administration

- Manage Active Directory administration including adding users, setting up new employees and contractors

- Provide configuration support and troubleshooting for employees and contractors as needed



What We're Looking For

- Genuine drive to learn and take on complex challenges

- Self-directed problem solver who stays engaged with difficult problems

- Strong communication and documentation skills

- Ability to work independently

- Willingness to respond to emergencies outside standard hours



Foundational Experience (You'll grow from here)

- Hands-on experience with CI/CD concepts and tools like Jenkins, Azure DevOps, or GitHub Actions

- Working knowledge of Azure cloud platform

- Understanding of GitHub for version control and collaboration

- Experience with monitoring and observability tools (Pingdom, DataDog, New Relic, or similar)

- Basic familiarity with databases and scripting/automation concepts

- Willingness to perform deployment tasks during off-hours in emergency situations



 Required for Application

- Provide a link to your resume/CV

- Include a cover letter with a brief summary of your relevant experience and why you are interested in this position

- Use the subject line: 'DevOps - [Your Name]'

title: Autodesk Inventor Modeller / Drafter – Steel Fabrication
description:
Overview



We are an Australian engineering and fabrication company looking for a skilled Autodesk Inventor Modeller / Drafter to support production drawings and 3D modelling.



This is a production-focused role, not a design role. You will work from instructions, markups, and existing standards to produce accurate and consistent outputs.



You will follow strict templates, naming conventions, and workflows.



Responsibilities

Create 3D models and drawings using Autodesk Inventor

Produce fabrication drawings for:

         Plate work

         Structural steel components

Generate and manage:

         2D drawings

         DXF files

         BOM information

Update and modify existing models and drawings

Follow company standards for:

         File naming

         Drawing layouts

         Revision control

Work from:

         Markups

         Sketches

         Written instructions

Ensure drawings are accurate and complete before submission



Requirements (non-negotiable):

Proven experience using Autodesk Inventor

Experience with fabrication drawings (steel, plate, or similar)

Experience with sheet metal and flat patterns

Strong attention to detail

Ability to follow instructions exactly

Good understanding of:

         Dimensions

         Tolerances

         Drawing standards

Reliable internet and power backup



Nice to Have (Not Required)

Experience working with Australian companies

Basic understanding of workshop fabrication processes



Software Requirement:

All work must be completed using properly licensed software.

A licensed version of Autodesk Inventor can be provided if required.



How to Apply

To apply, please include:

A short introduction (max 5 sentences)

Screenshots or samples of drawings/models you have created in Autodesk Inventor (including sheet metal / flat pattern examples)

Include the word “PRECISION” in the first line of your application

Shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a paid test task.

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



Trial Task (Paid)

Shortlisted candidates will be given a small paid task to assess:

Modelling accuracy

Drawing quality

Attention to detail



Salary:

AUD $1,200 – $2,000 per month (depending on experience and performance)

Salary will be reviewed after 3 months based on performance.



Working Hours:

40 hours per week (full-time)

Must be available for at least 4 hours overlap with Australian business hours (Sydney time).



Growth Opportunity:

There is a clear pathway to grow into a Senior Drafter role based on proven performance, reliability, and consistency.

title: Full Time Cold Calling and Appointment Setting VA (US Clients, CRM Updates, Daily Reporting)
description:
Dominari Solutions is hiring a full time Virtual Assistant focused on outbound calling, follow up, appointment setting, and clean CRM updates for US based clients. This is a phone heavy role. If you do not enjoy talking on the phone, or you are not comfortable handling objections and rejection, please do not apply.



This position follows US business hours, which means you will be working night shift in Philippine time. You must be reliable, consistent, and able to show up on time daily.



Work Schedule



Full time, 40 hours per week.

Night shift in PH time to align with US business hours.

Exact hours will be assigned based on the client’s time zone and campaign.



Pay and Growth



Starting pay is $5.00 per hour, paid weekly.

Pay can increase over time based on reliability, skill, results, and overall performance. Strong performers get priority for raises and better client accounts.



What You Will Do



• Make outbound calls to leads using the client’s dialer or calling system

• Follow scripts and training, then improve delivery over time with coaching

• Handle objections professionally and keep control of the conversation

• Qualify leads and set appointments when the lead is a good fit

• Log call outcomes correctly in the CRM, including notes, tags, dispositions, and follow up tasks

• Complete daily follow ups consistently and on time

• Submit a daily end of shift report in Slack with your numbers and key notes

• Communicate clearly if you have questions, issues, or blockers



What We Track



• Dials completed

• Conversations

• Qualified leads

• Appointments booked

• Follow ups completed

• CRM accuracy and completeness

• Daily report quality and consistency

• Reliability and attendance



Requirements (Read Carefully)



Clear, neutral English is required.

You must be easy to understand for US prospects on the phone.

Please do not apply if you have a heavy accent that makes it difficult for US leads to understand you.



You must be comfortable speaking on the phone for most of your shift.

Please do not apply if you dislike phone work.



You must have the following:

• Strong and stable internet connection

• Quiet workspace with minimal background noise

• Laptop or PC from 2023 or newer

• Noise cancelling headset with a good microphone

• Ability to work night shift PH time consistently



Nice to Have



• Cold calling or appointment setting experience

• Experience with CRMs such as Podio, GoHighLevel, Follow Up Boss, or similar

• Real estate, home services, or sales support experience



Important, Read the Entire Job Description



Applications are reviewed based on attention to detail. If you did not read the full post, you will not be considered.



To apply, complete this application form:





To confirm you read the entire job description, start your message with the word: DOMINARI

If you do not include DOMINARI, your application will be skipped.

Track applications and replies

title: Senior Short-Form Video Editor Personal Brand (Full-time, Remote)
description:
Senior Short-Form Video Editor

- Type: Full-Time · Remote · Creative



Apply at: 
/senior-video-editor



The role in one line: Edit daily Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts for an 8-figure ecommerce founder building a personal brand for ecom operators and founders.



About this opportunity

I'm an Australian founder based in Dubai. I run a portfolio of DTC brands (multi 8-figure flagship plus several others in supplements, AI software, and home tech) and I'm building a personal brand on Instagram aimed at 7 to 9-figure ecommerce founders.



I post daily. The content is a mix of talking-head insights, behind-the-scenes from the business, lifestyle b-roll, and breakdowns of what's actually working in our brands. Think Alex Hormozi's pacing meets Sahil Bloom's polish.



I'm hiring one senior editor to own the daily output. You'll work directly with me, no middle layer.



What you'll do

- Edit 1 to 2 short-form videos per day (Reels and Shorts, 30 to 90 seconds)

- Pull the strongest hooks from raw footage I send via 

- Add dynamic captions, b-roll, sound design, subtle motion, and zooms

- Pitch concepts and hook ideas, not just execute briefs

- Research trends and competitor content (Hormozi, Bloom, Sanchez, Bartlett, Priestley, ecom founders) and bring formats worth testing

- Build and maintain templates so quality stays consistent as volume scales

- Use AI tools as part of the workflow (Higgsfield, Captions, ElevenLabs, Descript, Opus Clip, etc.)





Who you are

- 3+ years editing short-form vertical content, ideally for founders, creators, or coaches

- Portfolio with at least 5 reels you've edited end-to-end (please link, no portfolio means no review)

- Premiere Pro or CapCut Pro fluent. After Effects a plus

- Strong sense of pacing, hook structure, and what holds attention in the first 3 seconds

- Good written and spoken English (this is a daily-collaboration role, not file delivery)

- Comfortable with feedback loops and fast iteration

- Genuinely interested in business, ecommerce, or founder content. You'll edit 200+ videos a year on this topic, you should care about it





Bonus points

- Motion design or animation skills

- Have edited for a creator with 100k+ followers





Logistics

- Full-time, remote, 40 hours per week

- Some overlap with Dubai hours (UTC+4) preferred, full overlap not required

- Reporting directly to me, working alongside our existing creative team

- Long-term role with growth path into Lead Editor or Head of Content as we scale



How to apply

Fill out the form: --> 
 



Include a link to your portfolio (at least 5 reels you've edited end-to-end). No portfolio means no review.

title: Long Term GoHighLevel Virtual Assistant
description:
We partner with medical practices and doctors to build dominant digital presences through strategic content and paid advertising. We capture high-quality video content in quarterly shoots and transform that raw footage into organic posts and high-converting video ads that position our clients as the leading authorities in their medical markets. We’re now expanding our team to meet growing demand. I’m looking for Long Term GoHighLevel Virtual Assistant.





Requirements:

* Proven, hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (portfolio or examples required)

* Strong understanding of marketing automation and CRM best practices

* Ability to work full-time during EST business hours

* Detail-oriented, reliable, and proactive communicator

* Experience with Zapier, webhooks, or third-party integrations is a plus

* Experience working in a social media or content agency is a significant plus

* Fluent in English with strong grammar

* Consistency and reliability (very important) 





Role & Responsibilities:



* Comfortable communicating and collaborating through Asana and Slack

* Attention to detail (e.g., include your zodiac sign in the subject line!)

* Set up and optimize CRM pipelines and automations

* Create and manage
 and SMS campaigns

* Configure workflows, triggers, and integrations (Zapier, webhooks, etc.)

* Ability to follow structure and improve existing SOP

* Onboard and support clients within GHL

* Troubleshoot and maintain existing GHL setups

* Ability to work with multiple fast-growing brands

* Responsive and communicative on Slack during working hours



Rate and Work Schedule:



* $6-$8/hr depending on experience

* 2 hours per day preferably starts at 9 AM EST

* Please note that hours may increase over time as the role expands and responsibilities grow

* Long-term opportunity for the right person



Why Join Us?

You’ll be on the ground floor of helping our clients grow amazing businesses. Having had challenging bosses in the past, I’ve dedicated my career to creating a respectful, supportive, and growth-focused environment. You’ll be highly valued, and together, we’ll push each other to improve. 





What We Value Most:



* 100% honesty and integrity

* Strong work ethic, including discipline, accountability, and consistency

* Continuous desire to improve

* Asking questions and seeking clarification when needed

* Ability to follow step-by-step instructions/SOP accurately

* A self-starter mindset and fearlessness in learning and helping



How to Apply

Please send the following when applying:



1. Short intro (video preferred showcasing your previous work)

2. Your portfolio showcasing your sample work.

3. Your resume, with references if possible



Important:

If you’re not comfortable with the payment or workload, please do not apply.

Also, only apply if you are serious, consistent, and able to follow instructions. This role will start with an execution-focused phase rather than creative experimentation, but will gradually evolve into contributing to ideas.

title: AI Content Creator
description:
[IMPORTANT: READ THE ENTIRE JOB POSTING TO BE CONSIDERED]



**About the Role**



We run a YouTube channel that teaches how to use AI tools for crypto trading. We're hiring ONE full-time content creator to own the daily video production pipeline.



You will not be on camera. You will not record your own voice. The work is faceless and fully remote. One finished video delivered per weekday.



**Daily Work** (about 2 to 3 hours of focused effort, the rest of your full-time hours go into research, revisions, and scaling)



* Receive a rough script and a reference video from us

* Polish the script so it reads natural, not AI

* Generate the voiceover in ElevenLabs (we provide the account)

* Tune ElevenLabs settings until the voice sounds like a real person, not a robot

* Screen record the visual component (TradingView charts, exchange platforms, trading tool demos)

* Combine the screen rec with the voiceover and deliver as a raw mp4

* Upload everything to a shared Google Drive



**What You Need to Be Good At**



* **Strong written English.** Your script polish has to read like a real person talking.

* **A sharp ear.** You will judge whether ElevenLabs output sounds robotic and tune it until it doesn't.

* **Crypto trading literacy.** You should understand support and resistance, breakouts, common indicators, exchange platforms, and trading terminology. You don't need to be a profitable trader. You do need to know what you're looking at.

* **Screen recording skills.** OBS, ShareX, or QuickTime. Clean, 1080p minimum.

* **AI tool comfort.** You have used ChatGPT or Claude regularly. You understand what they can and can't do.



**Pay Structure**



* **Trial:** $20 to $30 per finished video for the first 2 videos. Paid on delivery whether or not we move forward.

* **Full-time after the trial passes:** ?35,000 to ?50,000 per month.

* 30-day performance review with raise potential to ~?80,000 per month for strong performance.



**How to Apply (Important: Please Read Carefully)**



Please answer these 5 questions in your reply. **Applications that do not answer all 5 questions will not get a response.**



1. Send me a 30 to 60 second voice sample you have made in ElevenLabs. Upload to Google Drive and share the link. If you have never used ElevenLabs, say so directly.



2. What is the AI tool you actually use weekly, and what for? One specific sentence. Not "ChatGPT for productivity."



3. Describe your screen recording setup in one paragraph. Software, resolution, where files go.



4. On a scale of 1 to 10, how comfortable are you with crypto trading concepts? Be honest. A 6 is fine.



5. What is your target salary in PHP per month, full-time?

title: TPT Virtual Assistant — Resource Creation, Market Research & Social Media
description:
I run a top 1% Teachers Pay Teachers store (
) focused on pre-K and kindergarten resources. My products are Creative Curriculum-aligned study bundles and early literacy materials — all designed in Canva with a clean, consistent, high-quality brand style. I am looking for a VA who genuinely understands or can quickly learn TPT as a marketplace, know how it works, and can help me grow it strategically — not just someone who can use Canva.



The role is full-time and has three equally important parts. If you can only do one of them, this is not the right fit.



Part 1 — TPT market research & product ideation

-Regularly research TPT to identify what is trending in the pre-K/K space — what themes are selling, what teachers are searching for, what is currently missing or undersupplied

-Look at top-selling stores in my niche and identify gaps — themes I haven't covered yet, product types that are in demand, seasonal opportunities I should be preparing for in advance

-Pitch new study bundle ideas with a clear rationale: why this theme, why now, what the demand signals are, and what seasonal window it fits

-Understand that TPT is deeply seasonal. You need to be thinking 6–8 weeks ahead at all times.

-Know the difference between a saturated topic (too many competing products, hard to rank) and a gap (high demand, low quality supply)



Part 2 — Canva product creation

-Build out study bundle pages using my provided Canva templates — vocabulary cards, sorting activities, anchor charts, coloring pages, emergent readers, dramatic play materials, and more

-Follow my brand style guide exactly — fonts, colors, layouts, etc.

-Research age-appropriate vocabulary and content for pre-K themed units

-Produce clean, polished pages that match the quality of my existing products



Part 3 — Pinterest & Instagram content

-Create Pinterest pins from my existing product files using my provided pin templates

-Plan and schedule consistent Pinterest posting to drive traffic to my TPT store

-Understand how Pinterest SEO works for teacher-sellers — keywords, board strategy, pin descriptions that actually convert

-Help plan Instagram content tied to new product launches and seasonal themes — this may include drafting captions, planning post timing, and organizing content batches for my review

-All content must align with my brand style and feel cohesive and intentional



What I need you to already know or learn very quickly:

-How TPT works as a marketplace — search, ranking, what makes a product sell. 

-What pre-K and kindergarten teachers are looking for and buying

-What Creative Curriculum is and how it shapes early childhood product design

-How Canva works at an intermediate-to-advanced level — you are efficient and precise

-How TPT seasonality works — major themes, their windows, and how to plan ahead

-How Pinterest works for driving TPT sales specifically — boards, keywords, posting cadence

-How Instagram works for teacher-sellers — content types, engagement, what performs in this niche



Trial task:

I will message applicants we want to move forward with and will ask them to complete the following trial tasks:



Step 1 Study my store and pitch a new product

-Spend time reviewing my TPT store and researching the pre-K/K marketplace. Then pitch ONE new product idea I should create — something that does not already exist in my store, fits my brand and niche, and has real demand. Your pitch must answer:

-What is the product and what type of resource is it?

-Why does it fit my store specifically — what have you noticed about what I sell and what's missing?

-What is the evidence of demand on TPT?

-What is the seasonal window, and why is now the right time to create it?

-What gap does it fill that isn't already well-covered by competing products?



Step 2 — Design 3 pages in Canva from scratch

Using only your Canva skills and what you have observed from studying my store, design 3 pages of the product you pitched in Step 1. This is your opportunity to show me your design ability and how well you can match an established brand style without being handed a template. 



Rules:

-Study my existing products closely before you start — your pages must feel like they belong in my store

-All content must be accurate, age-appropriate, and relevant to the theme

-Pages must be polished, clean, and consistent with each other

-Share the Canva link with view access when you submit



I am evaluating your eye for design, your ability to match a brand style independently, and the quality of your content choices — not just whether you can use Canva.



How to Apply

Please send your resume, a short introduction video (60 - 90 seconds) that discusses what excites you most about the role, and a short Canva portfolio (original work only—no Canva templates).

title: Short-form video editor for DTC brand
description:
About us

Honeybalm is a fast-growing DTC lip care brand selling internationally. We test and launch a lot of creatives monthly across Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and Snapchat. We're scaling our in-house creative team and looking for editors who live and breathe short-form direct response video.



What you'll do

- Edit short-form ads (15–60 seconds) for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

- Cut multiple ad variants from each raw creator package (different hooks, formats, angles)

- Build hook libraries, pattern interrupts, and text overlay systems that scale

- Work directly with our Creative Strategists on briefs and iteration cycles

- Hit deadlines without sacrificing quality, week after week



What we're looking for

- 2+ years editing DTC/e-commerce ads (Meta, TikTok, not corporate, not weddings)

- Portfolio of ads you've made that have run at scale, with brand names you can share

- Fluent in CapCut / Premiere Pro; bonus if you know After Effects

- Obsession with the first 3 seconds (hook); you can explain why a hook works, not just that it does

- Fast turnaround, fast communication

- Strong English (fluent)

- Self-managed, urgent and reliable



IMPORTANT: if all goes well, we will integrate a bonus structure after 3 months of work where you can earn $500 per winning ad that you have edited (+50k in spend). There is no limit on how much bonus you can receive.



How to apply: Send us:

- 3 short-form ads you've edited that have run on Meta or TikTok. Include the brand name and (if you know it) approximate ad spend or performance.

- Your experience explained

- Why you think this is a job that fits you

title: Google Ads Specialist for Shopify E-commerce Brand-DTC- Part Time - Growth Opportunity
description:
Type of Work



Part-Time | Remote | Long-term opportunity



Wage / Salary



US$5.00–US$6.50 per hour

Compensation may be reviewed after 90 days based on performance, reliability, and contribution.



Hours



15–20 hours per week to start

Hours may increase depending on performance and campaign growth.



About Us



Inspired Trading is a growing Caribbean e-commerce brand selling herbal teas, spices, sauces, sweets, and wellness products.



We have had strong success on Amazon and are now expanding our direct-to-consumer sales through Shopify. Our main customers are in the United States and Canada, so we are looking for someone who understands how to market consumer products to North American buyers.



We are not looking for someone to simply “run ads.” We want to build a structured, repeatable Google Ads system that helps us drive quality traffic, improve conversions, reduce wasted spend, and grow profitably.



About the Role



We are looking for a hands-on Google Ads Specialist with strong e-commerce experience to manage and improve Google Ads for our Shopify store.



This is not a one-time gig. This is a part-time, long-term role for someone who can take ownership of campaign performance and help us improve week by week.



You will review our current Google Ads setup, identify what is working, fix what is wasting money, and help us launch better campaigns across:



Google Search

Google Shopping

Performance Max

Google Merchant Center

Experience Required

Minimum 3 years of hands-on Google Ads experience

Shopify / DTC e-commerce experience strongly preferred

Experience marketing to customers in the US and Canada

Experience with food, wellness, beauty, supplements, herbal products, or consumer goods is a plus

Key Responsibilities



You will be responsible for:



Reviewing our current Google Ads account and recommending improvements

Planning, building, and optimizing Search, Shopping, and Performance Max campaigns

Conducting keyword research for high-intent buyers

Managing match types, search terms, and negative keywords

Reviewing and improving Google Merchant Center setup

Troubleshooting product feed issues, disapprovals, and tracking problems

Reducing wasted spend and improving traffic quality

Improving CTR, CPC, conversion rate, cost per conversion, and ROAS over time

Reviewing Shopify product pages and landing pages for conversion alignment

Providing weekly reports with clear insights and next steps

Tools / Platforms



Experience with the following is preferred:



Google Ads

Google Merchant Center

Google Shopping Ads

Performance Max

Google Analytics 4

Google Tag Manager

Shopify

Google Search Console

Google Sheets or Excel

Looker Studio

Basic Canva or creative review ability

Meta Ads is a plus, but Google Ads is the main priority

What We Are Looking For



We are looking for someone who is:



Strategic and hands-on

Data-driven and practical

Strong in campaign structure and keyword strategy

Comfortable working with a modest SME budget

Able to identify wasted spend quickly

Strong in troubleshooting

Clear in written communication

Proactive with recommendations

Reliable, organized, and detail-oriented

Able to work independently without constant supervision

How We Measure Success



Success in this role means:



Campaigns are structured properly

Tracking is accurate

Wasted spend is reduced

Search terms are reviewed regularly

Negative keywords are added consistently

Product campaigns improve over time

Weekly reporting is clear and useful

Shopify sales and conversion performance improve

You bring ideas, not just task updates

This Role Is Not For You If



This role is not a fit if you:



Only know how to boost posts

Only want to set up campaigns and disappear

Need step-by-step instructions every day

Send generic reports with no recommendations

Cannot work with a small but serious business budget



We need someone who can look at a Shopify store, product pages, Google Merchant Center, Google Ads account, and campaign data — then explain what is working, what is wasting money, and what should be tested next.



Weekly Reporting



You will provide a simple weekly report showing:



Campaign actions completed

Budget spent

Sales or conversions generated

CTR, CPC, conversion rate, cost per conversion, and ROAS where applicable

Search term insights

Negative keywords added

Products or campaigns performing well

Products or campaigns wasting spend

Issues found

Recommended actions for the next week



Reports should be clear, practical, and useful — not surface-level.



How to Apply



Please send:



Short introduction about your Google Ads experience

Resume

Examples of Google Ads campaigns you have managed

Experience with Shopify, Google Shopping, Performance Max, and Merchant Center

Google Ads certification, if available

Expected hourly rate within the US$5.00–US$6.50 range

Availability in Jamaica / Eastern Time



Please also answer these questions:



What is your process for launching Google Ads for a new Shopify product with a modest budget?

What are negative keywords, and how do they impact campaign performance?

Tell us about a campaign that was not performing well. What was wrong, what did you change, and what happened?

How do you d
 whether to use Search, Shopping, or Performance Max for an e-commerce product?

How would you review a Shopify product page before sending Google Ads traffic to it?



Please include the word INSPIRED in your subject line.

title: Operations Coordinator (UK Property Maintenance – Client-Facing Role)
description:
**Operations Coordinator (UK Property Maintenance – Client-Facing Role)**

Remote – Philippines

**Part-Time (Structured Training) ? Full-Time Progression**



---



**About Us**



We are a UK-based property maintenance and operations company managing residential works across London and surrounding areas.



We operate a structured, systems-driven business — not a typical “VA setup”. Our team manages real-time jobs, contractors, and client communication, ensuring work is delivered efficiently, professionally, and without delay.



We are now expanding our operations team and are looking for a high-quality Operations Coordinator to join us.



---



**The Role**



This is a client-facing operations role, not a basic admin position.



You will be responsible for managing live maintenance jobs, communicating with contractors, and updating UK-based clients and property managers.



You will need to think clearly, communicate confidently, and take ownership of tasks from start to finish.



---



**Working Structure**



* Initial: **Part-Time (approx. 4 hours per day)**

* Hours: **14:00 – 18:00 UK time (evening Philippines time)**

* Progression to **Full-Time role (UK hours)** based on performance



This is a structured training pathway. Candidates who perform well will be offered a long-term full-time position.



---



**Key Responsibilities**



* Manage and coordinate maintenance jobs from start to completion

* Communicate with engineers and tradespeople in real time

* Liaise with UK clients and property managers professionally

* Ensure all jobs are updated clearly, accurately, and on time

* Identify issues early and take proactive action

* Escalate problems appropriately (not reactively)

* Maintain clear, structured communication across all tasks



---



**What We Are Looking For**



* **Excellent spoken and written English (essential)**

  You will be dealing directly with UK clients — clarity and professionalism are critical



* Strong organisation and attention to detail



* Ability to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment



* Confident, direct communication style

  (Not passive, not hesitant)



* Ability to take ownership and follow tasks through to completion



* Calm under pressure and solution-focused



* Previous experience in coordination, operations, or client-facing roles preferred



---



**What You Will Get**



* Structured training based on real UK operations

* Clear progression path:

  **Part-Time ? Full-Time ? Senior Operations Role**

* Performance-based bonus structure (post-onboarding)

* Long-term, stable role within a growing company

* Opportunity to become a key part of a professional operations team



---



**Compensation**



* Training phase (part-time): **$4.00  per hour**

* Post-training (full-time): **$5.00 – $6.50 per hour**, based on performance

* Bonus structure applies after onboarding



---



**Important**



This role is suited to candidates who:



* Take pride in their work

* Communicate clearly and professionally

* Can work at pace without losing accuracy

* Want long-term growth within a structured business



This is **not suitable** for candidates looking for slow-paced or purely administrative work.



---



**Application Process**



Stage 1: Submit your CV (Must be PDF format)



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to the next stage, which includes:



* A short voice introduction

* A practical scenario-based task



---



We are looking for individuals who want to build a long-term role within a structured, growing company.



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: VSL
description:
We run a fast growing e commerce brand focused on EU markets. We build direct response funnels, test creatives aggressively, and scale winning offers through paid advertising.



We are looking for a VSL Editor who understands how to make performance driven videos that hold attention, increase watch time, and convert cold traffic into buyers.



---



## Role Overview



As a VSL Editor, your job is to turn scripts, raw footage, voiceovers, UGC clips, stock footage, screenshots, animations, and product visuals into high converting long form sales videos.



You should understand pacing, emotion, storytelling, retention, direct response structure, and conversion psychology.



This is not a basic editing role. You need to understand what makes a VSL perform.



---



## Responsibilities



* Edit high converting VSLs for e commerce offers

* Build videos that follow strong direct response structure

* Add engaging visuals, overlays, transitions, subtitles, motion graphics, and sound design

* Match visuals tightly to voiceover pacing and script flow

* Improve retention through pattern interrupts and visual variation

* Source supporting B roll, stock footage, 
s, screenshots, and graphics when needed

* Optimize edits for Meta Ads, landing pages, advertorials, and funnels

* Revise creatives based on feedback and performance data

* Deliver videos in required formats and timelines



---



## Requirements



* Proven experience editing VSLs or direct response content

* Strong understanding of retention editing and viewer psychology

* Experience with e commerce, dropshipping, or performance marketing

* Skilled in Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut, CapCut, or similar software

* Strong understanding of pacing, hooks, emotional build up, and CTA placement

* Ability to work fast without sacrificing quality

* Comfortable working with feedback and iterations

* Strong English communication skills



---



## Nice To Have



* Experience with health, beauty, or consumer products

* Knowledge of Meta Ads creatives

* Experience editing advertorial style or documentary style VSLs

* Basic motion graphics skills

* Understanding of funnel conversion psychology



---



## What We Expect



* Fast turnaround times

* Strong communication

* Consistent quality

* Ability to work independently

* Ownership mentality



---



## To Apply



Please send:



* Portfolio or previous VSL examples

* Examples of direct response or e commerce edits

* Your editing software stack

* Your turnaround time for a standard VSL

* Your rates

* Your timezone

title: Executive Paralegal & Legal Assistant
description:
The Mission:

This law firm is a high-stakes litigation firm with a focus on personal injury matters. We strive to deliver world-class legal representation. Our clients come to us during the most difficult 
nts of their lives, and we provide them with concierge-level service that prioritizes their well-being and legal success above all else.



The Role:

We are seeking a highly skilled, loyal, and proactive Executive Paralegal/Case Manager/Case Intake Coordinator/Secretary/Legal Assistant to serve as a cornerstone of the firm’s operations. This is not a standard data-entry role; you will be an integral part of the legal team, managing high-value cases from intake through resolution. You will be expected to maintain the highest level of professionalism and confidentiality.



Key Responsibilities:

Concierge Intake: Conduct empathetic yet thorough initial interviews for potential clients, screening for high-caliber personal injury cases.



Case Management: Maintain meticulous records, ensuring all deadlines, medical records, and case milestones are tracked with perfect accuracy.



Legal Writing: Draft high-level legal articles for publication, prepare professional correspondence, and draft initial responses to discovery requests.



Provider & Client Relations: Act as a point of contact for clients, insurance adjusters, and medical providers, delivering a client-first experience.



Firm Systems: Help implement and maintain firm-wide handbooks and automated systems to ensure scalable, error-free operations.



Required Qualifications:

Experience: Minimum of 3+ years of experience specifically in U.S. personal injury law or similar practice areas.



Language Mastery: Absolute fluency in English (written and spoken) is necessary. You must be able to draft sophisticated legal documents.



Bilingual Plus: Professional fluency in Spanish is a significant advantage.



Who You Are:

Extremely Loyal: You are looking for a professional home where you can grow alongside the firm.



Detail-Obsessed: You believe that "good enough" is not enough. You strive for perfection in every letter and case entry.



Autonomous: You are a problem-solver who can take a task and run with it, requiring minimal supervision once trained.



High Integrity: You handle sensitive client and firm information with the utmost discretion.



Why Join this firm?

Stability: We are looking for a long-term partner, not a freelancer.



Prestige: Work on high-stakes cases that make a real difference.



Growth: Opportunity to be the first international hire at a new law firm.



Respect: A professional environment where your expertise is valued and rewarded.



Application Requirements:

-Voice Sample: In your application process, please submit a 1-minute video or audio recording wherein you introduce yourself and explain why you are a good fit for the role.

-Resume/CV

-2 or more writing samples

-2 or more references



***There will be a 60-day paid trial period***

title: Executive Assistant (Operations | Real Estate | Night Shift)
description:
AP Required to Apply: 10+ (the more points you have, the more serious we know you are. Anything less than 10 AP will be archived immediately and not looked at)



This is not a traditional Executive Assistant role.



This is a high leverage role supporting a fast-moving real estate CEO who values precision, ownership, and speed.



If you need hand-holding, constant reassurance, or loose expectations—this is not for you.



This role is best suited for someone who prefers structure, ownership, and high standards over comfort or flexibility.



If you take pride in anticipating needs, protecting time, and executing cleanly—keep reading.



-



Location: Remote / Virtual

Schedule (PHT): Tuesday–Saturday | Start Time 09:30 PM (1-hour unpaid break)

Schedule (CST): Monday–Friday | Start Time 8:30 AM (1-hour unpaid break)

Compensation: $1,695/USD per month + (based on experience and performance)

Type: Full-Time Salary includes 13th month pay (prorated) 

-



About ZenHomes



ZenHomes is a lean, high-performing real estate company based in Texas. We acquire off-market properties, manage rentals, and operate with clarity, accountability, and systems.



We run a small, trusted team across the U.S. and the Philippines. We don’t do busywork. We don’t micromanage. We care about outcomes.



-



About This Role (Read Carefully)



This is a high-expectation Executive Assistant role supporting the CEO directly.



Even though the position is remote, expectations are real from Day 1: speed, accuracy, follow-through, and emotional maturity.



This role exists to:

 • Buy back the CEO’s time immediately 

 • Reduce noise, errors, and dropped details

 • Execute quickly within clear guidelines

 • Improve rapidly through direct feedback



Feedback here is direct and timely because standards are high. The goal is improvement, not perfection—but repeated mistakes signal misalignment.



If something is unclear, elite operators pause and ask first. Once clarified, execution must be fast and precise.



Autonomy is earned quickly through judgment, correction speed, and consistency.



-



What You’ll Own



Immediate Responsibilities (Day 1 Standard)



Calendar & Time Protection

 • Own and manage the CEO’s calendar daily +1 week out

 • Book, reschedule, and confirm events/meetings

 • Enforce calendar rules with discipline

 • Prepare daily sync agenda's and context so nothing is reactive



Communication & Coordination

 • Triage incoming messages and requests

 • Draft clear, professional responses in the CEO’s voice

 • Flag decisions cleanly with relevant context

 • Coordinate logistics, scheduling, reminders, and next steps



Task Tracking & Execution

 • Track tasks and open loops in Asana

 • Ensure nothing drops, stalls, or surprises the CEO

 • Prepare before asking questions

 • Execute once aligned—fast and clean

 • Create workflows of repeating tasks

-



Earned Responsibilities (After Trust Is Demonstrated)

 • Handle tenant, guest, and vendor coordination with minimal escalation

 • Surface risks, conflicts, or gaps before they become problems

 • Reduce unnecessary interruptions and “quick questions”

 • Act as a true gatekeeper of the CEO’s time



-



Required Experience & Traits

 • 2+ years as an Executive Assistant, Operations Assistant, or similar

 • Excellent written and spoken English (neutral accent required)

 • Must be AI forward thinking 

 • Highly organized, responsive, and detail-oriented

 • Comfortable in fast-paced, high-expectation environments

 • Emotionally steady and receptive to direct feedback

 • Loyal, discreet, and dependable





-



You Will Thrive Here If You:

 • Think in systems, workflows and outcomes

 • Use AI to support systems, workflows, and outcomes

 • Take responsibility personally

 • Dislike chaos and proactively fix it by immediately building systems so it never happens again

 • Ask smart questions after attempting solutions

 • Prefer clear feedback over vague praise

 • Stay calm under pressure and don’t personalize corrections



This Role Is Not for You If You:

 • If you have ever missed a deadline, payment, or critical
 due to disorganization or oversight, this role will not be a fit. This role requires zero tolerance for missed financial or operational items.

 • Need constant reassurance or validation

 • Guess instead of asking when unclear

 • Take feedback personally

 • Avoid accountability

 • Prefer slow, low-pressure environments



-



What Success Looks Like

 • The CEO’s calendar is accurate, structured, and protected

 • Inbox = Zero Daily (for critical items)   

 • Tasks are handled without reminders

 • Errors are corrected quickly by creating systems and workflows and do not repeat

 • Communication is short, concise, and proactive

 • Trust compounds and responsibility expands rapidly



-



Why This Role Is Different

 • You get a front-row seat to how a real estate investment business is built and scaled

 • Strong performance leads to expanded responsibility, trust, and compensation

 • This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow with a CEO—not hop jobs



-



Tools We Use

 • Google Workpace (Gmail, Calendar, Google Sheets, Google Docs) 

 • Asana

 • Slack

 • ChatGPT Pro (not provided but at least ChatGPT Go is required for this role) 

 • Airbnb / VRBO / Hospitable

 • REsimpli CRM

 • NordVPN (provided)



-



Non-Negotiable Setup Requirements

 • Quiet, separate, dedicated home office

 • Two monitors with an external mouse & keyboard

 • Noise-canceling Bluetooth headset

 • Hardwired internet (minimum 300 Mbps download & upload speed)

 • Backup internet and backup power



Paid Time Off (PTO) 



After completing 90 days of employment, you will begin accruing paid time off equivalent to 10 days per year, accrued monthly starting on Day 91 (approximately 0.83 day per month).

-



Application Process (Follow Exactly or Your Application Will Not Be Reviewed)



Step 1: Attach your resume via Google Drive



Step 2: Record a Loom video and share the link answering:

 1. Why this role excites you

 2. A time you protected a leader’s time under pressure

 3. A mistake you made—and how you ensured it never happened again

 4. How you handled direct feedback

 5. Include the word “Control” in your Loom video.



Step 3:

 • Screenshot from Speedtest.net via Google Drive

 • Photo of your current home office setup via Google Drive



-



Trial Period



All hires begin with a 30-day paid trial period. Expect daily check-ins, real responsibility, and fast feedback. 



Repeated mistakes without system improvement will result in immediate termination.



We hire based on performance, correction speed, judgment, and character.

title: Customer Support Specialist
description:
About Us

Structure Flows is a service that provides
 advertising infrastructure to media buyers and agencies. We supply things like Business Managers, ad accounts, profiles, and Pages to clients who need reliable setups for their advertising operations. All of our client communication and delivery happens through 
, and we track everything internally through a dashboard. We're growing steadily and we need an extra pair of hands to help us keep up with client requests and day-to-day support.



The Role

We're not looking for a
 expert here. What we need is someone who is fast, reliable, and genuinely dedicated to keeping clients happy. Most of what you'll be doing is straightforward — responding to client messages in our 
 server, helping them with basic questions, passing along deliveries, and making sure everything gets logged properly in our system. The work itself isn't complicated, but it does require you to be on top of things. When a client reaches out, they need a response quickly, not hours later. That's the single most important thing in this role: fast reaction times and consistent availability.

You'll be trained on how our processes work and what our products are, so you don't need to come in already knowing the ins and outs of
 infrastructure. What you do need is the kind of attitude where you take ownership of your responsibilities, pay attention to details, and don't let things slip through the cracks. If you're someone who checks in regularly, responds promptly, and takes pride in doing even simple tasks well, you're exactly who we're looking for.

This is a daily role that requires your attention seven days a week. On most days the workload will be somewhere between two and four hours, though some days will be lighter depending on how busy things are. It's not a traditional nine-to-five job, but it does require you to be consistently present and responsive throughout the day. Clients don't stop reaching out on weekends, so neither can we.



What We're Looking For

Above all else, we need someone who reacts fast and shows up every day. Speed and dedication are what matter most in this role. You should be comfortable communicating in clear, professional English, since everything happens in writing through 
.

You do need to have at least basic working experience with 
, Google Sheets, and ClickUp. These are tools we use every single day. 
 is where all client communication happens, Google Sheets is how we track orders and inventory, and ClickUp is how we manage tasks and keep everything organized internally. You don't need to be a power user in any of them, but you should be able to jump in and navigate them without needing to learn what they are from scratch.

Being organized and keeping track of multiple conversations and tasks at the same time is part of the job, so a natural sense of structure helps a lot.



How to Apply

We want to see two things from you.

First, write us a short motivation letter explaining why you're interested in this role and what makes you a reliable person to have on a team. We don't need anything formal or fancy, just be honest about who you are and how you work. Tell us about your availability, how quickly you typically respond to messages, and why a daily commitment like this fits your lifestyle.

Second, include your resume and any relevant work experience. Also include the word strawberry in the first sentence of your resume to show that you actually read the whole application. If you've done customer support, community management, virtual assistance, or anything else where fast communication and consistency were key, make sure to highlight that.

Applications that don't include both of these will not be reviewed. We're looking for someone dependable who actually wants to be part of a growing operation, so if that sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you.

title: E-commerce & Shopify Specialist (Virtual Assistant)
