title: Clinical Writer (nurse, MA, other) & High-Level WordPress Specialist
description:
We are a  a high-growth, physician-led telehealth practice. We operate in complex clinical spaces (Suboxone, PrEP/PEP, HIV) and public health initiatives. We need a professional who can produce elite-level medical content and build it into a high-performance WordPress environment.



Clinical & Academic Background: A degree in Nursing (BSN), Public Health, or a related clinical field is required. Candidates must demonstrate a collegiate/professional level of literacy, with the ability to synthesize complex medical data and public health policy into authoritative, high-level prose (proof of education is required). 



You will be an the architect of our digital authority under guidance of our clinical team. You will take clinical briefs and public health data and transform them into visually stunning, technically advanced, and SEO-optimized web pages that position our national practice as the primary authority nationally.  



High-Level Technical WordPress Requirements:



Technical SEO & Schema: Deep knowledge of MedicalEntity, FAQ, and Article Schema to ensure our content is cited by AI tools (ChatGPT/Perplexity).



You will be responsible for working with our SEO marketing and design team for full execution: WordPress Design ? GoHighLevel Workflow Integration ? Google Business Profile Posting.



Performance: Knowledge of WebP optimization, CSS minification, and maintaining elite Core Web Vitals.



Clinical & Public Health Requirements:



Ability to write clinical and public health content 



Deep familiarity with PrEP, PEP, HIV care, and US healthcare regulations CDC and other authoratative organizations



Mastery of E-E-A-T (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness).



Mandatory Screening Questions (Must complete both to be considered):

Question 1: Technical Execution

"Walk us through your technical process for ensuring a clinical blog post is 'Answer-Forward' for AI engines. Which specific Schema types do you use, and how do you structure your HTML headers to win the Featured Snippet?"



Question 2: The E-E-A-T Writing Test

"Below, please submit a two-paragraph writing sample for a blog post titled: 'The Impact of Rural Healthcare Access on PrEP Adherence in the Southern US.' Your sample must:



Utilize and cite at least two high-authority resources (e.g., CDC, HRSA, or NIH).



Demonstrate 'Medical E-E-A-T' by using precise clinical and administrative terminology.



Include a brief explanation of which 2 external 'backlinks' you would choose to strengthen this article's authority and why."

title: Lead Research & Outreach Specialist (Remote) – Entertainment Industry
description:
We are seeking a highly organized and resourceful Lead Research & Outreach Specialist to support a growing live entertainment business. This role focuses on building, cleaning, and validating contact lists, identifying ideal prospects, and supporting outreach efforts.



This is not just data entry. You will be responsible for finding the right contacts, verifying accurate information, and helping determine whether an organization is a strong fit for live entertainment services such as corporate events, schools, libraries, camps, and community programs.



What You’ll Be Doing



1. Lead Research & List Building (Primary Focus)



Build targeted contact lists (schools, libraries, camps, HOAs, companies, event planners)

Identify decision-makers (e.g., principals, PTO leaders, event coordinators, HR managers)

Find and verify current
 addresses and contact info

Keep lists updated as contacts change over time



2. Data Organization & CRM Management



Clean and organize existing contact lists

Remove duplicates and outdated entries

Maintain a structured, easy-to-use database (Google Sheets or CRM)

Tag and segment lists by market (schools, corporate, libraries, etc.)



3. Prospect Qualification (Key Responsibility)



Research each organization to determine:

Do they host events or hire entertainment?

What types of events (family, corporate, educational)?

Are they likely a good fit for a professional magician?

Add notes and insights to each contact (this is critical)



4. Outreach Support



Assist with
 outreach campaigns

Personalize messages with relevant details

Track responses and engagement



5. Marketing & Social Media Support



Schedule and post content (photos, videos, testimonials)

Help keep online presence active and professional

Assist with light website updates if needed

title: Customer Success Agent – Calls & WhatsApp (On-Call)
description:
We are a North American review management company hiring a sharp, professional Customer Success Agent to handle inbound customer calls and WhatsApp messages on our behalf.



This is an ON-DEMAND role. You must be available to answer calls and messages at any time during agreed hours. Reliability is non-negotiable.



You MUST have:

•?  ?Excellent spoken and written English (neutral or North American-sounding accent required)

•?  ?A calm, confident, professional phone manner

•?  ?At least 1 year of customer service or call handling experience

•?  ?Stable, fast internet connection at all times (backup mobile data required)

•?  ?A backup power source or UPS in case of electricity interruption

•?  ?WhatsApp installed and active on your phone

•?  ?Ability to use RingCentral to receive forwarded calls

•?  ?A quiet, professional workspace



What you will be doing:

•?  ?Answering all inbound calls forwarded from our business lines

•?  ?Screening each call: new client inquiries get transferred to the owner immediately; existing customer complaints are handled fully using our scripts

•?  ?Responding to inbound WhatsApp messages using our response system

•?  ?Following objection-handling scripts precisely — full training provided

•?  ?Escalating urgent situations to management immediately

•?  ?Sending a short daily log of all calls and messages handled



Pay: 1,300 PHP per day (on-demand availability)

title: Urgent Outbound Call Representative with General Admin Experience
description:
We are urgently seeking a versatile and detail-oriented Outbound Call Representative with strong general admin experience preferably from Cebu, Philippines, to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for making outbound calls to prospective clients, maintaining accurate records, and supporting day-to-day administrative tasks.



Responsibilities: 

Conduct outbound calls to generate leads and follow up on customer inquiries

Follow established scripts when required, while adapting naturally to conversations

Maintain and accurately update customer records and databases

Collaborate with internal teams to ensure smooth operations and efficient outbound processes

Provide general administrative support, including data entry, scheduling, and documentation

Perform additional tasks as needed to support team objectives and overall business operations



Qualifications:

Previous experience in outbound sales, telemarketing, or customer service preferred

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

Exhibits remarkable composure and possesses exceptional patience when dealing leads

Ability to work independently and as part of a team in a fast-paced environment

Comfortable using spreadsheet and CRM software and other sales tools.

Possesses excellent English proficiency with clear and articulate communication, maintaining a neutral accent without noticeable influence from applicant’s first language



If you're interested in applying, please send your resume, screenshot of computer specifications, screenshot of internet speed test, and video recording where you introduce yourself and elaborate on your experiences.



Together, let’s optimize business operations and drive success!!!

title: Junior Accountant - US Client Facing
description:
Salary: $400 - $650 USD per month

Job Type: Full-Time (48 hours/week)

Shift: US Business Hours (EST/PST) (Night Shift in PH)



We are committed to building a team as diverse as the community we serve. We especially welcome applications from women and underrepresented groups



About the Role

We are a US-based firm looking for a vibrant, professional Junior Accountant to be the "face" of our daily operations. If you are a recent graduate who is tech-savvy, loves QuickBooks Online, and enjoys interacting with people on camera, this is the perfect entry-level role for you!



This isn't your typical "back-office" accounting job. You will be helping US business owners keep their books clean while serving as a professional representative of our brand.



What You’ll Do

QBO Management: Handle daily categorization, bank reconciliations, and data entry within QuickBooks Online.



Client Success: Host brief Google Meet check-ins with clients to request missing documents or clarify transactions.



Professional Reporting: Generate and present basic P&L and Balance Sheet reports.  



Collaboration: Support our Senior CPA in preparing for month-end close.



What We’re Looking For

Education: Recent graduate . Freshers are encouraged to apply!



QuickBooks Skills: Familiarity with QuickBooks Online (QBO). ProAdvisor certification is a huge plus.



"Camera-Ready" Presence: You must be comfortable on video calls and present yourself with a high degree of professionalism and energy.



Communication: Flawless verbal and written English is a must-have for our US-based clients.



Tech Kit: You have a reliable home office setup (high-speed internet, noise-cancelling headset, and power backup) and are comfortable working US business hours (EST/PST).



Why You’ll Love It

Deep-dive training in US accounting practices.



Work in a fun, modern company culture that values communication.



Competitive starting pay with quarterly performance reviews.



How to Apply

To be considered, please send your application with the subject line: "Junior Accountant Rockstar - [Your Name]".



Attach your resume (PDF).



REQUIRED: Include a 120-second video introduction (via Loom) telling us about your accounting background and why you enjoy working with clients. We will not review applications without a video intro.

title: Customer Support Specialist | US Tech Startup (Full-Time, Long-Term People Only)
description:
Fast-Growing Tech Moving Platform: Moving Muscle



Company: Moving Muscle, a fast-growing labor-only moving platform based in the United States. We are innovating the traditional moving industry by providing reliable, transparent moving labor to customers booking rental trucks and containers.



About the Role

We are hiring a Customer Support Specialist to handle inbound & outbound calls, SMS, live ticketing, job dispatch, and administrative data entry. You will be the front line ensuring our customers and movers get the right help at the right time. Having experience in local home service industry is vital for this role.



This role requires top-tier English, strong technical skills, professional phone presence, and proven customer support experience. We are only looking for serious professionals with a quiet workspace, excellent internet, and the right hardware to handle a demanding software stack.



Key Responsibilities

• Answer inbound calls with professionalism and empathy.

• Make outbound calls to customers and movers as needed for updates, confirmations, or issue resolution.

• Respond quickly to SMS and ticket inquiries using Front (similar to Zendesk/Freshdesk).

• Dispatch movers to jobs in real-time, ensuring scheduling accuracy and customer satisfaction.

• Update and maintain internal systems (Notion for team organization, Slack for communication, Google Sheets for tracking).

• Document issues clearly for management and escalate when necessary.

• Uphold high standards of accuracy, professionalism, and customer care.



**Required Skills & Experience (NON-NEGOTIABLE)**

• 3+ years in customer support / BPO / call center handling phone + ticket systems.

• Excellent spoken & written English. Neutral or near-neutral accent is required.

• Strong multitasking: handle calls, SMS, and tickets simultaneously.

• Experience with ticketing software (Front, Zendesk, or Freshdesk).

• Experience with VoIP calling systems (Aircall, RingCentral, Dialpad, etc.).

• Tech-savvy and comfortable with multiple SaaS platforms (Slack, Notion, Google Workspace).

• Quiet, professional home office setup: noise-canceling headset, reliable high-speed internet, backup plan for power/internet outages.

• Proven track record of reliability (we will check references and work history).



Tip: If you are very experienced with Notion, reference this at the top of your application



Work Environment & Equipment Requirements

• High-speed wired internet (minimum 25 Mbps download / 10 Mbps upload).

• Backup connection or contingency plan (must be explained in application).

• Fast, modern computer capable of running multiple SaaS apps simultaneously.

• Professional noise-canceling headset.

• Quiet, distraction-free workspace for clear calls.



Operating Hours:

8AM - 8PM Eastern Standard Time (US)



Please submit in your application if you are flexible on which shift hours or if there are strong preferences.



Compensation

$7.50 USD / hour ($225 per week, full-time, paid weekly)



Starting rate: $7.50/hr. We conduct performance reviews every quarter. Based on quality, consistency, and initiative, pay will increase over time based on contributions. We are seeking someone for the long-run who will be able to adjust roles over time and grow with us.



- Long-term role with growth potential for top performers.

- Training provided on company workflows; you are expected to already be very strong in core support skills and software.



Application Instructions:

To apply, you must follow these steps. Applications missing any step will not be considered.



1. Subject Line: Start your application header with the phrase:

“Strong Support Muscle” (this shows you pay attention to detail)



2. Loom Video (mandatory, under 5 minutes): Answer the following 3 questions in English. (No other formats accepted; Loom only.)

• Q1: Which industry do you have experience in as a customer support specialist role?

• Q2: What excites you the most about tech? What tools do you most use? What AI do you use?

• Q3: Quickly walk us through your home office setup (internet speed, backup plan, computer, headset, and workspace).



Why This Role:



This is NOT a “starter job.” This is a premium support role for someone who takes pride in delivering excellent service, can think independently, and wants to be part of a growing US startup revolutionizing the moving industry. If you are reliable, professional, and committed, you will be treated as a valued long-term partner.

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant (Lead Generation + Follow-Up)
description:
Su

We’re looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Virtual Assistant to support a fast-paced real estate operation. Your primary focus will be generating leads, managing follow-ups, and keeping our pipeline organized so no opportunity slips through the cracks.



You will manage and update the CRM daily, including tagging, notes, and pipeline tracking, follow up with leads through text,
, and calls using provided scripts, research property owners and assist with skip tracing, pull and organize property data from sources like MLS and public records, help execute
 and SMS campaigns, schedule appointments, maintain calendars, and track key performance metrics.



You should have strong written and spoken English, be highly organized, comfortable using CRM systems, and able to manage multiple tasks while thinking independently and following systems.

Compensation is hourly with performance bonuses tied to qualified leads and deals closed.

To apply, send a resume, a short introduction with your experience, explaining how you would handle a lead that has not responded in two weeks. Include the word “pipeline” in your subject line.

title: Appointment Setter (Cold Calling) – Fluent English Required
description:
About the Role:



We are looking for a reliable and confident Appointment Setter to make outbound calls and schedule appointments for our business.



You will be speaking with potential clients over the phone, following a simple script, and setting appointments on our calendar.



This is a long-term position with room to grow if you perform well.



Responsibilities:



Make outbound calls daily (cold + warm leads)

Follow a proven script

Speak clearly and professionally

Handle basic objections

Schedule qualified appointments

Update simple notes in our system



Requirements (IMPORTANT):



Fluent English (clear, neutral accent)

Prior cold calling / call center / sales experience

Comfortable speaking on the phone all day

Reliable internet + quiet workspace

Positive attitude and strong work ethic



Compensation:



$4/hour USD + commission

Performance bonus per booked appointment

Opportunity for raises based on performance



HOW TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY):



To be considered, you MUST do the following:



Send a 30-second voice recording introducing yourself

Record yourself reading this script:



"Hi, this is Abe calling. I’m just reaching out real quick to follow up and see if you had a 
nt to go over some options that could help you and your family. It’ll only take a minute — does now work for you?"



Tell me your:

Experience with cold calling

How many calls you can make per day



IMPORTANT:

Applications without a voice recording will NOT be considered.



We are looking to hire immediately.

If you are reliable and serious about work, this can be a long-term opportunity.

title: Customer Service Representative (Logistics)
description:
We're looking for a Customer Service Representative with logistics experience to serve as the primary point of contact between assigned clients and warehouse operations at a New Jersey-based 3PL provider. You will own one to two client accounts, manage order flow from receipt through delivery, coordinate shipment routing, and handle all client communication with accuracy and speed.



This role requires someone who already understands how shipments work end to end. You are not being taught the fundamentals. You are expected to hit the ground running with a solid grasp of order processing, shipping documentation, retailer compliance requirements, and warehouse coordination.



Why You'll Want to Join



- You will be paid in USD (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- Paid Time Off in accordance with company policy

- Observance of Holidays per company guidelines

- 100% remote setup so you can work wherever you're most productive

- Own your accounts directly with clear responsibilities and minimal oversight

- Join a relationship-driven 3PL where operational accuracy and responsiveness are the competitive advantage



What You'll Work On



Client and Order Management



- Serve as the day-to-day point of contact for assigned client accounts

- Receive, review, and process incoming orders with accuracy before warehouse execution

- Ensure all order details are correct and complete prior to handoff

- Manage high-volume
 and async communication across clients via
 and WhatsApp



Shipment Coordination and Routing



- Coordinate shipment routing based on client and end-customer requirements

- Ensure all shipments meet retailer compliance standards for accounts such as Walmart, Sam's Club, Wayfair, Home Depot, Amazon, Lowe's, and Costco

- Handle routing instructions and ensure shipments are dispatched correctly and on time



Documentation and Logistics Administration



- Generate and manage bills of lading, shipping labels, and compliance documentation

- Ensure all shipments are fully documented and dispatch-ready

- Maintain accurate records across the internal WMS and logistics tools



Warehouse and Operations Coordination



- Act as the liaison between the client and the warehouse manager

- Communicate order priorities, flag issues, and track fulfillment status

- Resolve execution issues quickly and keep clients informed throughout



What You Bring



- Experience in a 3PL, freight forwarding, warehousing, supply chain, or import and export environment

- Hands-on experience with U.S. retailer routing and compliance requirements including big-box retailers such as Walmart, Wayfair, Home Depot, or similar

- Strong understanding of order processing workflows and shipping documentation including BOLs, labels, and routing guides

- Familiarity with warehouse management systems

- Strong written English: the majority of this role is
-based communication and documentation accuracy is critical

- High attention to detail and a process-driven approach to managing multiple workflows simultaneously

- Comfortable working in a Windows-based environment with VPN and remote desktop access

- Availability to work EST business hours



Nice to Have



- Spanish language proficiency

- Experience working directly with importers or consumer goods companies

- Background managing client accounts independently in a 3PL or fulfillment environment



How to Apply



Please include:



1. Your updated resume

2. A **short Loom video (1 to 2 minutes)** introducing yourself, describing your logistics background, and walking through how you have managed order coordination and client communication in a previous role



**Only candidates who submit a Loom video will be moved to the next step of the hiring process.**



If you know logistics operations inside and out, communicate clearly in writing, and take pride in keeping shipments accurate and clients informed, this role gives you direct account ownership and the autonomy to execute without constant oversight.

title: Marketing & SEO Lead
description:
We are a high-growth, physician-led telehealth practice expanding nationally. We specialize in complex care (HIV prevention, addiction medicine, chronic disease). We are looking for an operational "Lieutenant" who can lead our digital team and drive our national and local search presence.



The Role:

You are the operational lead. You will manage a team consisting of a WordPress Designer, graphic designer, a Clinical Writer, and an SEO worker. You are responsible for the team's output, but you are also a "doer" who owns our SEO strategy, monitors our clinical presence, and reports directly to leadership.



Key Responsibilities:



Team Management: Oversee the Designer and Writer to ensure the -state expansion stays on schedule. Monitor the progress of the SEO/Backlink worker and report weekly to leadership.



SEO Execution: Lead the strategy for national and local SEO rankings. You will personally oversee backlink quality, clinical authority optimization, and technical SEO health.



Analytics & Reporting: Weekly analysis of Google Analytics and Search Console. You will prepare and present weekly executive reports to leadership on KPIs, traffic, and conversion metrics.



Google Workspace & Workflow: Manage our internal Google Workspace and optimize Google Workflows to ensure the team operates at maximum efficiency.



GHL Integration (Preferred): Oversee or assist in implementing GoHighLevel automations and CRM management to ensure patient leads are tracked correctly.



Requirements:



Proven Management Experience: You must have experience leading a remote creative/technical team.



Advanced SEO Knowledge: Deep expertise in national SEO, local SEO Also people usually sign out all the charts during the week so the weekends can be My advice, and high-authority backlink strategies.



Data Mastery: Proficiency in Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and creating executive-level reports.



Professional Communication: College education preferred (professional/executive) for reporting to leadership and coordinating with clinical staff. 



Tool Proficiency: Google Workspace, Project Management tools (Asana/ClickUp), and ideally GoHighLevel.



Mandatory Technical Screening Question:

"We are expanding nationally state to state. Walk us through your specific process for managing a team to create 'Local Authority' in 50+ cities simultaneously. Additionally, what are the top 3 metrics you would include in a weekly executive report to a Physician-CEO to prove SEO ROI?"

title: Talent Acquisition Coordinator
description:
We're looking for a **Talent Acquisition Coordinator** with a recruiting or HR background to fully own the pipeline for a fast-growing AI healthcare startup. This role is built for someone who already knows how to manage a high-volume funnel, keep job boards running cleanly, and hit a consistent hiring target without needing process built for them.



The goal is four qualified hires every two weeks, aligned to a biweekly training cycle. You own that number. If you have managed volume recruiting before, know how to clear an inbox of hundreds of applications efficiently, and can run independently across time zones, this role is a strong fit.



## Why You'll Want to Join



- You will be paid in **USD** (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- **Paid Time Off** in accordance with company policy

- Observance of **Holidays** per company guidelines

- **100% remote setup** so you can work wherever you're most productive

- Direct ownership over a high-volume recruiting function with clear weekly targets

- Work inside a growing healthtech startup where your hiring output directly drives the business



## What You'll Work On



**Full-Cycle Recruiting Pipeline**



- Actively source and move candidates through the funnel across multiple job boards with hundreds of applications weekly

- Review inbound applications same-day or next-day across all active platforms

- Screen candidates and advance qualified applicants without waiting for direction

- Hit a consistent target of four qualified hires per two-week training cycle



**Interview Scheduling and Coordination**



- Schedule all interview rounds with enough lead time to ensure a professional candidate experience

- Send calendar invites at least 24 hours in advance across all interview stages

- Coordinate availability between candidates and internal interviewers without friction



**Job Posting and Pipeline Management**



- Refine, publish, and actively iterate job descriptions based on performance data and feedback

- Manage active postings across Indeed and other relevant job boards

- Keep the pipeline clean, organized, and moving at all times



**Onboarding and Training Support**



- Ensure new hires are fully set up on all required tools and systems before day one

- Complete onboarding training yourself, then assist in delivering sessions and developing materials for new hires

- Flag setup gaps or blockers early so nothing falls through on the first day



## What You Bring



- 2+ years of experience in recruiting, talent acquisition, or HR coordination

- Proven experience managing high-volume application pipelines across job boards including Indeed or similar platforms

- Strong written English communication skills: clear, direct, and professional

- Demonstrated ability to work independently across time zones with minimal oversight

- High attention to detail and consistent follow-through without reminders

- Ownership mindset: you surface problems with a proposed solution, not just a flag

- Comfort owning a weekly hiring metric and being accountable to it



## Nice to Have



- Experience in healthcare, healthtech, or clinical staffing environments

- Familiarity with high-volume hourly or specialist hiring

- Prior experience managing or training new hires

- Interest in AI tools that could streamline or automate parts of the recruiting workflow



## How to Apply



Please include:



1. Your **updated resume**

2. A **short Loom video (1 to 2 minutes)** introducing yourself, describing your experience managing a high-volume recruiting pipeline, and sharing one example of a problem you identified and solved independently without being asked



**Only candidates who submit a Loom video will be moved to the next step of the hiring process.**



If you are a self-directed recruiter who can own a full hiring pipeline, hit a consistent weekly target, and wants to do meaningful work inside a company removing real friction from healthcare, this role gives you the ownership and the impact to do your best work.

title: **Part-Time Online English & Maths Teacher for 10-Year-Old (UK Level)**
description:
**Part-Time Online English & Maths Teacher for 10-Year-Old (UK Level)**



We are looking for a reliable, patient, and engaging online teacher to support a 10-year-old child (UK Year 5 level) in English and Maths.



This is a **long-term, part-time role** with a fixed weekly schedule.



---



**Schedule (UK Time):**



* Monday: 15:45 – 16:30

* Tuesday: 15:45 – 16:15

* Friday: 18:45 – 19:15



Total: approximately 1 hour 45 minutes per week



---



**Role Responsibilities:**



* Teach English (reading, comprehension, spelling, vocabulary)

* Teach Maths (arithmetic, basic problem solving, fractions/decimals)

* Deliver structured and engaging lessons suitable for a 10-year-old

* Identify weak areas and adjust teaching accordingly

* Keep the student engaged and motivated

* Set 2–3 small homework tasks each week

* Provide brief weekly progress feedback



---



**Requirements:**



* Experience teaching children (ages 8–12 preferred)

* Strong, clear spoken English

* Patient, friendly, and encouraging teaching style

* Ability to explain concepts simply and clearly

* Reliable internet connection and consistent availability

* Comfortable teaching both English and basic Maths



---



**Preferred (but not essential):**



* Background in teaching (school, tutoring, or education degree)

* Experience with primary/elementary school students

* Familiarity with UK curriculum (KS2) or similar level



---



**Pay:**



* **$3 – $9 per hour** (depending on experience and performance)

* Opportunity for increase based on performance and consistency



---



**Application Instructions:**

Please start your application with the word **“Teacher”**.



Include:



1. Your experience teaching children

2. Whether you have taught Maths to children aged 8–12

3. Your internet speed

4. A short voice recording introducing yourself

5. Confirmation you can attend all listed time slots



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete a **10–15 minute trial lesson**.



We are looking for someone reliable and long-term who can build a positive learning relationship.

title: WhatsApp Booking Assistant (Fast Response Required)
description:
???? Virtual Assistant – WhatsApp Booking Support



We are a fast-growing home-service massage platform. Our therapists travel directly to customers’ homes and hotels.



We are hiring a highly responsive Virtual Assistant to handle simple customer bookings via WhatsApp.



---



?? IMPORTANT – READ BEFORE APPLYING



This is an availability-based role.



We cannot guarantee a fixed number of bookings. Booking volume depends on:

• Customer demand in the market  

• Your response speed  

• Communication quality  

• How efficiently you connect customers with therapists  



Fast, focused assistants usually perform better and earn more.



---



???? Responsibilities



Your job:

• Reply to WhatsApp messages fast  

• Ask customers for location, time, and service  

• Post requests in the therapist group  

• Connect customer and therapist  

• Handle occasional simple calls  

• Record each booking in a tracking table (Google Sheets or similar)  



Each booking usually takes only 2–3 minutes of active work.



---



? Work Setup



• 40 hours per week  

• Fixed daily shifts  

• During your shift:

  - Keep WhatsApp open  

  - Respond within seconds (max 1–2 minutes)  



You may do other work during your shift, but ONLY if your response time stays perfect.



If messages are late, ignored, or low quality ? immediate removal.



---



???? Payment



• $6 per shift  

• $2 per confirmed booking  



Average:

• ~7 bookings per shift  

• More possible as demand grows  



Again: bookings are not guaranteed.



---



???? Language Requirements



• Good English required  

• Mandarin Chinese is a strong advantage (not mandatory)  



---



???? Test Phase



We evaluate:

• Response speed  

• Reliability  

• Accuracy in handling bookings  

• Communication quality  

• Ability to follow instructions  



---



???? Application Instructions – Mandatory



Applications that do not follow ALL instructions will be rejected.



Please include:



1. Your English level  

2. Your Mandarin Chinese level (if any)  

3. Confirm you are OK with:

   - $6 per shift  

   - $2 per booking  

   - no guaranteed bookings  

   - strict response-time expectations  



4. Write FAST at the beginning of your application  



5. Answer this:



A customer writes:

“Hi, I’d like to book a massage for tonight. Are you available?”



What would you reply?



---



We are only looking for people who are fast, focused, and reliable.



If you are not 100% responsive during your shift, please do not apply.

We help people set reminders, save memories, and manage lists straight from their phone. We're a lean, scrappy startup moving fast and looking for someone to help us grow our social media presence from the ground up.



The Role

, Instagram, TikTok, and X 
). You'll be responsible for building brand awareness, creating engaging content, and converting followers into paying customers.

title: Automation & Integrations Expert (GoHighLevel + ClickUp + Make)
description:
We’re a fast-growing real estate + property management company using automation to streamline operations, improve client experience, and scale efficiently. Our core operating tools are GoHighLevel (GHL), ClickUp, and 
.

We’re hiring an experienced Automation & Integrations Expert to build, maintain, and improve our automation systems across these tools. This role is for someone who thinks in systems, follows instructions precisely, and produces clean, reliable automations with clear documentation.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

- Build and maintain automations primarily in 
, connecting tools via native integrations, webhooks, and APIs

- Build and maintain CRMs, pipelines, workflows, and automations in GoHighLevel

- Build and maintain operational systems in ClickUp (lists, statuses, templates, custom fields, relationships, views)

- Troubleshoot broken automations and improve reliability (edge cases, de-dupe, error handling, alerts/logging)

- Create SOPs and documentation for all automations (so another tea
mber can understand and maintain them)

- Improve existing workflows and recommend better system design when needed

- Collaborate with the operations team to implement new systems quickly and accurately

- Bonus (nice-to-have): Help maintain and update our website (WordPress/Webflow/Squarespace or similar).



YOU’D BE A GREAT FIT IF

- You have real experience in GoHighLevel (pipelines + workflows + automation logic)

- You’re very comfortable in ClickUp and can structure systems cleanly (not just “use tasks”)

- You can build in 
 with routers, filters, field mapping, and reliable error handling

- You understand webhooks, APIs, and JSON at a practical level

- You communicate clearly in English and can explain what you built without rambling

- You follow instructions exactly and don’t cut corners

- You’re proactive: you don’t just “build what’s asked,” you notice what will break and fix it



REQUIREMENTS

- Proven experience building automations (Make / Zapier / n8n or similar)

- Strong working knowledge of CRMs and workflow automation (GHL preferred)

- Strong working knowledge of project management systems (ClickUp preferred)

- Comfortable with webhooks/APIs/JSON

- High attention to detail and strong documentation habits



ROLE DETAILS

- Full-time, remote

- Schedule: Monday–Friday, aligned with CST (8 AM – 5 PM CST, includes lunch break)

- Pay: $3-5 USD/hour, depending on experience

- Long-term role with growth potential



HOW TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY)

We do not review platfor
ssages.

Applications that don’t follow instructions are disqualified.



STEP 1 —

1. Send an
 to: 

2. Subject line must be exactly: Automation Expert Application – [Full Name]

3.
 body must contain only:

- A short greeting (1–2 lines)

- A Google Drive folder link (see Step 2)

- Your Detail Check answer at the very bottom (see Step 3)



STEP 2 — GOOGLE DRIVE FOLDER

1. Create a folder named exactly: Automation Expert – [Your Full Name]

2. Set sharing to: Anyone with the link can view

3. Include the following items (clearly organized):

a. Resume (PDF preferred)

- File name: Resume – [Your Name].pdf

b. Tech & Setup

   - Screenshot of your internet speed (download + upload)

   - Screenshot of your computer specs (RAM, processor, OS)

   - One photo of your workspace (desk + computer)

c. Video Proof (REQUIRED) — one single screen-share video

   - Record a Loom (or similar) screen share video that covers:

      - Quick intro

      - Who you are, where you’re based

      - Your automation background and primary tools

      - Tool experience proof (show what you can)

   - We prefer you show real examples inside GoHighLevel, ClickUp, and 
. If you have access:

   - Open one example in each tool and briefly explain what it does and how it’s structured.

   - If you do not currently have access to one of these tools:

   - Show a closest equivalent in a similar tool you do have access to (example: Zapier/n8n for Make, HubSpot/ActiveCampaign for GHL, Asana/Monday/Notion for ClickUp), or show sanitized screenshots.



Bonus (optional): Website experience

   - What platforms you’ve maintained (WordPress/Webflow/etc.)

   - One example of an update you’ve made (page edit, plugin/app, embed, tracking, DNS, etc.)



STEP 3 — DETAIL CHECK (REQUIRED)

At the very bottom of your
, answer this question on its own line (nothing under it):

WHAT HAPPENS NEXT

title: Social Media Graphic Designer
description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY



This organization is a mission-driven nonprofit headquartered in the United States. It operates a national

network of grassroots chapters focused on advocacy, education, and community organizing. The organization

partners with progressive groups nationwide to advance equity, inclusion, and social impact through coalition

building and grassroots engagement.



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are seeking a creative, reliable Social Media Graphic Designer to support this nonprofit team with visual

content creation across social media platforms. This is a part-time role (~10 hours/week) ideal for a designer

who produces high-quality work consistently and is available during set hours for real-time collaboration.

The primary focus is designing social media graphics for Instagram, with content repurposed across

and other platforms. The internal team provides content direction and approved messaging internally. The

designer will bring those ideas to life visually.

This is a growth-oriented position with a clear path from 10 hours/week to 20 hours/week based on

performance and organizational need.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Social Media Content Design (Primary Focus)



1. Design social media graphics for Instagram (static posts, carousels, stories), with content repurposed for

 and other platforms as needed.

2. Create visually compelling, on-brand content that aligns with the organization’s mission, voice, and

visual identity.

3. Translate approved messaging, campaign themes, and content briefs into polished, publish-ready

designs.

4. Maintain consistency in brand aesthetics across all visual content, including color palette, typography,

and layout.



Collaboration & Communication



1. Collaborate directly with the COO and internal team on content direction, feedback, and revisions.

2. Be available and responsive during agreed-upon working hours for real-time communication and

iteration.

3. Incorporate feedback promptly and deliver revisions within expected turnaround times.

4. Maintain organized files and design assets for easy access and reuse by the team.



Brand & Content Support



1. Adapt existing design templates for recurring content series and campaigns.

2. Support special projects such as event graphics, fundraising visuals, and advocacy campaign materials

as assigned.

3. Stay current with social media design trends and bring fresh visual ideas to the team.



REQUIREMENTS



Must-Have Qualifications



1. 2+ years of experience in graphic design with a portfolio demonstrating social media content creation.

2. Proficiency with Canva, including the ability to create professional, polished designs efficiently.

3. Strong visual design sense, including layout, typography, color theory, and brand consistency.

4. Ability to take content direction and approved messaging and translate it into compelling visual designs

without needing to develop copy or strategy.

5. Reliable availability during agreed-upon working hours with consistent responsiveness to messages and

feedback.

6. Ability to work independently, manage multiple design requests, and meet deadlines without constant

oversight.

7. Strong written communication skills in English for collaborating with the U.S.-based team.

8. Reliable internet connection and ability to overlap with U.S. Pacific Time and East Coast hours.



Preferred Qualifications



1. Experience with Adobe Illustrator or other professional design tools beyond Canva.

2. Background in designing for nonprofit, advocacy, or mission-driven organizations.

3. Experience creating content specifically for Instagram (posts, stories, reels covers, carousels).

4. Familiarity with social media best practices including image dimensions, aspect ratios, and

platform-specific formatting.

5. Experience working with brand guidelines and style guides.

6. Comfort with learning new tools and adapting to evolving content needs. A growth mindset is essential.



KEY TRAITS WE’RE LOOKING FOR



1. Creative and Consistent: Produces high-quality, on-brand visuals reliably. Every design reflects the

organization’s standards and mission.

2. Available and Responsive: This is the most important trait for this role. The team needs a designer

who is present, reachable, and responsive during agreed working hours. Availability and communication

are non-negotiable.

3. Detail-Oriented: Catches inconsistencies in design, spacing, alignment, and brand elements before

deliverables are submitted.

4. Self-Starter: Takes initiative, manages their own workload, and delivers results without needing to be

micromanaged.

5. Mission-Aligned: Understands and respects the purpose behind the organization’s work. While deep

subject matter expertise is not required, genuine respect for the organization’s mission and values is

expected.

6. Team Player: Treated as an integral part of the team, not a separate contractor. Expected to contribute

ideas, take feedback constructively, and grow into greater responsibility over time.

7. Transparent Communicator: Speaks up when something is unclear, flags capacity issues early, and

communicates progress honestly.



TOOLS AND PLATFORMS



Canva

Graphic Design

Adobe Illustrator

Instagram /

Google Suite

Graphic Design

Social Media Platforms

Communication & Collaboration



HOW TO APPLY



Interested candidates will submit their resume and portfolio for review, followed by a pre-recorded video

interview. Top candidates will be shortlisted and forwarded to this nonprofit team for final evaluation.

title: Video Editor & Social Media Content Specialist
description:
We are looking for a talented Video Editor & Social Media Content Specialist to join our growing 

team. In this role, you will take long-form video content and transform it into high-impact short

form clips, trailers, and social media assets optimized for platforms including Instagram, TikTok, 

YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn, and X.



This is a full-time, long-term opportunity supporting U.S.-based mission-driven organizations. 

We are looking for someone with a strong creative eye, technical editing skills, and a pulse on 

what performs well on social media.



Key Responsibilities



• Edit long-form videos (interviews, podcasts, keynotes, webinars) into engaging short

form clips for social media

• Create trailers, teasers, and highlight reels for marketing campaigns and events

• Design platform-specific content optimized for Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube 

Shorts, LinkedIn, and X

• Color correct, audio balance, and ensure consistent branding across all content

• Collaborate with social media and marketing teams on content calendars and campaign 

needs

• Stay current on social media trends, formats, and platform algorithm updates

• Organize and maintain a library of raw footage, clips, and finished assets

• Deliver content on tight turnarounds while maintaining high quality standards



Required Skills & Experience



• 2+ years of professional video editing experience, ideally for social media or digital 

marketing

• Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro

• Experience with CapCut, Descript, or similar short-form editing tools

• Strong eye for pacing, storytelling, and visual hierarchy in short-form content

• Working knowledge of Adobe After Effects or similar motion graphics software

• Familiarity with current social media trends and best practices across platforms

• Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

• Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously

• Reliable high-speed internet connection and a computer capable of handling video 

editing



Preferred Qualifications



• Experience creating content for nonprofit, social impact, or mission-driven organizations

• Familiarity with tools like Canva, Figma, or similar graphic design platforms

• Experience with podcast video editing

• Understanding of copyright and fair use in content creation

• Comfort using AI tools to speed up editing workflows (auto-captions, transcripts, cuts)



What We’re Looking For



• A storyteller who knows how to hook an audience in the first 3 seconds

• Someone who thinks proactively about what will perform, not just what is assigned

• Strong attention to detail, especially on captions, timing, and branding

• A team player who can take feedback, iterate, and deliver consistently

• Someone who is excited about mission-driven work and long-term growth opportunities



How to Apply



Please include the following with your application:

• Updated resume

• Portfolio or reel showcasing your best short-form edits (links to Vimeo, YouTube, or 

Google Drive preferred)

• Brief note about what kinds of projects excite you most

• Add captions, subtitles, motion graphics, animations, and on-screen text

title: VIDEO EDITOR
description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY



Steen Marketing is a lean, remote-first creative agency helping brands grow through performance-driven content. From scroll-stopping social ads to branding and motion graphics, we deliver high-impact creative work — without the overhead or fluff of traditional agencies.



We're looking for a Video Editor to support content creation for one of our clients in the wellness industry. If you craft videos that convert, have a sharp eye for detail, and take briefs seriously, we'd love to hear from you.





ROLE DESCRIPTION



This is a remote, freelance role (~30 hours per week, flexible scheduling). You'll be responsible for:



- Editing raw footage into high-quality video content for social ads

- Creating AI voiceovers and syncing them seamlessly

- Adding B-roll, transitions, and effects for clarity and engagement

- Color grading for a polished, consistent look

- Producing simple motion graphics (mostly text animations)

- Collaborating with the Creative Director to ensure content aligns with brand guidelines and project objectives





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Adobe Premiere Pro — this is our primary tool, non-negotiable

- Previous experience editing ads for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube

- Strong portfolio showcasing performance-driven work

- Fluent in English (written and spoken)

- Takes briefs seriously — reads them fully before starting, asks smart questions upfront, and follows creative direction precisely

- Responds to feedback constructively — implements revisions accurately without needing the same note twice

- Able to manage deadlines independently in an async remote environment

- Bonus: Proficiency in After Effects





WHY JOIN US



- No fluff, just real work: Clear briefs, direct feedback, and projects that actually ship. No endless meetings or bureaucracy.

- Remote-first flexibility: Work from anywhere, async-friendly, full scheduling autonomy within deadlines.

- Honest collaboration: We give clear, direct feedback — and we expect you to run with it. No ego, no guessing games.

- Room to grow: As the agency scales, so can your role. Bigger projects, new challenges, real ownership.





COMPENSATION



Rate: $5–$8/hour depending on experience and portfolio quality.



APPLICATION PROCESS



1. Send your portfolio + resume

2. Include a short note (max 5 sentences) explaining your workflow when you receive a new brief — how do you make sure you understand it fully before you start?

3. Complete a short paid test edit if shortlisted

4. Start paid remote work upon selection



IMPORTANT: Use the subject line "Video Editor – [Your Name] – I Read the Brief" when applying. Applications without this subject line will not be reviewed.

title: Customer Experience Agent (Phone Support)
description:
About the Role



You'll be the voice of our brand on the phone. That means two things:

Inbound: answering calls from customers who need help — order questions, "how do I actually use this product?" walkthroughs, refund and delivery issues, and the occasional pre-purchase question from someone who wants reassurance before buying.

Outbound: proactively calling existing customers in warm, well-defined segments — checking in on how they're getting on with the product, recommending the right option for their use case, helping gifters restock, and converting happy customers into repeat buyers.

This is not a cold-calling role. Every person you speak with has already bought from us or asked us for help. Your job is to make them feel looked after — and, where it makes sense, help them get more out of the product.



What You'll Actually Do



Answer inbound calls from customers across multiple time zones, resolving their issue in one call wherever possible.

Walk customers through how to use the product patiently and clearly.

Handle order changes, refunds, returns, and subscription questions with empathy and good judgment.

De-escalate frustrated customers and turn service-recovery 
nts into loyalty.

Make outbound calls to specific customer segments (gifters, repeat buyers, single-product buyers, recent reviewers) following clear playbooks we'll build together.

Recommend complementary products when they genuinely fit the customer's needs — never pushy, always helpful.

Capture feedback, common questions, and product ideas, and feed them back to the team so we can keep improving.

Collaborate with our
 support team to keep the customer experience consistent across channels.



Who You Are



You like talking to people. Genuinely. You're warm on the phone, you listen well, and older customers feel comfortable with you.

You're patient. A meaningful share of our customers are 65+, sometimes not very tech-savvy, and need things explained more than once. That doesn't frustrate you — it's part of the job you signed up for.

You're honest and grounded. You don't oversell, you don't lie about delivery dates, and you tell customers the truth even when it's uncomfortable. Our brand is built on trust.

You can sell without selling. You understand the difference between a recommendation that helps the customer and a pitch that helps you. You only ever do the first.

You're organized. You can manage a queue, take clear notes, follow up when you said you would, and not drop the ball.

You write well enough. Most of the work is on the phone, but you'll be sending follow-up
s and logging notes. Clear written English matters.



Nice to Have



Previous experience in customer support, hospitality, retail, or any phone-heavy role.

Experience with eCommerce platforms (Shopify, Gorgias, Zendesk, or similar).

Comfort with light outbound / sales-adjacent work — even if you've never been a "salesperson," you know how to recommend something you believe in.



What Success Looks Like in the First 90 Days



Day 30: You're confidently handling inbound calls on your own, with a strong grasp of our products, our common questions, and our refund and shipping policies.

Day 60: You're running outbound calls to your first warm segment (likely 4-star reviewers and gifters), with measurable improvement in repeat purchase rate from those segments.

Day 90: You've helped us identify the top three reasons customers call, contributed to our knowledge base, and are running both inbound and outbound work without supervision.



Why This Role Is Worth Your Time



Real impact. You're not employee #847 in a faceless call centre. You're our first phone hire, and the systems and playbooks you help build will shape how we do this for years.

A product customers love. Read our reviews. People are emotional about our product in a way that's rare in eCommerce. You won't be defending a bad product.

Growing company. We're scaling quickly, which means real opportunities to grow into team lead, customer experience manager, or specialized roles as we expand.

Flexible setup. Remote-friendly, with reasonable hours that respect your time.



How to Apply



Send us:

A short note — written or as a voice recording — telling us why you'd be good at this. We're at least as interested in how you sound on the phone as we are in your CV.

Your CV.

title: Head of Web Design / Web Strategy (Build From Scratch)
description:
Warren Digital is looking for a senior web designer / web strategist to help build our in-house web design capability from the ground up.



To be clear, we currently do not have a web team in place. I have a pool of applicants (primarily offshore), but I’m struggling with where to start, how to structure it properly, and how to take it to market.



The role



You will work directly with the founder to:



Define how we build and structure the web team

Advise on what roles are needed (design, frontend, backend, etc.)

Help shape a clear web offering, pricing, and go-to-market strategy

Create initial standards, wireframes, and direction

Guide how we scale this in-house, including hosting and ongoing services



This is a build and architect role, not just execution.



What we’re looking for

Strong experience in:

web design (UX/UI)

CRO-focused websites

SEO-aware builds (EEAT, AEO understanding is a bonus)

Experience building or scaling web teams

Ability to think commercially:

packaging

pricing

go-to-market

Ideally someone who can operate across:

design

frontend

backend (or at least understands the full picture)

Bonus if you have a network of people you trust and can bring in

Important

This is not a white-label or agency engagement

We are building in-house capability only

Freelancers only

If you represent an agency, do not apply

Structure



Initially this will be a part-time / casual role focused on setting everything up properly.

As we scale, this can transition into a full-time leadership role.



What I need from you



I need someone who can come in and answer:



How do we structure this team properly?

title: Quick Hire for VA Call Handling
description:
Important: Our application process moves very quickly. If you are selected for the next rounds of interviews, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist. This role consists of handling inbound calls, booking appointments, and completing various administrative tasks. This is a long-term, performance-based position. All calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



For candidates who may be a stronger fit outside of a voice-based role, we also offer non-voice positions with a heavier focus on administrative tasks, subject to availability and overall fit.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them in your reply, and answer each one thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?

(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: Full-Stack Web Developer & Technical Designer
description:
We are a high-growth telehealth practice specializing in addiction care, chronic disease management, and wellness. We are expanding nationally and need a technical powerhouse to lead our digital infrastructure. We need a Senior Full-Stack Web Developer  who can bridge the gap between advanced design and expert-level coding. You will own the technical integrity of our platform, ensuring it is secure, lightning-fast, and authoritative for AI search engines.



Who we are looking for:

We are NOT looking for a "plugin installer" or someone who only uses templates. We need a "Builder", someone who has deep coding experience and can design custom, high-performance web environments. You will be responsible for the technical speed, security, and advanced design of our website.



Key Responsibilities:



Advanced Custom Development: Move beyond standard themes to build custom, high-converting features using PHP, JavaScript, and advanced WordPress frameworks.



Technical SEO & Architecture: Resolve the current "Supportive Steps" content duplication issues through better site architecture (e.g., dynamic content blocks or canonical mapping).  



Performance Optimization: Implement advanced caching, CDN strategies, and script minification to ensure sub-second load times for patients in rural areas with limited connectivity.



HIPAA-Secure Architecture: Work with our Strategic Lead to ensure all patient-facing forms, APIs, and integrations meet strict HIPAA and YMYL security standards.



GEO Infrastructure: Implement custom schema markup (MedicalOrganization, Physician, FAQPage) to ensure our company is cited as a source of truth by AI engines like ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, AND other LLM models



Requirements:



5+ years of professional full-stack development experience (PHP, JavaScript, HTML5/CSS3). Will consider less experience based on job experience and prior roles. 



Proven track record building high-performance healthcare or enterprise sites.



Experience with advanced WordPress customization and API integrations.



Deep understanding of Technical SEO, Core Web Vitals, and mobile-first indexing.



Requirement: You must have experience with advanced coding (JavaScript/PHP) and custom design (Figma to WordPress).

How would you optimize a telehealth site specifically for users in rural areas with low-bandwidth internet connections? Please describe the technical steps you would take.

description:
Eterna Homes — We're Hiring



Real Estate Photo & Video

Editor

Bring our listings to life — from raw captures to gallery-ready, market-winning media.



Per Listing/Gig

Remote



Fast Turnaround Required

Trial Process Included

"At Eterna Homes, first impressions are everything. We need an editor who treats every property like a luxury listing — precise, polished, and delivered fast."



Deliverables you'll own



HDR Photo Editing

Natural, realistic skies across all exterior shots

title: AI Video Operator (Replication + Editing | Full Workflow)
description:
We are hiring an AI video operator to create short-form videos (15–45 seconds) by replicating existing high-performing content.



You will be given:



Reference videos

Scripts

Access to AI tools



Your job is to recreate the same video using a different avatar/subject and deliver a fully finished video ready to post.



This is a system-based role. You will be trained on our exact workflow and are expected to follow it precisely.

What You’ll Do

Watch a reference video and break it into scenes

Recreate each scene using AI (image/video generation)

Use prompting to generate realistic visuals

Animate scenes (Veo, Kling, or similar tools)

Add voice (ElevenLabs or similar)

Edit everything together into a final video (cuts, pacing, timing)

Deliver a complete, polished video



Requirements

Experience with AI tools (video, image generation, or voice tools)

Basic understanding of prompting (how to generate consistent visuals)

Video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, etc.)

Ability to follow instructions EXACTLY

Strong attention to detail (framing, lighting, realism)

Comfortable with repetitive, system-based work

Reliable and available to work daily

Good English communication

IMPORTANT



This is not a creative role.



You must be able to:



Look at a video

Replicate the same structure, pacing, and style

Execute consistently using a defined system



Please list experience with ai tools to create videos as well as with video editing. Please include screenshots of proof of you using the tools as well as video examples using ai to create fully made ai videos. 



If you cannot follow a structured process, do not apply.

title: Operations Manager & HR Partner (The "Right Hand" to CEO)
description:
I am looking for a high-level Operations Manager / HR Partner in the Philippines to take full ownership of my business results. I am not looking for a Virtual Assistant who waits for instructions. I need a leader who brings solutions, manages the team, and ensures that every hire adds value to the company.



You will be the bridge between my vision and the team's execution. Your goal is to free up my time so I can focus on big-picture growth while you handle the day-to-day operations and team performance.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Team Leadership & HR: Recruit, onboard, and manage a team (including Sourcing and Communications managers). You will track their KPIs and ensure they are productive.



Operations & Supply Chain: Oversee the Alibaba sourcing process. Ensure quality control, negotiate better terms with suppliers, and manage procurement timelines.



Project Management: Drive the development of e-commerce projects, website content updates, and the creation of professional product catalogs.



Strategic Reporting: Provide weekly reports on business performance, team efficiency, and project status.



Required Qualifications:



Proven experience as an Operations Manager, Project Manager, or Team Lead.



Deep understanding of Alibaba sourcing and supply chain management.



Experience in E-commerce (website content management, catalog creation, digital sales flow).



Expert level in project management tools (Asana, ClickUp, or Trello).



Ability to make decisions independently and "manage up" (tell me what needs to be done, don't just ask).



Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal).



Why Work With Us?



Long-term, stable full-time position.



Performance-based bonuses (We reward results, not just hours).



Direct communication with the CEO.



Opportunity to help build and scale a business from the ground up.





HOW TO APPLY (Follow these instructions strictly):



Change the subject line of your application to: "I am the Leader you need for Aromika.



Briefly describe a situation where you managed a team and solved a major problem without the owner’s help.



Include a link to your Loom video (max 2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining why you are an "A-Player" Manager, not just a VA.

title: Bookkeeper / Operations Assistant
description:
ABOUT THIS ROLE

We are seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented Bookkeeper / Operations Assistant to join our growing business/financial advisory firm serving clients in e-commerce, consulting and healthcare industries.

You will handle day-to-day bookkeeping tasks, AP/AR, reconciliations, financial documentation, sales/operations support, and basic HR admin.

This is a long-term, stable role with room for growth. 

Accuracy, reliability, and strong communication are essential.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Bookkeeping & Accounting

- Account Payable (invoice processing, bill paying, PO issuance, expense report, payroll)

- Communicate with vendors to request invoices, statements, or credits

- Account Receivable (invoice issuance), bank statement reconciliation

- Support quarter/year-end close: Reconciliations, Verification of transactions

- Support month-end close: Cash Flow Forecast Update, Purchase Order, Inventory tracking

- Prepare financials for audit and tax filing



Administrative & HR Support

- CRM updates (clients, prospects, leads)

- Employee onboarding (collect forms, IDs, signatures, background checks)

- Payroll Management

- Maintain employee files and documentation (personal details)

- Maintain company directories, calendars, and internal lists

- Assist with basic HR compliance tasks



Operations & Documentation

- Assist with simple logistics and supply orders

- Update and maintain SOPs and internal process documents

- Track licenses, vendor agreements, compliance certificates

- Conduct research for tools, vendors, pricing, and services

- Support special projects for Finance and Operations



QUALIFICATIONS

- Two years of Bookkeeping or AP/AR experience REQUIRED

- Certified with Quickbooks or Xero REQUIRED

- Proficient with Google Sheets, Docs, Drive; 

- Experience with AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude 

- Highly detail-oriented and organized

- Ability to solve problems and manage recurring tasks independently

- Stable internet connection + backup power plan



WORK SCHEDULE

- Full-Time or Part-time (20-40 hours/week)

- Must have availability during morning to early afternoon Asia time

- Long-term role with stable employment



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

- Starting salary: P300-P500/hour or P50,000 to P80,000/month if full-time

- Higher offers for strong experience

- Performance-based raises

- Skill development and advancement opportunities



TO APPLY (IMPORTANT):

1. First line of your application must be: Blue Sky

2. Record a short Loom video (2–3 min) introducing yourself

3. Answer:

    * Why should I hire you?

    * Describe a time you solved a problem independently

4. Send me your gmail address and Whatsapp number

5. Applications without the above will be automatically rejected

title: Developer / Programmer / PHP / MySQL / HTML5 / CSS / JavaScript
description:
Developer / Programmer / PHP / MySQL / HTML5 / CSS / JavaScript



About Us

We’re an e-commerce team maintaining several in-house tech projects: Laravel dashboards, TypeScript frontends, Python automations, and Google Apps Script tools. Everything we build supports Amazon listings, ads, and our content pipeline. We work remotely, keep schedules flexible, and focus on practical solutions.



Role Overview

We’re hiring a programmer who can move between different codebases (Laravel/PHP, Node/TypeScript, Python, Google Apps Script) and keep our tools updated. You’ll partner with teammates across ops and creative to turn real needs into software applications, make straightforward improvements, fix bugs, and document what changed.



Key Responsibilities

- Build and improve features across Laravel/Filament, Next.js/TypeScript, Python scripts, and Apps Script utilities

- Maintain internal tools for Amazon Ads data, reporting dashboards, and creator workflows

- Refactor older PHP modules so they’re easier to maintain and properly documented

- Connect our systems to third-party APIs and keep data flowing correctly

- Communicate with non-technical teammates, gather requirements, and summarize updates

- Keep repos tidy with light tests, basic logging, and good Git hygiene



Skills We’re Looking For

- Fluent written and spoken English; able to explain technical topics plainly

- Hands-on experience with at least two of Laravel/PHP, Node/TypeScript, Python

- Comfortable with SQL and reporting-friendly data models

- Able to juggle multiple projects without losing context

- Organized and diligent about documenting work

- Uses AI coding helpers (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, etc.) responsibly



Requirements

- 4+ years of software development experience (or equivalent portfolio)

- Confident using Git, pull requests, and code reviews

- Comfortable with ClickUp, Baserow, or quick to learn similar SaaS tools

- Reliable home workstation with solid internet

- Full-time availability preferred; part-time candidates with consistent schedules considered



Nice-to-Have

- Filament customization or Laravel queue experience

- Background with Amazon Ads or ecommerce analytics

- Google Workspace scripting or Chrome automation

- Eye for clean UI implementation (Tailwind, component libraries, Figma handoff)

- Light DevOps familiarity such as Docker or simple server upkeep



Work Details

- Remote role with flexible scheduling; we care about deliverables and communication, but we don’t run graveyard shifts

- Paid twice monthly via Wise

- Work tracked in ClickUp and shared documentation; you’ll help keep notes current



How to Apply

We use a Google Form to collect applications. If the embedded form isn’t visible, use this link:



We’re looking for steady engineers who enjoy building practical tools and communicating clearly. If that sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you.
