title: High-Earning Telesales Closer | Up to $3,000/month | US E-commerce Brand
description:
TELESALES REPRESENTATIVE - US E-COMMERCE BRAND



Remote Philippines | Full-time | Night Shift (US Hours)





ABOUT THE ROLE



A fast-growing US e-commerce brand specializing in premium products for US business customers is hiring 2 to 3 Telesales Representatives in the Philippines to handle warm leads and close deals over the phone.



This is a pure sales role, not customer support, not inbound call center. We are looking for people with native-like English, persistent follow-up discipline, and the ability to close deals.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



- Receive a daily list of warm leads, customers who have shown buying intent on our website

- Call leads within 10 to 30 minutes of receipt, uncover needs and handle objections

- Close deals over the phone or clearly identify what follow-up is needed

- Send personalized SMS and
s through our internal CRM

- Pursue each lead 6 to 8 times across multiple channels until they buy or clearly opt out

- Maintain detailed records of every customer interaction in the CRM

- Hit monthly sales KPIs





REQUIRED



- 3 to 5 years of telesales experience, preferably with US customers

- Native-like or near-native English with strong American accent preferred. Our customers are US small business owners and they will hear the difference. Natural and clear is required.

- Proven closer mentality, you measure success by deals closed not calls made

- Persistent and disciplined, you follow up 6, 7, 8 times without giving up

- Comfortable with consultative selling, our customers spend 1,000 USD plus and need guidance not pressure

- Self-disciplined remote worker with reliable home office setup, fast internet minimum 25 Mbps, and quiet environment

- CRM-savvy, quick learner with internal sales tools, can update notes during and after calls

- Comfortable with workplace tools such as Slack, Google Workspace, Zoom, OpenPhone, or similar VoIP

- Full-time exclusive commitment. You cannot work for another company simultaneously while employed with us.





PREFERRED



- E-commerce or DTC sales background

- Experience selling visual or design products such as signage, print, branding

- Experience working with creative entrepreneurs or restaurant and retail SMB owners





NOT A FIT IF



- You prefer customer support or inbound-only roles

- You are uncomfortable with commission-heavy compensation

- You give up on leads after 1 or 2 unsuccessful calls

- You cannot sustain a night shift schedule from 9 PM to 6 AM Manila time

- You see "no" as failure instead of feedback

- You plan to work multiple jobs or freelance projects on the side





COMPENSATION STRUCTURE



Base Salary



- Fixed monthly base: 610 USD to 750 USD per month, depending on experience and audio screening result

- Base is paid regardless of monthly performance, on time every month



2-Month Probation



- Reduced base salary at 80 percent of full base

- Commission at 100 percent, same as full-time, earn full commission on every deal closed from day one

- Probation goal is to master the product, sales script, and follow-up process



After Probation, from Month 3



- Full base salary, 610 USD to 750 USD per month

- Plus uncapped commission on closed revenue





REALISTIC INCOME EXPECTATIONS



- Hard workers who put in full hours and call volume earn minimum 1,500 USD per month, base plus commission

- KPI achievers earn 2,000 USD plus per month

- Top performers exceeding KPI earn 3,000 USD plus per month, with no cap



Commission structure is simple: the more deals you close, the more you earn, with no ceiling.





EXCLUSIVITY POLICY



This is a full-time exclusive role. You are not allowed to work for another company, do freelance sales work, or take other employment simultaneously while employed with us.



If discovered working another job:



- Immediate termination of employment

- Forfeiture of any unpaid commission earned to date

- Forfeiture of any pending bonuses or revenue share



We invest heavily in our SDRs through training, leads, and tools. We expect 100 percent of your work hours dedicated to our team.





LONG-TERM OPPORTUNITIES FOR TOP PERFORMERS



- Performance-based revenue share program for outstanding contributors

- Career path: Telesales to Senior Closer to Team Lead to Sales Director





WORK SCHEDULE



- Monday to Friday: 9 PM to 6 AM Manila time, equivalent to 9 AM to 6 PM US Eastern Time, full 9-hour shift

- Saturday: 9 PM to 1 AM Manila time, equivalent to 9 AM to 1 PM US Eastern Time, 4-hour half shift

- Total around 49 hours per week across 6 days



DAYS OFF



- Sundays every week

- Major US holidays such as Memorial Day, July 4, Labor Day, Thanksgiving, Christmas, New Year

- Major Philippine holidays





WHAT WE PROVIDE



- Warm leads daily, no cold calling, no list scraping

- Comprehensive sales playbook with proven scripts, objection handling, FAQ

- One-week paid training before you take customer calls

- Internal CRM with full lead context, mockup design, quote, customer history

- OpenPhone account with US phone number

- Dedicated Team Lead for daily coaching and support

- Clear performance metrics





APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS



To apply, please follow ALL these steps. Applications missing any step will be ignored.



1. SEND YOUR RESUME



Highlight relevant sales experience, specifically US customer experience, average deal size closed, and conversion rates if available.



2. RECORD AN AUDIO FILE, MINIMUM 2 MINUTES



Record yourself handling this scenario:



You are calling a customer named John who designed a 580 USD custom product on our website about 30 minutes ago, but has not placed the order yet. Record yourself making this discovery call. Your goal is to understand what is holding him back and offer a solution. You can pause briefly between turns to indicate John is responding.



We are listening for: accent, tone, pacing, discovery skills, objection handling, and natural conversation flow.



3. ANSWER THESE 4 SHORT QUESTIONS



- Describe the highest-value deal you have closed and how you closed it. How many follow-up attempts did it take?

- Why are you applying for this role specifically, not just any sales job?

- When can you start? Are you available for night shift, 9 PM to 6 AM Manila time, Mon-Sat?

- Are you currently working another job? Can you commit to full-time exclusivity with us?



4. CONFIRM YOU UNDERSTAND



- This is a commission-heavy sales role, not customer service

- Working hours are 9 PM to 6 AM Manila time, Mon-Fri full shift, Saturday half shift 9 PM to 1 AM

- This is a full-time exclusive role, no second jobs allowed

- You will be expected to follow up 6 to 8 times per lead, not give up after 1 or 2 calls

- The audio recording is the most important part of your application





HIRING PROCESS



We move fast for the right candidates:



- Step 1: Resume and audio screen, 2 to 3 days

- Step 2: 30-minute interview with our Team Lead via Zoom

- Step 3: Live mock call exercise with a hiring manager

- Step 4: Final interview and offer



Start date: ASAP



We are hiring 2 to 3 SDRs in this batch. Strong candidates will receive offers quickly.





WHY JOIN US



- Warm leads only, your time goes to closing not prospecting

- Real product, real demand, premium products with proven market fit

- Direct access to founders, no corporate bureaucracy

- Performance-based revenue share for top performers, your income scales with company growth

- Long-term career path: SDR to Senior SDR to Team Lead to Sales Director

- Build a remote sales career with a US e-commerce brand at scale





Apply now if you are a closer who is tired of low-ticket sales and ready to follow up until you earn what you are worth.

title: Klaviyo Email Specialist
description:
We’re hiring a full-time Content Marketer to own our content strategy across platforms, with a primary focus on
 marketing (Klaviyo) and website (Shopify). This role is full-time and in-house (remote), so please only apply if you’re looking for a long-term permanent position. We're not hiring freelancer or agency.



This role is ideal for someone who is creative, strategic, and detail-oriented, and excited to work closely with designers to improve content performance through clear insights, testing, and audience-focused messaging.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Plan, write, and execute
 campaigns and automated flows in Klaviyo.

- Create and optimize website copy, landing pages, product descriptions, and other on-site content.

- Collaborate with graphic designers to produce visuals aligned with campaigns.

- Analyze
 and website performance metrics to identify what’s working, underperforming content, and opportunities for improvement.

- Participate in brainstorming sessions to improve content and campaign performance.

- Provide insights and recommendations to improve messaging, tone, and overall content effectiveness.

- Analyze website behavior and implement content-driven CRO strategies to improve conversions on landing pages, product pages, and key funnels.

- Monitor competitors’
s, websites, offers, and campaigns to identify gaps or opportunities in our market niche.

- Stay up-to-date with DTC content marketing trends and
 best practices.



Requirements

- Full-time, Monday–Friday (9am–5pm PH time)

- Remote position

- Strong writing, editing, and storytelling skills

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; able to interpret content performance data to make informed decisions

- Able to explain insights to non-technical teammates

- Organized, self-directed, execution-focused, and able to work independently



Nice To Have (but not required)

- Experience with Klaviyo or other
 marketing platforms

- Experience with Shopify or website analytics

- Experience in content marketing or CRM/CRO for DTC brands

- Familiarity with user behavior analytics, heatmaps, or funnel optimization



What We Offer

- Competitive salary

- Performance-based bonuses

- Paid annual leave & public holidays

- Fully remote work



Application

Please send your application via
 to 
 with the subject line: "Klaviyo
 Specialist – (Your Name)". Include your OnlineJobsPH profile link and answers to the questions below in numbered format directly in the
 body:

1) Describe your last job: your job overview, and how long did you work there?

2) What challenge did you face, and why did you leave the job?

3) Give us one (or more) metric you owned most directly, what it was when you started, and what it was after you left.

4) Tell us one (or more) initiative you took at work that was not requested by your employer, but purely your own call.

5) Our
 program is underperforming: flows and campaigns are not converting, and we are facing deliverability issues. Assume you're starting from scratch with a list that has gone cold. Devise a 90-day game plan. What do you do first, in what order, and why that sequence? What are the things most people get wrong when trying to revive a dead list, and what would you not do in the first 30 days?

6) What's the latest skill you self-learned? Why did you upskill on it and how are you using it now? 

7) Attach your resume & portfolio.



We are looking for your thinking process and specific experience. Overly polished or generic answers with no specific numbers or personal details will be disqualified.

title: Market Development Representative (MDR) + Portfolio Support [Temp-to-hire]]
description:
About Vaycaay



Vaycaay is a vacation rental management and co-hosting company. We help short-term rental owners run high-performing listings while delivering a great guest experience.



Role overview



We are hiring a Market Development Representative (MDR). This is a part-time role focused on outbound market outreach and appointment setting to connect self-managing Airbnb hosts with our team.



This role will also support property success and guest experience tasks for our current Airbnb portfolio.



This is a temporary role with an initial 90-day engagement, with the potential for full-time or long-term employment based on performance.



Hours: 20 hours/week (4–5 hours/day)

Schedule: Must be able to work US/Eastern time hours

Work type: Remote





What you’ll do (primary: MDR / appointment setting)



- Conduct outbound outreach to identify and start conversations with self-managing Airbnb property owners who may benefit from a co-host.

- Use approved messaging and follow-up workflows to generate qualified opportunities.

- Book meetings for Account Executives (AEs) and ensure smooth handoff with clear notes and context.

- Keep outreach and pipeline activity organized and up to date.



What you’ll do (secondary: portfolio support)



- Assist with property success and guest experience for our Airbnb portfolio as needed.

- Help with day-to-day coordination tasks that improve guest satisfaction and listing performance.



Bonus eligibility (Host Bonus + AE Program)



This role is eligible for our bonus programs:



Host Bonus (company-wide)



- Monthly bonus pool funded by 10% of gross revenue generated from new properties acquired on or after April 18, 2026.

- Paid monthly after books/statements are closed.

- Split equally across eligible tea
mbers (not tied to being assigned to the specific properties).



MDR + AE bonus eligibility



For qualifying subscription deals:



- Upfront commission:30% of upfront earnings, split 50/50 between the MDR (sourced lead) and the AE/closer.

- Ongoing monthly AE bonus:10% of subscription gross revenue, split between MDR and AE/closer (or paid fully if the same person sourced and closed).



Requirements



- Fluent in English (written and spoken)

- Stable internet connection, with reliable video + audio for conference calls

- Comfortable with outbound outreach, follow-up, and appointment setting

- Organized, consistent, and able to hit daily activity goals within a part-time schedule

- Professional communication and ability to represent the Vaycaay brand



Nice to have



- Experience with short-term rentals (
)

- Experience with lead generation via communities (e.g.,
 groups), social outreach, or cold

- Experience working with CRMs, tracking spreadsheets, or Notion-based systems



Compensation



- $2–$4 USD per hour to start

- Bonus eligibility as outlined above



How to apply



Please submit:



- A short intro (why this role, and relevant experience)

- A brief summary of any appointment-setting or lead-generation results

- Your availability in US/Eastern time

- Confirmation of stable internet + ability to join video calls





Include the subject line: MDR — Vaycaay Application

title: Graphic Designer - E-commerce with AI experience
description:
Graphic Designer for E-commerce Store (AI + Product Design Focus)



We are seeking a highly detail-oriented Graphic Designer with e-commerce experience to join our team. This role is ideal for someone who understands product-based businesses and can create clean, high-converting visuals.



Key Responsibilities

Use AI tools to create realistic product mockups without altering the original product design

Design and edit using Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop

Convert raster images to vector files and vector files to raster formats

Upscale images and prepare high-resolution, print-ready files

Create new product designs for laser cutting

Develop infographics and A+ content for product listings

Requirements

Strong attention to detail and design accuracy

Experience working with e-commerce products and listings

Ability to maintain brand consistency across all designs

Proficiency in Illustrator and Photoshop is required

Experience with AI design tools is a strong plus

***** Applicants who do not follow all application instructions will not be considered.*********





Please
:

Resume

Portfolio

 that you:

Position Details

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 9 PM – 6 AM (PH hours)

Starting Pay: $3/hour

Growth: Opportunity for additional hours (including weekends)

description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented and reliable Virtual Assistant to help support outreach and relationship-building with church leaders across Florida.



This is not just a task-based role. You will play a key part in helping connect leaders with a message focused on strengthening faith, resilience, and personal growth.



Responsibilities:

*Conduct targeted searches on LinkedIn to find church leaders (pastors, ministry leaders, event coordinators)

*Send personalized connection requests and follow-up messages

*Use Google to identify church staff pages and gather contact information

*Send thoughtful, relational
 outreach (no spam or mass messaging)

*Maintain and update a CRM spreadsheet daily

*Track outreach activity and responses



What We’re Looking For

*Strong written English skills (clear, natural, conversational tone)

*High attention to detail

*Ability to follow systems and processes consistently

*Comfortable working independently

*Experience with LinkedIn outreach is a plus

*Experience with
 outreach is a plus



Bonus (Not Required)

*Experience working with churches or faith-based organizations

*Familiarity with CRM systems

*Experience with lead generation or outreach



Work Expectations

*Part-time to start (with opportunity for long-term/full-time)

*Daily outreach activity required

*Consistency and reliability are critical



Important

We are looking for someone who takes ownership of their work and understands that this role supports real conversations and real impact.



To Apply

Please include the following:



*A short message explaining why this role interests you

*Any experience with LinkedIn or outreach

*Your favorite way to stay organized

*The word “FORGED” somewhere in your application (to show attention to detail)

title: Digital Marketing Intern (Remote)
description:
About Pearl Lemon



Founded in 2016, Pearl Lemon is a UK-registered digital marketing agency (Company No.
, London EC1V 2NX) led by Deepak Shukla (ex-Deloitte, TEDx speaker, 
 contributor).

We’re a remote-first team of 130+ people across 30+ countries, generating over 1,000 inbound leads every month and backed by 1,000+ 5-star reviews.

We operate across multiple ventures—from SEO and PR to Pearl Lemon Academy, Pearl Lemon Games, and more—giving you exposure to a wide range of industries.



 What You’ll Be Doing



This is a hands-on internship where you’ll actually do the work:



Assist with SEO campaigns (keyword research, content optimization)



Support blog writing, content creation, and on-page SEO



Help manage social media and outreach campaigns



Conduct competitor and market research



Learn how to use tools like Google Analytics, Ahrefs, and SEMrush



Work with a global team via Slack and virtual meetings







 What We’re Looking For



Strong English communication skills



Interest in digital marketing, SEO, or online business



Willingness to learn quickly and take initiative



Reliable internet connection and ability to work remotely



Organized, detail-oriented, and proactive mindset





No prior experience required—but curiosity and consistency are a must.



???? What You’ll Gain



Real-world digital marketing experience



Training through Pearl Lemon Academy



Mentorship from experienced marketers



Exposure to international clients and campaigns



Opportunity to move into a paid role based on performance





 Work Culture



Remote-first, global team environment



Fast-paced: we launch quickly and improve as we go



Transparent: performance and feedback are open



Growth-focused: learn practical skills, not theory







How to Apply



Apply directly via this platform

You’ll receive a link to our official Pearl Lemon Application Form

Submit the form and record a Loom video (minimum 5 minutes)

?? Applications without the Loom video (or under 5 minutes) will not be reviewed.

Your application is only considered complete once both steps are submitted.

I need someone who can design as well and help me with paid ads. title: PHP Developer - Remote Position
description:
You became a technologist because you love solving problems, keeping technology running smoothly, and making sure teams have the tools they need to succeed. You thrive on bringing order to complex systems, troubleshooting issues before they become problems, and ensuring both hardware and software are optimized for peak performance. You’re the person people rely on when things go wrong—and you love

making sure they don’t.



Position Overview

We’re seeking a skilled PHP Developer to join our remote team and support critical business automation projects, custom portal development, and AI-powered tools. This role is essential for advancing our digital transformation initiatives and supporting our distributed workforce.



Key Responsibilities

- Develop and maintain custom WordPress-based intranet portals and business applications

- Build and maintain API integrations with business systems (Salesforce, Google Workspace, QuickBooks, Clockify, Zapier, Expensify)

- Provide internal IT support and troubleshooting for remote employees

- Ensure website security, performance, and uptime

- Design and implement business process automation solutions

- Support AI development projects including chat functionality and automated evaluation tools

- Database management and optimization

- Support internal teams with tech solutions, including automations and integrations of existing tools and platforms

- Participate in daily team huddles and provide regular project updates (15-30 minutes)



Required Technical Skills

- PHP Development: 5+ years experience with modern PHP (7.4+)

- LAMP Stack: Linux, Apache/Nginx, MySQL, PHP

- WordPress: Custom plugin/theme development, REST API integration

- Database Management: MySQL optimization, complex queries, data modeling

- API Development: RESTful services, third-party integrations

- Communication Skills: Ability to communicate clearly and confidently with US-based teams, particularly over phone and video calls

- Versatility: Comfort with diverse tasks, from managing support tickets to optimizing databases or troubleshooting server issues



Preferred Experience

- Business System Integration: QuickBooks API, accounting software connections

- Manufacturing/Industrial Software: ERP systems, project management tools

- Process Automation: Workflow automation, data import/export systems

- AI/ML Tools: Experience with AI APIs, chatbot development

- Cloud Platforms: AWS, Google Cloud, or similar hosting environments

- Security: Authentication systems, data protection protocols



Company Culture & Values (PERFORM)

- Performance Under Pressure: We excel under high-pressure situations 24/7, prioritizing respectful communication while delivering the right product at the right place at the right time.

- Eternal Perspective: With an eye to the long-term, we choose the right path over the quick fix, ensuring our actions can always stand up to scrutiny.

- Rigor: We stand out through our meticulous attention to detail, catching what others miss to provide peace of mind to all stakeholders.

- Foresight: We shrewdly share information with external entities, preserving our internal advantages while maintaining absolute honesty in our dealings.

- Ownership: We cultivate a culture of Extreme Ownership, encouraging transparency, honesty, humility, and vulnerability within our team.

- Responsiveness: Always organized and ahead of the curve, we’re prepared to respond swiftly and proactively to needs, always prioritizing communication and fast response times.

- Make Money Together: We uphold a belief in collective success, understanding that when one wins, we all win, and reflect this in our compensation structure.



Work Environment

- Ability to work 09:00-17:00 MDT UTC-6

- Collaborative project work with operations and sales teams

- Daily team huddle participation

mbers. As a condition of employment, we expect our employees to commit fully to their role with us and not engage in other employment or freelance work. This policy is in place to ensure that our employees are able to perform at their best and contribute fully to the success of our team. If you are currently holding another job or considering additional work, please be aware that we require a commitment to this position as your sole employment.



Compensation & Benefits

- Flexible time off

- Equipment and home office setup support

title: Media Buyer
description:
We’re hiring a full-time Media Buyer to own our paid advertising performance across platforms, with a primary focus on Meta 
 & Instagram Ads). This role is full-time and in-house (remote), so please only apply if you’re looking for a long-term permanent position. We're not hiring freelance or agency.



This role is ideal for someone who is data-driven, detail-oriented, and excited to work closely with creatives to improve ad performance through clear insights and testing.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Launch, manage, and optimize ad campaigns primarily on Meta Ads. Support campaigns on Google, TikTok, or other platforms where relevant.

- Plan and execute structured tests (angles, creatives, offers, landing page) to improve cost per acquisition and ROAS.

- Manage budgets, audiences, and campaign structures based on performance

- Analyze ad performance to identify winning and underperforming ads

- Communicate clear performance insights to the creative team

- Participate in brainstorming sessions to improve creatives based on data

- Analyze Shopify sales data to identify scaling opportunities, conversion bottlenecks and product-level performance

- Monitor competitors’ ads, offers, and campaigns to identify gaps or opportunities in our market niche.

- Stay up-to-date with DTC industry trends and platform updates to ensure best practices.

- Providing administrative support, as and when needed to the manager.



Requirements

- Full-time, Monday–Friday (9am–5pm PH time)

- Remote position

- Strong comfort working with numbers and data

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; able to interpret data to make informed decisions

- Able to explain performance clearly to non-technical teammates

- Highly organized, self-directed, execution-focused, and able to work independently

- Willing to learn quickly and adapt as the business grows



What We Offer

- Competitive salary

- Performance-based bonuses

- Paid annual leave & public holidays

- Fully remote work



Application

Please send your application via
 to 
 with the subject line: "Media Buyer – (Your Name)”. Include your OnlineJobsPH profile link and answers to the questions below in numbered format directly in the
 body:

1) Describe your most recent job: your job overview, and how long did you work there?

2) What challenge did you face, and why did you leave the job?

3) Give us one (or more) metric you owned most directly, what it was when you started, and what it was after you left.

4) Tell us one (or more) initiative you took at work that was not requested by your boss, but purely your own call.

5) Your Meta campaign has a CPM of $200, CTR of 2%, ROAS of 1.8. The target ROAS is 3. You have 5 days and a $3,000 remaining budget. Walk me through your thinking, what would you do? If you've faced something similar before, tell me how you solved it.

6) What's the latest skill you self-learned? Why did you upskill on it and how are you using it now? 

7) Attach your resume & portfolio.



We are looking for your thinking process and specific experience. Overly polished or generic answers with no specific numbers/personal details will be disqualified.

title: AI Marketing Operator — High-Volume Content Creator (Claude Power User)
description:
I'm hiring a full-time AI Marketing Operator to run high-volume content across my wedding SaaS (WedClic) and a few other brands. This is NOT a VA role. I need someone who lives inside AI tools — especially Claude — and ships massive amounts of content every single day.



If you describe yourself as a "VA" or "Canva expert," please don't apply. I'm looking for an AI-native creator who treats Claude like a second brain.



The volume expectation:

You're using AI. There is no excuse for low output. I want as much content as you can humanly ship — across multiple brands, multiple platforms, every day. If you're producing 5 posts a day, you're not using AI right. I do this work myself currently, so I know exactly what's possible. The reason I'm hiring is because the volume is too much for one person — not because the work is hard.

What you'll do:



Ship high-volume daily content (AI UGC videos, carousels, TikToks, Reels, X posts, Pinterest pins)

Manage 4+ social accounts across multiple brands

Use Claude heavily — for scripts, hooks, carousels, captions, ad copy, content systems, batch generation, prompt chains

Generate AI videos using Veo, Sora, Runway, or Kling

Build AI avatars and voiceovers via HeyGen, Hedra, ElevenLabs

Generate images via Midjourney, Flux, or Ideogram

Edit and finish in CapCut

Schedule, post, and track what works



Required skills:



Heavy Claude experience — you should have your own prompt library, projects set up, and workflows for batch content generation. If you only know ChatGPT, this isn't for you.

Fluent in AI video tools (Veo, Sora, Runway, HeyGen)

Strong with Midjourney, Flux, or Ideogram

CapCut or Premiere for editing

Strong visual taste — editorial, Y2K, Pinterest (not soft bridal, not corporate SaaS)

Ability to produce massive volume without sacrificing quality



Bonus:



Claude Projects power user

ComfyUI, n8n, or Make automation

Built your own AI content systems or workflows

Past work in fashion, beauty, wedding, or DTC niches

Native-level English writing



Compensation:



Monthly salary (based on portfolio and trial performance)

Affiliate / revenue share once proven — uncapped earning potential

Long-term, full-time role



How to apply:

Send the following or your application will be ignored:



One AI video you've made in the last 30 days

One carousel or social post you've written with Claude — paste the actual prompt you used

Tell me how you'd use Claude to generate 50 TikTok hooks for a wedding brand in under 10 minutes



Generic applications and "I'm willing to learn" messages will be deleted. Show me what you've already built.

title: Creative Director for Facebook & TikTok Ads
description:
About Us:

We are a growing marketing company that creates high-performing ads for home services, solar, and other lead generation campaigns. We are looking for someone creative, organized, and detail-oriented who can help us produce beautiful ad images, short-form video concepts, and AI-generated creative assets for
 and 
.

This role is perfect for someone who understands direct-response advertising, social media trends, AI tools, and how to make ads that grab attention quickly.



Main Responsibilities

You will help us create:





High-quality image concepts for
 ads





TikTok and Reels video ideas





AI image and video prompts





Creative briefs for designers, editors, or AI tools





Scroll-stopping hooks and visual concepts





Variations of ad creatives for testing





Prompt templates for tools like Higgsfield, Midjourney, ChatGPT, Canva, Runway, or similar AI creative tools





You do not need to be an expert media buyer, but you should understand what makes an ad visually appealing and persuasive.



What We’re Looking For

The ideal candidate should have:





Strong creative taste





Experience with
, TikTok, Instagram, or direct-response ads





Ability to create beautiful ad concepts quickly





Strong prompting skills for AI image/video tools





Good understanding of hooks, angles, and visual storytelling





Ability to follow brand direction and create multiple creative variations





Good communication and organization skills





Ability to work independently without needing constant direction







Tools That Are a Plus

Experience with any of these is a bonus:





Canva





Photoshop





CapCut





OpusClip





Midjourney





Higgsfield





Runway





ChatGPT





Claude





TikTok Creative Center





Meta Ad Library





Foreplay.co





MagicBrief







Example of Work We Need

We may give you a basic ad idea like:

“Florida homeowners are tired of high electric bills.”

Your job would be to turn that into:





3 image ad ideas





3 TikTok video concepts





AI prompts to create the visuals





Short hooks for each ad





Notes on why each creative could work







Small Test Assignment

Please complete this short test so we can understand your creative thinking, organization, and ability to prompt AI tools correctly.

Test: Create Ad Creative Ideas

Scenario:

We are creating ads for homeowners in Florida who may be interested in lowering their electric bill with solar.

Your task:

Create 3 different ad creative concepts.

For each concept, include:





Creative Name





Ad Angle





Visual Description





Hook Text





AI Image Prompt





AI Video Prompt





Why This Could Work







Example Format

Creative Concept 1

Creative Name:

Florida Electric Bill Shock

Ad Angle:

Homeowners are frustrated by rising electric bills.

Visual Description:

A realistic Florida homeowner sitting at a kitchen table, looking stressed while holding a high electric bill. Bright daylight coming through the window. The scene should feel real, not overly polished.

Hook Text:

“Florida electric bills are getting out of hand.”

AI Image Prompt:

Create a realistic
 ad image of a Florida homeowner sitting at a kitchen table, holding a high electric bill with a concerned expression. Bright natural lighting, modern Florida home interior, realistic photography style, clean composition, no cartoon effect, no fake-looking text, vertical 4:5 ad format.

AI Video Prompt:

Create a realistic 10-second vertical video of a Florida homeowner opening an electric bill at the kitchen table, looking frustrated, then looking outside at a sunny Florida neighborhood. Cinematic but realistic, handheld camera feel, natural lighting, direct-response ad style, 9:16 vertical format.

Why This Could Work:

This ad connects with a real pain point quickly. Homeowners immediately understand the problem, and the visual is relatable.



What We Are Judging

We are looking for:





Strong visual ideas





Clean organization





Good understanding of ad hooks





Realistic AI prompts





Ability to create concepts that feel human, not generic





Understanding of
/TikTok ad style





Attention to detail







Application Instructions

Please reply with:





Your name





Your experience with ad creatives





Tools you have used





2–3 examples of past creative work, if available







Your completed test assignment





We are looking for someone who can move quickly, think creatively, and help us produce high-quality ad creatives every week.

title: UK Company Hiring: US Cold Callers
description:
Hiring  Cold callers to Help Build Local Business In the USA

 Base pay $600 per month (after two week training) plus commissions OTE each month $1000-$1500

Company: Start Over Movement Holdings Ltd (Founded by Sir Marco Robinson)

Location: Remote - 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time)

Type: Full-time Independent Contractor

---



The Story Behind Start Over

Sir Marco Robinson is a UK entrepreneur, author, and TV personality who has spent decades helping people rebuild their lives and businesses. He founded Start Over Movement with a simple idea: local business owners should support each other, not compete for the same scraps.



Every Start Over chapter is a community of local business owners who:

Refer clients to each other, generating real revenue

Learn marketing and sales directly from Sir Marco

Get a dedicated commission-only closer assigned to their business

Meet monthly with an exclusive group (only one business per industry per chapter)

It is not networking. It is a referral engine with a mentor attached. Members pay £1,500 (UK) or $1,500 (US and Canada) per year to be part of it. And the model works - we already have active chapters in Laguna Beach, Tampa Bay, New York, London and Toronto. Mississippi is next.

---



Why We Need You



We are looking for 3 cold callers each week to join the team now. We need in total another 180 cold callers within 3 months so this team and the level of recruitment will grow quickly to help launch and fill  up a weekly webinar  the Mississippi chapter. This is part of a broader buildout of 100+ cold callers across all our territories.



The business owners we call are not hostile. They are overwhelmed, under-marketed, and tired of networking groups that do not deliver. When you explain what Start Over actually does - referrals, mentorship, exclusive local representation - the good ones lean in.

closers then to attend a webinar designed to close them for us





The 14-Day Trial

We do not rush this. Your first 14 days are a paid trial:

$15/day base, paid daily via Wise (for verified work days)

Full commission on every sale you close during the trial

Day 1: Onboarding, script training, shadowing, pass the roleplay by end of day

Day 2 onwards: Full production with daily minimums

Live coaching from the Cold Caller Manager throughout

Roleplay check must be passed on Day 1 before going on real calls Day 2

---



What Makes This Role Different

1. You are not hustling a bad offer. Start Over is real. Sir Marco is real. Members are paying, showing up, and referring each other. You are selling something that delivers.



2. You are part of a real team. We are building out 100+ closers across all territories, but we do it properly. You are not one of thousands dialling into a chaotic floor. You get proper coaching, real territory, clear structure, and a Cold Caller Manager who knows your name and your numbers.



3. You have a growth path. Mississippi is the start. As we launch new chapters, top performers get first pick. Build your book with us and grow as we grow.



4. You get real support. Cold Caller Manager in twice-weekly coaching sessions. Direct line to Marco Fernandes (Sales Director, 39 years of sales experience). Proven script refined across thousands of calls. Calendar booking, leads, and territory handed to you.

---



The Daily Reality



Let us be honest about what the day looks like:

9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time) - yes, graveyard

Monday to Friday, five nights a week

300 dials or 120 connects minimum per day from Day 2 (whichever you hit first)

10+ event bookings per day (prospects committed to attend the next Start Over event), OR 1+ direct sale, OR 15+ strong Zoom follow-ups booked

Log every call in real time on the shared tracker

End-of-day report to the Cold Caller Manager

Twice weekly meetings (Tuesdays and Fridays typically)

It is not light work. Cold calling is hard. Graveyard is harder. But it is clear work with clear outcomes, and for the right person it pays better than almost anything else a Filipino remote worker can do.

---



We Are Looking For Someone Who

Must have:

2+ years phone sales or closing experience

OnlineJobs.ph ID Proof 60+ verified on your profile

NBI clearance (or willingness to obtain within 2 weeks of hire)

Strong English, clear accent, professional tone

Real experience closing on the call (not just setting appointments)

Can commit to 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift, Monday to Friday

Own Zoom Pro account

Reliable internet (25+ Mbps - speed test screenshot required with application), quiet space, good headset

Will thrive if you:

Have sold coaching, consulting, BNI, networking memberships, or community products before

Care about what you sell, not just about commission

Take coaching well

Can handle "no" all day without losing energy

Want a long-term role, not a quick gig

---



Honest Caveats

The first chapter in every territory is the hardest. List building, market education, all of it.

Your first week, you may not close. That is normal. Week 2 is where the trial gate lives.

Mississippi is a smaller market than our other chapters. That means you can cover the whole state, but you will also work the list harder.

Overnight shifts are tough. Please do not apply if you cannot genuinely commit to the schedule long-term.

---



Verification and Accountability

We use:

TimeProof (you install on your machine, screenshots and activity tracking)

GoHighLevel / Ringover (dial tracking, call recordings, connect verification)

Shared call tracker (real-time logging)

Random call audits (5+ recorded calls per contractor per day reviewed)

This is not surveillance for its own sake. It is so that:

We know you are working the hours you claim

You are protected if we ever question your output - the data has your back

Coaching can be real, because we can listen to your actual calls

We pay for work verified by these systems. Discrepancies get paid only to the verified level. Clear and fair.

Zero tolerance for fraud: Fabricated connects, mouse jigglers or other activity simulators, fake call logs, or dials to deliberately invalid numbers = immediate termination. Pay for fabricated work will be withheld or clawed back. This is the only thing we are strict about. Real closers never have an issue with this.

---



Termination

Independent contractor. Either party can end the agreement at any time, with or without cause, without notice. We pay for all hours worked and commissions earned up to that point.

---



Group Interview - MONDAY

We are hosting a group interview tomorrow (Monday) at 7pm Manila time (12pm UK, 7am Mississippi).





Zoom link:





 









This is how we meet candidates at scale and make fast decisions. Come ready with:

Webcam and microphone working

Professional background and attire

Ready to do a short live roleplay on a cold call

Questions about the role

If you cannot attend live, send your application anyway and we will include you in the next round.

---



How To Apply

Message us through OnlineJobs.ph with:

Name and location

Internet speed test screenshot (from speedtest.net - must show 25+ Mbps)

ID Proof score (60+ required) and NBI clearance status





Confirmation that you can work 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift consistently

No voice recording = we cannot review you. We hire on voice, not paper, for phone sales roles.

---



Start Over Movement. Building real communities. Paying real money. Looking for Three STRONG cold calllers NOW for Mississippi



We look forward to meeting you

title: Skilled Video Editor for eCommerce VSL Ads & AI Creatives
description:
Hey there,

My team and I are looking for a skilled Video Editor to join our fast-growing eCommerce company.



We are looking for someone who can edit high-converting video ads and 
 for
 and Instagram.



This is not just a basic editing job.



You will be working on performance marketing creatives where the goal is to create videos that grab attention, tell a clear story, and help sell products.



We mainly advertise in Western markets, often to older audiences around 50–70 years old.



Because of this, our video style is usually more story-driven, clear, structured, and persuasive. Not just fast TikTok-style editing.



A big part of the role will be recreating proven video structures and turning scripts, angles, references, and raw materials into strong video ads.



You do not need to be perfect from day one.



But you must be skilled, disciplined, open to feedback, and willing to learn.



---



ROLE



Your main role will be editing VSLs, Mini-VSLs, and direct response video ads for eCommerce products.



These videos will be used for:



-
 ads

- Instagram ads

- Advertorial funnels

- Direct response campaigns

- Product testing campaigns



You will work closely with the CEO and the creative team.



We will give you scripts, references, concepts, angles, and examples. Your job will be to turn them into strong videos that look professional and are built to convert.



---



RESPONSIBILITIES



- Edit VSLs and Mini-VSLs for eCommerce ads

- Recreate proven video structures using new scripts and assets

- Turn scripts into engaging video stories

- Source and structure B-roll clips

- Add captions, subtitles, music, voiceovers, and sound effects

- Improve pacing, emotion, clarity, and flow

- Create multiple variations of ads for testing

- Use AI tools to help generate visuals, scenes, and clips when needed

- Follow feedback and improve each version quickly

- Communicate clearly with the creative team



---



REQUIREMENTS



You MUST:



- Have experience editing video ads, VSLs, or direct response creatives

- Understand how to follow references and recreate proven video styles

- Have strong storytelling and pacing skills

- Be comfortable working with scripts and voiceovers

- Be open to learning new AI tools

- Be able to work independently

- Be reliable and organized

- Have a good laptop or computer setup

- Have fast and stable internet

- Be fluent in English



Experience with these tools is a big plus:



- Premiere Pro

- CapCut

- After Effects

- Canva

- ElevenLabs

- Higgsfield

- NanoBanana Pro

- Veo 3

- Kling

- Sora

- Other AI image or video generation tools



You do not need to know every tool already.



But you must be excited to learn and improve.



---



BIG PLUS



- Experience editing VSLs for ads or funnels

- Experience with eCommerce products

- Experience creating
 or Instagram ads

- Understanding of direct response marketing

- Ability to suggest better hooks, scenes, and creative ideas

- Ability to work fast without losing quality

- Good eye for emotional storytelling



---



RESULTS WE EXPECT



We are looking for someone who can eventually help create:



- 4–6 high-quality VSL / Mini-VSL ads per week

- Strong hooks and story structure

- Clean, professional editing

- Multiple creative variations for testing

- Better quality over time

- Clear communication and reliable delivery



The first 2 weeks will be a paid trial period.



During the trial, we will check your communication, speed, quality, ability to follow instructions, and willingness to improve.



If everything goes well, this can become a long-term full-time position.



---



COMPENSATION



Starting rate: $6/hour



We also offer:



- 2-week paid trial

- Long-term work if the trial goes well

- Performance bonuses for strong winning ads

- Bonuses up to $250 for editing a winning ad

- Pay increases over time based on performance

- Opportunity to grow with the company



We are not just looking for freelancers.



We are building a long-term creative team.



---



IMPORTANT – HOW TO APPLY



When applying, please include:



1. Examples of your best video ads, VSLs, or Mini-VSLs

2. Tell us what editing tools you use

3. Tell us if you have experience with AI image or video tools

4. Tell us if you have experience with
 ads

5. Explain shortly what makes a video ad convert

6. Confirm that you have a reliable laptop/computer and stable internet

7. If you read the full job post, include the word “VSL EDITOR” at the END of your application



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



---



We are looking for someone disciplined, creative, reliable, and hungry to improve.



If you want to grow as a video editor and learn performance marketing creatives, this can become a strong long-term opportunity.



Looking forward to your application.



Kacper Jegier

CEO, KJ ECOMMERCE LIMITED

title: Recruitment Expert
description:
# Recruitment Agent — Source High-Quality Video Talent (AI Creators & Editors)



**Hourly Rate + $100 Commission Per Successful Hire**



We're looking for a driven recruitment agent to help us find and vet top-tier video talent on an ongoing basis. You'll be paid your hourly rate plus a $100 USD bonus for every successful hire you bring us.



---



## What You'll Be Doing



You'll source, engage, and screen candidates for two types of roles, then send us only the best. We do NOT want to interview low-quality applicants — your job is to be the quality filter.



**Your responsibilities:**

- Find candidates through job boards, communities, freelance platforms, social media, and your own network

- Review their portfolios carefully against the criteria below

- Have a conversation with each candidate to confirm their skills, availability, and interest

- Submit only vetted, high-quality candidates to us with a short summary and portfolio links



---



## Role 1: AI Video Content Creator



We need creators who work with AI video generation tools and produce polished, creative output — not just raw AI dumps.



**Required:**

- Hands-on experience with Seedance, Nano Banana, or similar AI video generation tools

- Familiarity with other AI tools (Runway, Pika, Kling, Midjourney, etc.) is a plus

- Strong prompt engineering skills and ability to refine AI outputs to a high standard

- Good eye for storytelling, pacing, and visual composition



**Portfolio must show:**

- At least 3 completed AI-generated video projects

- Evidence of creative direction (not just default outputs)

- Quality refinement and iteration on AI-generated content



---



## Role 2: Professional Video Editor



We need editors who can deliver polished, professional-grade video across formats.



**Required:**

- Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut Pro, or Avid Media Composer

- Solid skills in colour grading, audio mixing, transitions, and motion graphics

- Experience editing for social media (Reels, TikTok, Shorts) and/or long-form content

- Ability to work from briefs and hit deadlines



**Portfolio must show:**

- At least 3 professionally edited video projects

- Variety of styles or formats (social, commercial, narrative, etc.)

- Clean technique, good pacing, and polished audio/visuals



---



## Compensation



- **Hourly rate** — tell us your rate based on your experience

- **Plus $100 USD bonus per successful hire** — no cap on placements

- Bonuses paid upon candidate acceptance and confirmation

- Ongoing engagement with room to grow



---



## Do NOT Send Us



- Candidates with generic or low-effort demo reels

- Portfolios of unedited, raw AI outputs with no refinement

- Editors whose only experience is with basic tools like iMovie or CapCut

- Anyone who can't demonstrate real, hands-on use of the required tools

- Applicants who can't communicate clearly or follow a brief



---



## To Apply



Tell us:

1. A brief intro about your recruiting experience, especially in creative/video talent

2. Examples of past placements or sourcing work (if available)

3. Your preferred sourcing channels and methods

4. Your hourly rate



We're looking for agents who take quality seriously. If that's you, we'd love to work together.

title: 3CX VOIP Engineer
description:
Overview:

We are an established MSP with multiple privately hosted 3CX v20 instances running in our datacenter. Our internal team handles Tier 1 requests reliably, but we’re looking for a seasoned 3CX engineer to provide deeper expertise, help level up our team, and be available for ongoing escalations on a weekly basis.



This is a long-term engagement with consistent weekly hours (approximately 5 hrs/week) and additional hours on occasion if needed.



What You’ll Do:

 • Review and validate our current 3CX deployments, SBC setups, and call flow configurations

 • Train our support team on best practices for managing, troubleshooting, and provisioning

 • Assist in diagnosing and resolving escalated issues beyond Tier 1

 • Advise on call routing, IVR menus, SIP trunks, and overall system optimization

 • Help maintain documentation and standard operating procedures as we grow



Requirements:

 • Deep hands-on experience with 3CX v20 (required)

 • Strong knowledge of SIP trunk configuration, SBC provisioning, phone provisioning, and call flow design

 • Experience working within MSP or multi-tenant environments is a plus

 • Ability to explain technical concepts clearly and efficiently to a support team

 • Reliable weekly availability and ability to respond to occasional escalations

 • Fluent in English; clear and professional communication



Engagement Details:

 • Ongoing contract

 • ~5 hours per week, with flexibility for occasional additional time

 • Direct, named-resource relationship (no “agency shuffle”)

 • Remote work



To Apply, Please
 
 and Include:

 1. Summary of your experience with 3CX v20 specifically

 2. Brief description of similar MSP or multi-instance support work you’ve done

 3. A video intro

 This hybrid role blends technical support, web development, and digital design responsibilities. The ideal candidate is a versatile problem-solver who thrives in both IT support and creative environments.

You will primarily provide Tier 1 service desk support , assist with web development tasks , and contribute to design and digital marketing initiatives.

Service Desk & Technical Support (60%)

, and phone.

Create, assign, and manage tickets; escalate as needed to higher tiers.

Web Development & Digital Support (30%)

Required Skills

Technical Skills

Experience in IT Service Desk or Tier 1 support environment.

Familiarity with ticketing systems (HaloPSA or equivalent).

Proficiency in WordPress (content editing, plugin configuration, page layout).

Knowledge of domain/DNS management and hosting basics.

Creative / Design Skills

Experience in web and graphic layout design.

Soft Skills

Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.

High attention to detail and creative thinking.

Strong time management and multitasking skills.

Adaptable and proactive in both technical and creative tasks.

Preferred Qualifications

1–2 years of experience in IT or Service Desk roles with exposure to design/web work.

Experience in an MSP or IT support environment.

Coursework or certification in Web Development, Graphic Design, or Digital Media.

Experience maintaining or building WordPress-based websites.

Suggested Training / Certifications

Technical:

Microsoft 365 Fundamentals (MS-900)

WordPress Development Fundamentals

ITIL Foundation

Creative & Marketing:

Canva Mastery or Advanced Design Techniques

Web Design and UX Principles

 their updated resume along with a brief cover letter and video intro detailing their relevant experience to

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. We appreciate your interest and thank all applicants in advance.

description:

Our goal is simple: help our clients succeed with smooth, reliable technology support.

We’re excited to bring on an IT Systems and Projects Administrator who’s eager to make a real impact by managing networks, firewalls, desktops, servers and projects for our fantastic clients. This is an opportunity with huge potential for growth. Start part-time, and as you grow with us, there’s the possibility of moving into a full-time role. If you’re looking for flexibility, some evening and weekend work may also be available.

What You’ll Be Doing:

Managing client networks, firewalls, desktops, servers, and overseeing IT projects.

Troubleshooting technical issues and keeping systems running smoothly.

Implementing best practices for security and data protection.

Collaborating directly with small business clients to provide exceptional IT support.

Leading and contributing to IT projects that drive efficiency and improvement.

Who We’re Looking For:

If you’ve got experience in any of the following areas, we’d love to hear from you!

Operating Systems: Windows 10-11, MacOS, Windows Server

Virtualization: HyperV Server

Send your resume and video intro to 
 excited to meet you!

title: Tier 1 Technician (with Web Support Functions)
description:
Tier 1 Technician (with Web Support Functions)

Department: Service Team

Projected Shift Schedule: 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM

Dispatch Hours: 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM (During onboarding training for 60 days)

Salary: $5

Role Overview

We are seeking a Tier 1 Technician (with Web Support Functions) to join our Service Team. This hybrid role primarily focuses on Tier 1 technical support while contributing to web development initiatives. The ideal candidate is a versatile problem-solver who thrives in IT support and has a foundational understanding of web development.

You will primarily provide Tier 1 service desk support and assist with website maintenance and updates.

Key Responsibilities

Service Desk & Technical Support (80%)

Act as the first point of contact for technical issues via HaloPSA,
, and phone.

Provide Tier 1 troubleshooting for user issues (hardware, software, and connectivity).

Create, assign, and manage tickets; escalate as needed to higher tiers.

Maintain service notes, documentation, and ensure SLA compliance.

Coordinate dispatch between clients and higher-tier technicians.

Web Development Support (20%)

Update and maintain company websites (WordPress or similar CMS).

Implement layout and style improvements following brand guidelines.

Support internal web portal and knowledge base enhancement initiatives.

Required Skills

Technical Skills

Experience in IT Service Desk or Tier 1 support environment.

Strong troubleshooting skills for Windows, macOS, and Office 365.

Familiarity with ticketing systems (HaloPSA or equivalent).

Proficiency in WordPress (content editing, plugin configuration, page layout).

Basic understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

Knowledge of domain/DNS management and hosting basics.

Soft Skills

Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.

High attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

Strong time management and multitasking abilities.

Adaptable and proactive in both technical and web tasks.

Preferred Qualifications

1–2 years of experience in IT or Service Desk roles with exposure to web work.

Experience in an MSP or IT support environment.

Coursework or certification in Web Development or related fields.

Experience maintaining or building WordPress-based websites.

Suggested Training / Certifications

Technical:

CompTIA A+ / Network+

Microsoft 365 Fundamentals (MS-900)

WordPress Development Fundamentals

ITIL Foundation

Web Development:

Basic HTML, CSS, JavaScript

WordPress Design and Layout Best Practices

How to Apply

Interested applicants are requested to
 their updated resume along with a brief cover letter and video intro detailing their relevant experience to 
 and use the subject line:

"Tier 1 Technician - [Your Full Name]".

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. We appreciate your interest and thank all applicants in advance.

title: SEO EXPERT
description:
SEO Growth Lead (Not a Beginner Role)



We’re looking for a **serious SEO operator** to take full control of our organic growth.



This is not a “write a few blogs” role.

This is **build, scale, dominate rankings, and drive revenue.**



We already have:



* 50+ live blogs

* Multiple domains across different niches

* A foundation in place



Now we need someone who can **turn this into a traffic + lead machine.**



---



## ???? What You’ll Be Responsible For



### 1. Authority Building (Backlinks That Actually Move Rankings)



* Build **high-quality, white-hat backlinks**

* Secure real placements (guest posts, niche edits, partnerships)

* Reverse-engineer competitor backlink profiles

* Run outreach campaigns at scale 
, partnerships, placements)



???? No spam links. No Fiverr junk. Real domains only.



---



### 2. Keyword Expansion (Money Keywords Only)



* Identify **high-intent, revenue-driving keywords**

* Expand existing blogs with **long-tail + semantic keywords**

* Build **topic clusters** across our sites

* Find **low competition, high ROI opportunities**



---



### 3. Blog & On-Page Optimization



* Optimize all existing blogs for:



  * Internal linking

  * Proper structure (H1–H3, readability)

  * Keyword placement & density

* Improve **CTR (titles, meta descriptions)**

* Turn content into **conversion-focused pages**



---



### 4. Technical SEO & Performance



* Ensure all pages are:



  * Properly indexed

  * Fast-loading

  * Structured correctly (schema, crawlability)

* Fix any issues affecting rankings



---



## ???? What We Care About (KPIs)



* Organic traffic growth

* Keyword rankings (especially high-intent terms)

* Referring domains (quality over quantity)

* Leads generated from organic traffic



???? If you don’t think in metrics, this role isn’t for you.





## ? Who This Is NOT For



* Beginners

* “Content writers who do a bit of SEO”

* Anyone relying on outdated tactics

* People who need constant hand-holding



## ? Who This IS For



* Someone who has **actually ranked sites before**

* Someone who understands **how to build authority**

* Someone who can **execute, not just advise**

* Someone who treats this like **their own project**



## ???? Working Setup



* Remote

* Flexible

* Long-term opportunity across multiple projects



## ???? Compensation



* Competitive (based on experience)

* Performance-based upside available





## ?? Read This Before Applying



If you apply, include:



1. 2–3 websites you’ve ranked

2. Keywords you ranked them for

3. How you built backlinks (be specific)



???? If you don’t include this, your application will be ignored.

title: High-Level Executive Assistant

If you do NOT actively use AI in your workflow, this is NOT the role for you.

I’m building something big.

title: Sourcing Specialist (Peptides & Injectable Pens)
description:
We are looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Sourcing Specialist to help us find and establish a supply chain for specific medical-grade products. This is not a general sourcing job – you must be able to navigate technical specifications and verify supplier quality.



The Task:

You will be responsible for finding reliable manufacturers or suppliers who can provide:



3ml Refills/Cartridges (specifically for peptides).



Compatible Injection Pens (pre-filled or ready for assembly).



Key Responsibilities:

Identify manufacturers capable of producing high-quality peptide delivery systems.



Verify supplier credibility, lab reports (COAs), and manufacturing standards.



Negotiate pricing, MOQs, and lead times.



Communicate clearly and provide regular updates on your progress.



Requirements (Read carefully):

Proven experience in sourcing. Experience in medical supplies, beauty tech, or chemicals is a huge advantage.



Deep understanding of Alibaba, Made-in-China, and direct factory outreach.



Excellent English (both written and spoken).



Ability to think critically – we don’t just need a list of links; we need vetted partners.



???? HOW TO APPLY (Failure to follow these steps will result in immediate rejection):

To prove you have read this entire post and are not a bot/mass-applicant, please do the following:



Set your application subject line to: "SOURCING PRO: [Your Name] - [Your Favorite Color]"



Start your cover letter with the code: "BLUE PEN 3ML".



Briefly answer: Have you ever sourced medical hardware or sensitive products before? If so, what was the biggest challenge?



Attach your CV and any relevant examples of your past sourcing work.

title: E-commerce Communication Manager (Content, Catalogs & Growth)
description:
We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented Communication Manager to bridge the gap between our products and our customers. Your mission is to take the product information from our sourcing team and transform it into professional catalogs, high-converting website content, and clear brand communication.



You will report to the Operations Manager and ensure that our brand looks premium and professional across all platforms.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Content Creation: Write compelling product descriptions that sell. No generic text – we need benefits-driven copy.



Catalog Management: Design and update professional B2B/B2C catalogs (using Canva, Adobe, or similar tools).



E-commerce Development: Manage and update website content (Shopify, WooCommerce, or similar), ensuring all listings are optimized and visually appealing.



Asset Coordination: Work with the Sourcing Specialist to get high-quality product photos and videos. If the quality is low, you must provide feedback and creative direction.



Brand Voice: Ensure all communications 
s, newsletters, website) are consistent and professional.



Required Qualifications:



Excellent English: Near-native written English is a must. You should be able to write persuasively.



Design Skills: Experience with Canva is mandatory. Experience with Adobe Suite (Photoshop/InDesign) is a huge plus.



E-commerce Experience: You have previously managed product listings and website content.



Visual Eye: You can tell the difference between a "good" and a "great" product photo.



Organization: Ability to manage multiple product lines and deadlines simultaneously.



Why Work With Us?



Long-term, full-time career opportunity.



A chance to shape the visual identity of a growing brand.



Supportive management and a clear workflow.



HOW TO APPLY:



Change the subject line of your application to: "Creative Communicator for Aromika".



Include a link to your Portfolio (Catalogs you have designed or Websites you have managed). Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.



Include a link to your Loom video (max 2 minutes) explaining your process: How do you turn a raw product photo and a list of features into a professional catalog page?



Tell us which e-commerce platform (Shopify, Magento, etc.) you are most comfortable with.

title: Video Editor - MMA / Fighting Sports Content (Long-Term, Remote)
description:
P1 is an international Creator Management Agency working with Creators, Athletes and Influencers around the world.

We are looking for a long-term Video Editor specialized in MMA and Fighting Sports content. You will edit short-form videos for our athletes' social media (Instagram, TikTok, X) - fight highlights, training breakdowns, walkout edits and lifestyle content.



This is a long-term role with a clear growth path.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

- Edit ~85 short-form videos per month (~21 per week, 15-60 sec each)

- Mix fight footage with B-roll, music, and sound design

- Match the energy and pacing of top MMA edit accounts

- Deliver edits within 24-48 hours of brief

- Maintain a consistent visual style across our athlete roster



WHAT WE OFFER

- Base salary: $
per month

- Performance bonus: open for extra videos beyond the monthly target

- Realistic Month-3 income: $
per month

- Realistic Month-6 income: $400+ per month

- Paid trial: 4-7 trial videos at $3 per video

- Long-term contract after successful trial

- Remote work, flexible hours

- Direct communication with the CEO



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

- Video editor with at least 1 year of professional experience

- Strong knowledge of Premiere Pro, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve or CapCut Pro

- Active interest in MMA, boxing, combat sports

- Reliable internet, dedicated workspace

- Honest, communicative, takes responsibility for deadlines

- Comfortable working long-term with one agency



WHAT WE DO NOT WANT

- Editors who only do generic social media content

- Agencies or teams (we hire one person directly)

- Project-by-project editors who treat this as a side gig

- Anyone who needs daily micromanagement



HOW TO APPLY

We use a short
-based application (free app, works on phone or desktop browser).

Click this link to start your application:
?start=ph_ed_mma_onlinejobs



The bot will guide you through:

1. A short welcome message and video from the CEO

2. 5 quick questions (about 2 minutes)

3. Portfolio submission with sample edits



If your answers fit, the CEO contacts you personally within 48 hours. If not, you receive honest feedback in the same window. No ghosting.



We respect your time. Apply only if you are serious about this role.



P1 Hiring

title: Remote Health & Wellness Consultant — Consultative Sales Role (Philippines) Ian's Team | WhatsApp: +63 991 534 0576
description:
Are you an ambitious graduate in the Philippines who wants to build a meaningful career in health and wellness while growing your income?

We are a fast-growing China-based private-label peptide and wellness company looking for a full-time Remote Health & Wellness Consultant. This is a consultative sales role — meaning your job is not to "push products," but to understand each client's health goals, educate them on the right solutions, and guide them toward informed decisions they feel confident about.

If you are knowledgeable, articulate, genuinely interested in health and wellness, and motivated by helping people achieve real results, this could be a strong long-term opportunity for you.

Top-performing consultants in this role can earn up to $30,000 per year or more through base salary, performance commission, and bonuses.

We welcome graduates from accredited Philippine universities who graduated within the past 1–3 years, with backgrounds in biology, medicine, pharmacy, nursing, nutrition, public health, or other life science fields strongly preferred.

What You'll Do



Serve as a trusted advisor to warm leads provided by the company — listen to their goals, ask the right questions, and recommend the most suitable products

Build long-term client relationships based on trust, education, and consistent follow-through

Proactively identify and engage potential clients through
 outreach,
, Instagram, TikTok, Reddit, and
 communities

Conduct online research to identify health-conscious communities where you can add value through expert content and conversation

Build a personal TikTok presence that establishes you as a credible voice in the health and wellness space

Educate prospects on product science, proper usage, expected outcomes, and safety considerations

Master our product line in depth so you can answer technical and health-related questions with confidence

Track your client pipeline, conversations, and conversion outcomes to continuously refine your approach



Who We Are Looking For



Graduates from accredited Philippine universities (1–3 years post-graduation)

Excellent spoken and written English with a professional, consultative communication style

Strong listening skills — you ask thoughtful questions before offering solutions

Comfortable building relationships and trust through online conversations

Genuinely curious about health science and motivated to keep learning

Self-directed, organized, and results-oriented

Able to work during US business hours

Stable internet connection and personal computer required



Preferred Qualifications



Academic background in biology, medicine, pharmacy, nursing, nutrition, public health, or related life sciences

Prior experience in consultative sales, client advisory, customer success, healthcare communication, or health education

Familiarity with
 outreach,
, Instagram, TikTok, Reddit,
, or other online community platforms

Personal interest in health, wellness, fitness, longevity, anti-aging, or weight management

Comfort discussing health topics in a professional, evidence-informed way



Compensation



Base salary: $400/month

Weekly payout during the first 3 months — $100 paid in advance every week

Commission: 3% on monthly sales up to $50,000

Commission: 4% on monthly sales above $50,000

Monthly performance bonuses available



Hiring Process



Interview with team supervisor

Written assessment

7-day trial period — candidate must complete 3 orders during the trial to pass



This is not a transactional sales role. It is a chance to develop into a true health and wellness advisor — building expertise, credibility, and a long-term client base that grows with you.

If you are ready to learn deeply, communicate professionally, and help clients achieve real results, we want to hear from you.

To Apply, Please Send the Following via WhatsApp to Ian's Team: 
Your resume

Your university and degree

Your year of graduation

Your English level

Any consultative sales, client advisory, customer success, or health communication experience

Any TikTok or social media experience

A short introduction explaining why you are a strong fit for a consultative health and wellness role

title: Towing and Roadside Assistance Dispatcher
description:
About Us

We are a U.S.-based towing company operating within the AAA Northeast network as an Independent Service Provider (ISP). Our company handles roadside assistance and towing services and has built a strong reputation for reliability and performance. We are now launching a dispatching company that will support towing companies and roadside providers across the United States. We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term and become a key part of our operations team. 



Your Role

As a Towing Dispatcher, you will be responsible for coordinating roadside assistance and towing services, ensuring jobs are completed efficiently, and maintaining clear communication with drivers and customers. You will start part-time and transition into a full-time role as you develop your skills and performance.



Key Responsibilities

-Dispatch and coordinate tow truck drivers

-Monitor job lifecycle (Dispatched ? Enroute ? On Scene ? Completed)

-Communicate with drivers and customers (calls, chat, updates)

-Handle delays, reassignments, and escalations

-Maintain accurate job notes and updates

-Follow dispatch workflows and SOPs



What We’re Looking For

-Strong English communication skills (spoken and written)

-Ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment

-Good problem-solving and decision-making skills

-Comfortable handling urgent and high-pressure situations

-Reliable and detail-oriented



Experience in Any of the Following is a Major Advantage

Dispatching (towing, trucking, logistics, or delivery)

BPO voice account experience (customer support, call handling)

Roadside assistance or towing operations

Familiarity with dispatch systems, GPS tracking, or CRM tools



Work Setup

Remote (Work from Home)

Start: Part-time (20–30 hours/week)

Transition to Full-time (40 hours/week)

Must be available to work U.S. hours (night shift PH time)



Compensation

 $3 – $5 per hour + Performance-based bonus and incentives



How to Apply

Please submit the following:

-Your updated resume 

-A short Video recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself

Answer this question:

 “How would you handle a situation where a driver is late and the customer is already upset?”



-Use subject line: Towing Dispatcher – [Your Name]

title: Sales Repesantive
description:
Sales Representative – Point Auto



Job Type: Full-Time

Location: On-site / Mobile



Job Overview:



Point Auto is seeking a Sales Representative whose primary role is to sell service packages and manage customer bookings efficiently. You will be the main point of contact for customers—guiding them through our services, recommending the right package, and securing confirmed appointments.



Key Responsibilities:

Present and sell service packages (PPF, detailing, ceramic coating, wraps) to customers

Understand customer needs and recommend the best package accordingly

Convert inquiries (calls, messages, walk-ins) into confirmed bookings

Manage the booking calendar and schedule appointments accurately

Follow up with leads and pending quotes to close sales

Upsell and bundle services to maximize ticket value

Ensure all booking details are correct (vehicle type, service, timing)

Coordinate with the production team to ensure smooth scheduling

Maintain organized records of customers, quotes, and bookings

Requirements:

Strong sales and closing skills

Excellent communication and customer handling

Organized and detail-oriented (booking accuracy is critical)

Ability to multitask between selling and scheduling

Experience in automotive services is an asset (PPF, detailing, wraps)

Valid Class 5 driver’s license (preferred)

Compensation:

Commission-based (focused on packages sold)
