title: Long-Term YouTube Scriptwriter
description:
Long-Term YouTube Scriptwriter

Documentary + Stickman Explainer · 6–8 scripts/day



The Role

I'm hiring a long-term scriptwriter for two channel types: cinematic VidRush-style documentaries and

stickman / paint-style explainers (Top 10, Ranked, POV, Every X Explained). You'll use AI tools to draft

fast, then human-edit so every script reads naturally and passes AI detection. Detailed SOP and perchannel style guides will be shared after hiring.



Pay & Daily Output

Track Length / Pay Daily Target

- Documentary: 8k–15k words · $2 (?10k) / $3 (10k–15k) 2 – 3 scripts / day

- Explainer: 1.5k–4k words · $2 per script 4 – 6 scripts / day



Combined daily target Mixed 6 – 8 scripts / day



Paid weekly via PayPal 



Niches You'll Write For

Documentary: dark history, military / naval cinematic docs, mysteries & unexplained,

cold cases & missing persons, bodycam stories, dynasties & old money, money / corporate

downfalls.



Explainer: things explained simply, Top 10 / Ranked, POV "Your Life as a [Role]," Every

X Rank Explained, every job / career, tech & gadget, animated maps / alt-history.

Different channels sit in different niches — you'll be assigned briefs and rotate.



What You Must Bring

• 1+ year writing published YouTube scripts (send links)

• Strong, natural English — no stiff or AI-flavored writing

• Fluent in Claude / Cowork + ChatGPT for drafting

• Fluent in an AI-detection tool (Originality.ai, ZeroGPT, or GPTZero)

• Strong research habits — every fact verified against ?2 reputable sources

• Comfortable with high volume — 6–8 finished scripts per day

• Reliable communicator — daily check-in, replies within 2 working hours



Non-Negotiables

• Humanize every script. Must score below 15% on Originality.ai or "Likely Human" on ZeroGPT

before you submit. Failed checks = you fix on your time.

• Fact-check everything. ?2 independent sources per claim. No invented dialogue. Speculation

must be signposted ("Some historians argue…"). Sources listed at the bottom of every script.

• Hit deadlines. Two missed deadlines without warning ends the contract. Communicate early if

life happens.

• Match the channel voice. One-page style guide per channel. Be consistent script after script —

no random tone shifts.



How to Apply

Subject line: "YT Scriptwriter — [Your Name]"

Include in your message:

1. Short intro about you (no résumé wall)

2. Which track you're applying for

3. 2–3 links to published YouTube scripts you wrote

4. Which AI tools you use daily and how

5. Honest realistic daily output (scripts AND words)

6. Weekly availability in Philippine Time

7. AI-detection tool you use + a screenshot of one script passing it

8. The phrase "I read the whole post" so I know you actually did





Paid Trial

You will create 1 script for a documentary & 1 script for an explainer.

The title, story summary, & SOP will be provided. 

After receive the title, both must finish within 24 hours.

Pass humanization, accuracy, structure, and timing — you're hired immediately on a long-term basis.

title: Ecommerce Accountant/Bookkeeper
description:
Position Title

Part Time Accountant/ Bookkeeper  – Amazon / Walmar t/ Shopify / Ecommerce Business

Position Summary

We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Accountant to manage the financial operations of a growing Amazon FBA and ecommerce business. This role is responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, reconciling Bank/Amazon/Walmart and Vendor transactions, managing inventory accounting, preparing financial reports, and ensuring compliance with sales tax and other regulatory requirements.

The ideal candidate has experience with Amazon Seller Central, Amazon FBA accounting, ecommerce bookkeeping, inventory-based businesses, and accounting software such as QuickBooks or Xero.  Ideal candidate will have 2+ years of experience as a bookkeeper and accountant.  This person will do data entry, reconciliation and compile common financial statements. 

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

Financial Management & Bookkeeping

• Maintain accurate bookkeeping records for the Amazon FBA business

• Record and categorize all revenue, expenses, refunds, reimbursements, fees, and adjustments

• Reconcile Amazon and Walmart settlement reports with bank accounts and accounting software

• Perform monthly, quarterly, and annual financial close processes

• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable

• Process vendor payments and monitor cash flow

• Reconcile company credit cards, bank accounts, and loans

Amazon/Walmart  FBA & Ecommerce Accounting

• Reconcile Amazon and Walmart Seller Central transactions, including:

o Sales revenue

o FBA fees

o Referral fees

o Storage fees

o Advertising expenses

o Refunds and returns

o Reimbursements and lost inventory claims

o Inventory

• Monitor and record inventory movement between suppliers, warehouses, and Amazon fulfillment centers

• Track landed cost of products, including freight, duties, packaging, and other costs

• Calculate and maintain accurate Cost of Goods Sold (COGS)

• Review and reconcile inventory valuations and stock adjustments

• Identify missing reimbursements, discrepancies, and financial errors within Amazon reports

• Assist in preparing profitability analysis by SKU, product line, and sales channel

Reporting & Analysis

• Prepare monthly Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow reports

• Create weekly and monthly performance dashboards for management

• Analyze margins, advertising spend, inventory carrying costs, and overall profitability

• Forecast cash flow, inventory needs, and future expenses

• Provide recommendations to improve financial efficiency and profitability

• Assist ownership with budgeting and strategic planning

Payroll & Expense Management

• Process payroll accurately and on time 

• Maintain payroll records and ensure compliance with federal and state requirements 

• Track and manage reimbursements with proper documentation and approvals 

• Oversee expense management and ensure proper classification of all business expenses 

• Track and maintain mileage logs for reimbursement and tax purposes



Tax & Compliance

• Maintain sales tax records and support sales tax filing requirements

• Assist with state sales tax registrations and compliance

• File with state for sales tax reimbursement

• Prepare documentation for CPA, tax preparer, or external auditors

• Support federal and state tax compliance by tracking deadlines and preparing reports

• Ensure compliance with accounting standards and company policies

• Maintain organized records for audits and year-end tax preparation

________________________________________

Required Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field

• 2+ years of accounting or bookkeeping experience

• 1+ years of experience with Amazon, Walmart, ecommerce, or inventory-based businesses

• Strong understanding of:

o Amazon Seller Central 

o Walmart Seller Central 

o Inventory accounting

o Cost of Goods Sold (COGS)

o Ecommerce financial reporting

• Experience with QuickBooks, Xero, or similar accounting software

• Advanced Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets skills

• Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

• Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines

• Strong written and verbal communication skills

________________________________________

Preferred Qualifications

• Experience with Amazon FBA accounting tools such as A2X, or Link My Books

• Experience with multi-channel ecommerce platforms such as Shopify, Walmart Marketplace, eBay, or Etsy

• CPA, CMA, or other accounting certification preferred

• Experience with inventory forecasting and profitability analysis

• Familiarity with international purchasing, freight, and import duties

________________________________________

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

• Accurate monthly financial close completed on time

• Amazon and Walmart settlement reconciliations completed with minimal discrepancies

• Inventory valuation accuracy

• Timely payment of vendors and taxes

• Reduction in unrecovered Amazon reimbursements or accounting errors

• Accuracy of cash flow forecasting and profitability reporting

________________________________________

Work Environment

• Part-time position available

• Remote 

• Typical schedule: Monday–Friday

• May require occasional work during month-end, quarter-end, or year-end close periods

________________________________________

Sample Tools & Systems Used

• Amazon Seller Central

• Xero

• A2X or Link My Books

• InventoryLab

• Microsoft Excel

• Google Sheets

• Shopify, Walmart Marketplace, or other ecommerce platforms

________________________________________

Please watch this short video before applying.  

Passcode: 



Start your application with your favorite quote.   Thank you,

title: Client Care Coordinator
description:
- About the Company -



No Stress Movers is a more than a decade old House Hold Goods (HHG) mover based on the East Coast of the United States. We primarily serve Philadelphia, New Jersey state, and other surrounding areas. The owner has been personally taking calls and managing the business 100% solo with a string of failed attempts at outsourcing client management to outside companies. His goal is to grow the company from the inside out and he is looking for someone to join the team long term.



I have grown the company to a consistent six figure revenue company. The next goal is a seven figure company! But I DEFINITELY can't do it alone.



- Abo
 -



My name is Devin Yusef Latimore, and I own and run No Stress Movers. I have hit my personal work limits. I spend each day managing clients and teams. I am in a dangerous place because if anything happens to me and I cannot personally operate the company, everything INSTANTLY shuts down.



With your help, the company becomes safer, bigger, and is able to share more with everyone.



- About the Position -



The position is called the Senior Client Care Coordinator, however you start out in the entry position where you're learning all the ropes about client interaction and generating and managing estimates. From there you graduate to a junior position where you are managing clients and estimates on your own. From there is the senior position which includes all of the junior duties plus management of several related sub-roles.



This position is full time. No Stress Movers is currently open from 8am to 6pm Monday thru Friday and 8am to 3pm on Saturdays. We are closed on Sundays.



Compensation starts at $5.00-$7.00/hr USD depending on how well you meet the requirements and bonus qualifications. As you advance, your hourly rate increases - $1.25/hr more at Junior. At the core of this position is sales (no cold calling involved). So upon graduation to Junior, you are eligible for commissions on every sale on top of your base salary. Then once you graduate to Senior, you earn an additional $2.00/hr more!



- About You -



The ideal candidate is male or female, someone who is VERY easy to understand (excellent spoken English), communicative, able to work on US EST (Eastern time ex: New York hours), great phone personality, pays attention to details, and learns fast! 



Experience is not necessary, although there are some skills requirements.



- Main requirements: -



- Very easy to understand with excellent spoken English

- Naturally warm and communicative on the phone

- Great personality

- Able to work full U.S. Eastern Time hours

- Detail-oriented and a fast learner

- Loves helping people

- Typing: at least 40WPM or better



Experience in moving or logistics is not required. We provide training throughout.



A big big plus (++) if you already have the following (not a requirement for those who really impress us):



 ++ A suitable reliable computer (will be verified)

 ++ Bluetooth headset (using speaker phone is not permitted during client calls)

 ++ Super fast internet connection (additional compensation is available for your high speed connection)

title: Urgent HIring for VA Receptionist 24 Hours Review
description:
Important: Our application process moves very quickly. If you are selected for the next rounds of interviews, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist. This role consists of handling inbound calls, booking appointments, and completing various administrative tasks. This is a long-term, performance-based position. All calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



For candidates who may be a stronger fit outside of a voice-based role, we also offer non-voice positions with a heavier focus on administrative tasks, subject to availability and overall fit.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them in your reply, and answer each one thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?

(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

, LinkedIn, CRM, content tracker

How to apply

Two or three AI agent setups you've built. What they did, what stack you used, what worked, what didn't.

Your recommended stack for this project and why.

Your typical engagement model (fixed price, hourly, retainer) and rough range.



Skip the generic pitch. I read every reply.

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (AI Automation)
description:
Senior Full-Stack Developer (AI Automation) — Feight AI



Read this carefully — this post is the first part of the interview.



I am the founder of Feight AI. We build AI automation for established companies — mostly mid-sized manufacturers doing USD 1M+ in annual revenue. 



I am hiring a full-time developer to be the technical builder behind every project we ship.



This is not a typical job ad. The work is real, the standards are high, and the rewards are real too. If you want a comfortable salaried role where you can coast, please skip this post. 



If you want a role where doing excellent work pays you well — keep reading.



What You'll Do



Two streams of work:

Client builds (priority): AI agents and chatbots, RAG systems, CRM and outreach automations, document validation flows, database automations, custom integrations. One-time setup + monthly retainer model.

Internal builds (fills the rest): Our internal AI Operating System, lead generation tooling, and productized offerings.



You will also help me on AI audits — designing the technical scope of proposed solutions, drafting tools and templates, helping me ask the right discovery questions. You will not be client-facing. I handle clients. You build.



Who I Am Hiring

A real full-stack developer who can:



Code: Strong fluency in Python and JavaScript/TypeScript. Pick up unfamiliar stacks fast and ship a working prototype within days, not weeks.

Automate: Hands-on experience with at least one of n8n, Make, Zapier, LangChain, or LlamaIndex. You design automations that don't silently fail at 3am.

Build for production: Error handling, monitoring, retries, sensible defaults. Not "happy path only."

Use AI tools aggressively: If you're coding without Claude, Cursor, Copilot, or equivalent, you're slower than I need.

Communicate proactively: Clear writing. Updates without being asked. Questions early, not late. Bad news surfaced before I find it myself.

Move fast without breaking things: Pride in clean builds and clean documentation. You finish what you start.



Strong plus (not required): Prior experience working on automation or software projects for manufacturing companies — ERP integrations, MES data, batch/flow processes. If you have this, mention it explicitly with concrete examples.



Who I Am NOT Looking For:



Devs who want a comfortable fixed salary with no upside.

Tutorial-mode learners who get stuck on unfamiliar stacks for a week.

People who go silent for days on active projects.

Portfolios padded with prototypes that never went to production.

People who hide mistakes instead of surfacing them.



Compensation:



Base: USD 1,500/month, paid monthly. Full-time contractor.

Project completion bonus: Every project completed to standard earns a bonus starting at USD 500, with larger or more complex projects earning more. Bonuses are tied to clean delivery — the build works, documentation is complete, monitoring is set up, and the client has signed off.

Bonus eligibility starts after 60 days.

Realistic monthly earnings: USD 2,000 – USD 4,000.

This is not theoretical. This is the structure. The harder you ship clean work, the more you earn.



Career Path:



This role is not a dead end. The natural progression is full-stack developer ? CTO of Feight AI as the company grows. The CTO role means leading other developers, owning technical direction, and significantly higher pay. If you don't want to manage, the senior individual contributor path also exists — rising base, bigger projects, bigger bonuses.

We talk about your trajectory in regular quarterly reviews. Both paths are real.



How We Work:



Communication: WhatsApp for daily comms, Google Meet for live calls when needed.

Daily standup (written, async): 3 lines at the start of your day — yesterday, today, blockers.

End-of-day report (written): What shipped, what happened, what's moving to tomorrow.

Response time: Reply within 2 working hours during your declared working hours. Outside those hours, your time is your own.

Time off: 2 weeks notice for non-emergency leave. Sick days and family things — fine, just tell me. We care about results, not seat-warming.

Hours: 40 hours per week in your local timezone. You declare your working window. Reasonable overlap with European hours required for live calls.



You will receive a full SOP document explaining exactly how we work before we sign anything. No surprises after the contract.

How to Apply



If you've read this far and the role fits, apply with all of the following:



Start your message with the word "AUDIT". This is how I know you actually read the post.

A short pitch (5–10 sentences). Why you, why this role, why now. No corporate filler.

Links to 2–3 things you've built. GitHub, live projects, automation flows — show me your actual work.

Your strongest stack: What you'd reach for first to ship an AI-powered automation tomorrow. One paragraph.

One thing you've shipped that you're genuinely proud of, and why. The "why" matters more than the "what."

Manufacturing experience (if any): Concrete examples — what client, what build, what outcome.

Your declared working hours and timezone.



Applications without "AUDIT" at the start will not be read.



I read every qualifying application personally. I respond within 5 business days. 



If you're a fit, the process is straightforward:



1. Trial task — a focused 1-hour task, clearly defined, real-world. Unpaid. Designed to show me how you think and how you build,and that you are serious, not to extract free labor.

2. Interview — one round, with me, on Google Meet.

3. Offer and SOP review — if we both want to move forward, I send you the full SOP document. You read it carefully, raise anything that needs discussion, and we sign.



I'm hiring one person at the 
nt. 



I'm willing to wait for the right one.



— Founder, Feight AI

title: Video Editor & Social Media Creative VA (Aesthetics & MedSpa Niche)
description:
Hiring: Video Editor & Social Media Creative VA (Aesthetics & MedSpa Niche)



Company: Sargent Connects

Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)

Role Type: Full-Time / Part-Time (Depending on availability and skill level)

Rate: $5 - $8/hr (Based on experience and portfolio)









About Us



Sargent Connects is a fast-growing lead generation agency based in the UK. We specialize exclusively in the aesthetics and medical spa industry, helping clinics (like skin clinics, laser hair removal centers, and medical spas) get more high-quality leads and booked appointments.



We are looking for a highly creative, proactive Video Editor & Social Media Creative VA to join our team. We don't just want someone who can follow instructions—we want someone who understands what performs well on social media (especially TikTok, Instagram Reels, and
 Ads) and can bring fresh, engaging ideas to the table.



The Role



Your primary responsibility will be to create high-converting video ads and organic social media content for our aesthetics clients. You will take raw footage provided by the clinics, edit it into engaging short-form content, and design static creatives that drive clicks and leads.



Key Responsibilities:



•

Video Editing: Edit raw footage (treatments, clinic tours, before/afters) into fast-paced, engaging short-form videos (Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts) optimized for paid ads and organic reach.



•

Creative Strategy: Research and pitch new video concepts, trending audio, and hook ideas specifically tailored to the aesthetics and beauty niche.



•

Graphic Design: Design high-quality static ad creatives, thumbnails, and social media posts using Canva, or similar tools.



•

Copywriting (Bonus): Write compelling hooks, captions, and on-screen text that grab attention in the first 3 seconds.



•

Asset Management: Organize and manage a library of creative assets, ensuring everything is easily accessible for the media buying team.



Who We Are Looking For



Must-Haves (Dealbreakers):



• Proven Video Editing Skills: You must be proficient in  CapCut, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve. (You will be asked to provide a portfolio).



•Understanding of Direct Response: You know the difference between a "pretty video" and a video that actually makes people want to click and buy. You understand hooks, pacing, and calls to action (CTAs).



•Aesthetics/Beauty Niche Interest: You have an eye for beauty, skincare, and aesthetics. You know what looks premium and trustworthy.



•Proactive Idea Generator: You don't wait to be told exactly what to do. You actively research competitors and trends and say, "Hey, we should try this style of video for Client X."



•Fluent English: Excellent written and verbal communication skills.



Strong Preferences (Green Flags):



•Previous experience creating ads for
/Instagram or TikTok.



•Experience working with a digital marketing agency.



•Basic understanding of GoHighLevel (GHL) or
 Ads Manager (just knowing how creatives fit into the bigger picture).



Why Work With Us?



•No Micromanagement: We care about the output and the quality of your work, not tracking every minute of your day.



•Growth Opportunity: As the agency grows, your role and compensation can grow with it.



•Clear Communication: We are direct, honest, and value tea
mbers who speak up and share their ideas.



How to Apply



If you just send a generic cover letter, your application will be ignored. To apply, please follow these exact steps:



1.Submit your portfolio: Include links to at least 3 short-form videos you have edited (preferably in the beauty, aesthetics, or health niche, but any high-performing direct response ads will do).



2.Record a Loom Video (2-3 minutes max):



•Introduce yourself and your experience.



•Show us one video from your portfolio and explain why you edited it that way (what was the hook, why did you choose that pacing, etc.).



•Tell us one trend you are currently seeing in short-form video that you think works well for local businesses.







3.Include the word "AESTHETICS" in the subject line or at the very top of your application so we know you read this far.

title: Staff Accountant
description:
We're looking for a capable, self-driven **Staff Accountant** to own a broad scope of accounting responsibilities inside a fast-moving AI-native healthcare platform. Accounts payable is the core function, but this is a full-cycle role. You will own AP end to end, maintain the general ledger, prepare work papers for key balance sheet accounts, and support month-end close.



You are stepping into an environment where documented processes are limited. A big part of your early impact will be building SOPs from scratch, creating structure where there is none, and setting up systems that make the finance function proactive rather than reactive. If you naturally spot inefficiencies and build fixes without being asked, this role is built for you.



## Why You'll Want to Join



- You will be paid in **USD** (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- **Paid Time Off** in accordance with company policy

- Observance of **Holidays** per company guidelines

- **100% remote setup** so you can work wherever you're most productive

- Direct ownership over the AP and accounting function inside an early-stage AI healthcare company

- High-visibility role where your systems and processes will shape how the finance function scales



## What You'll Work On



**Accounts Payable — Full Ownership**



- Own the complete AP cycle including invoice receipt, GL coding, approval routing, and payment execution

- Ensure all vendor bills, subscriptions, and recurring obligations are paid accurately and on schedule with no surprises

- Build and maintain a proactive payment processing cycle

- Manage vendor records including W-9s, banking details, and fully executed contracts

- Own the Ramp platform for corporate card management, expense categorization, reimbursements, and reconciliation

- Identify and resolve invoice discrepancies, duplicate payments, and vendor disputes independently or escalate with context



**General Ledger and Month-End Close**



- Prepare and post journal entries for accruals, prepayments, reclassifications, and adjustments

- Own reconciliations and work papers for cash, accounts payable, fixed assets, prepaids, and other assigned balance sheet accounts

- Support the monthly close process, ensure the AP sub-ledger ties to the GL, flag variances, and provide clear commentary on large fluxes

- Assist in preparing financial schedules, flux analysis, and ad hoc reports for leadership



**Process Building and Systems**



- Write and maintain SOPs for all AP and accounting processes, building a documented and repeatable system from the ground up

- Proactively identify workflow gaps and implement improvements that reduce manual and reactive work

- Build and maintain dashboards and work papers for vendor tracking, expense analysis, and close reporting

- Collaborate with the finance team to improve internal controls and financial hygiene as the company scales



## What You Bring



- Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or a closely related field

- 3 to 5 years of hands-on experience in a staff accountant or full-cycle accounting role

- Solid understanding of GAAP including journal entries, accruals, reconciliations, and the full accounting cycle

- Advanced Excel proficiency including pivot tables, VLOOKUP and XLOOKUP, SUMIFS, and the ability to build clean organized work papers independently

- Experience with expense management or AP platforms such as Ramp, 
, Concur, or similar

- Strong written communication: clear, professional documentation and SOPs that require no follow-up to understand

- Ownership mindset: things do not fall through the cracks on your watch

- Systems thinker: when something breaks twice you build a process so it does not happen a third time

- Self-starter: you find the problem, flag it, and fix it without waiting to be told



## Nice to Have



- Experience with accounting software such as QuickBooks, Sage, NetSuite, or Xero

- Exposure to month-end close including journal entries, cash reconciliation, and balance sheet account work

- Experience in a high-growth startup or fast-paced environment

- Background in healthcare, healthtech, or a regulated industry



## How to Apply



Please include:



1. Your **updated resume**

2. A **short Loom video (1 to 2 minutes)** describing your accounting background, walking through an AP or close process you owned, and sharing an example of a workflow or SOP you built from scratch



**Only candidates who submit a Loom video will be moved to the next step of the hiring process.**



If you are a self-driven accountant who takes ownership seriously, builds systems that outlast your direct involvement, and wants to shape the finance function inside a company doing meaningful work in healthcare, this role gives you the scope and the visibility to do your best work.

title: **Virtual Assistant for Funnel Buildout, Landing Pages, and Email Automation**
description:
Hello,



I am a U.S.-based construction operations consultant building a lead-generation funnel for my consulting business. I am looking for a Filipino VA who is reliable, detail-oriented, honest about their skill level, and capable of building simple web funnels cleanly from written instructions.



This role is focused more heavily on **funnels and backend setup** than on general VA work.



I do **not** need a generic social media VA.

I do **not** need someone who overstates their abilities.

I need someone who can build, format, connect, test, and follow instructions carefully.



### Main work in this role



* Build simple landing pages and opt-in pages

* Set up
 forms and basic automations

* Connect landing pages to
 lists and delivery
s

* Format lead magnets and PDFs in Canva

* Upload and organize files and digital assets

* Test funnels from start to finish to make sure they work properly

* Make small revisions cleanly and accurately

* Follow written instructions exactly and ask questions when something is unclear



### Tools you may use



* MailerLite

* Canva

* Carrd or similar landing page builder

* WordPress or simple page builders

* Google Docs / Google Drive

* ChatGPT content and instructions provided by me



### What I am looking for



* Strong attention to detail

* Ability to follow step-by-step instructions closely

* Experience with landing pages, opt-in forms, or
 automations

* Good written English

* Organized and dependable work habits

* Honest communication

* Ability to test your own work before sending it back

* Willingness to say clearly what you know and what you do not know



### Important



Please do not apply if you exaggerate your experience.



I do not need someone who sends generic AI work without reviewing it carefully.

I do not need someone who is mainly a graphic designer but cannot connect the funnel.

I do not need someone who is mainly a marketer but cannot execute the build cleanly.



I need someone who can help build simple, functional, professional funnel assets and backend workflows with low confusion and careful execution.



### Strong fit for this role



You are likely a strong fit if you have real experience with:



* opt-in pages

* landing page builders

* form setup

*
 list setup

* delivery
s

* follow-up automations

* Canva lead magnets

* light website or funnel editing



### Nice to have



* MailerLite experience

* Carrd experience

* WordPress page-builder experience

* Simple funnel or lead-gen setup experience

* Experience working from detailed client instructions without drifting off brief



### Hours



Part-time to start, with room to grow if it is a strong fit.



### Pay



$3–$4 per hour, depending on experience, speed, and accuracy.



### To apply



Please answer all of the following clearly:



1. What experience do you have with MailerLite, Canva, landing pages, or similar tools?

2. Have you personally built a simple opt-in page and connected it to an
 list or automation before?

3. What is your hourly rate within the $3–$4 range?

4. What is your internet speed and computer setup?

5. What hours are you usually available?

6. Please describe the most similar work you have done.

7. Which parts of this role are you strongest in, and which parts would be newer for you?

8. Are you comfortable following detailed written instructions exactly and using provided copy without changing strategy unless asked?

9. Are you open to a small paid test task if I d
 to move forward?



### Required sample submission



To be considered, please also send:



* 1 direct sample link to a landing page or opt-in page you personally built

* 1 direct sample link to a Canva PDF, lead magnet, or similar formatted asset

* a short note explaining exactly what part of each sample you personally built



Applications with vague experience summaries and no real examples will not be considered.



### Important application instruction



Please begin your application with the words: **Ready to build funnels cleanly**



That helps me know you read the full post carefully.



Thank you.

title: A.I. Video Operator Replication + Editor
description:
We are hiring an AI video operator to create short-form videos (15–45 seconds) by replicating existing high-performing content.



You will be given:



Reference videos

Scripts

Access to AI tools



Your job is to recreate the same video using a different avatar/subject and deliver a fully finished video ready to post.



This is a system-based role. You will be trained on our exact workflow and are expected to follow it precisely.

What You’ll Do

Watch a reference video and break it into scenes

Recreate each scene using AI (image/video generation)

Use prompting to generate realistic visuals

Animate scenes (Veo, Kling, or similar tools)

Add voice (ElevenLabs or similar)

Edit everything together into a final video (cuts, pacing, timing)

Deliver a complete, polished video



Requirements

Experience with AI tools (video, image generation, or voice tools)

Basic understanding of prompting (how to generate consistent visuals)

Video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, etc.)

Ability to follow instructions EXACTLY

Strong attention to detail (framing, lighting, realism)

Comfortable with repetitive, system-based work

Reliable and available to work daily

Good English communication

IMPORTANT



This is not a creative role.



You must be able to:



Look at a video

Replicate the same structure, pacing, and style

Execute consistently using a defined system



Please list experience with ai tools to create videos as well as with video editing. Please include screenshots of proof of you using the tools as well as video examples using ai to create fully made ai videos.



If you cannot follow a structured process, do not apply.

title: CapCut Editor Wanted: 30+ Social Media Videos/Week
description:
I am looking for a reliable, fast-paced video editor to join my content team. I produce high-volume educational and lifestyle content (30+ videos per week) and need someone who can take raw "talking head" footage and turn it into polished, engaging TikToks/Reels.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Editing: Professional cutting, pacing, and captions for 60-second clips.



Branding: Following briefs for 3+ different brands.



Workflow: Checking branding guide/briefs, finding raw video in CapCut space, editing, and moving it into a "completed" folder on CapCut space.



Collaboration: Working within CapCut Shared Spaces (requires a stable connection/VPN) and communicating via messages or Slack.



Requirements:



Expertise in CapCut (Desktop preferred).



Ability to handle high volume without losing attention to detail. This is a scaled opportunity: I am actively growing. As I scale, there is a significant opportunity for increased hours and higher responsibility for a reliable editor who proves they can handle the current volume.



??REGIONAL ACCESS & VPN: We utilize CapCut Shared Spaces (US-Region) for all project collaboration. Due to CapCut’s current regional security locks, you MUST have a high-speed, reliable VPN set to a USA server to access our workspace, sync project files, and use our specific brand assets.



Note: If you cannot operate via a US-based VPN, the collaboration links will show as "Expired," and you will not be able to access the footage. Please only apply if you are comfortable with this technical setup and have a stable enough internet connection to upload/download video files while the VPN is active.



Reliable internet for uploading/downloading large video files.



HOW TO APPLY:



The Keyword: To show me you have read this entire posting, please start your application with the word "ELLIE" in all caps.



Portfolio: Provide a link to your best social media or "talking head" edits.



VPN Confirmation: Confirm you have a VPN and are comfortable using it for this role.



Turnaround Time: Roughly how long does it take you to edit a 60-second talking head clip with captions?

title: Long-Term Appointment Setter Role — US Agency | ?40K Start + Paid Leave + Bonuses
description:
# Lead Concierge Specialist / Business Development Representative



**Company:** 62 Digital

**Location:** Remote — Philippines

**Schedule:** Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Central Time (US)

**Compensation:** Starting at ?40,000 PHP/month, with room to grow based on experience

**Employment Type:** Full-time, long-term



-----



## About 62 Digital



62 Digital is a U.S.-headquartered digital agency specializing in web development, application engineering, and full-service marketing. Our team is distributed by design — we bring together skilled professionals from the U.S., the Philippines, and Latin America to deliver exceptional work for real clients across industries.



This isn’t freelancing. This isn’t contract work. When you join 62 Digital, you become a core part of a team that collaborates daily, ships meaningful projects, and grows together.



-----



## About the Role



We’re hiring a **Lead Concierge Specialist / Business Development Representative (LCS/BDR)** to engage and convert inbound leads for our health and wellness clients.



Our clients run paid advertising campaigns on platforms like
 and Google, and prospects opt in to claim a specific offer. Your job is to be the friendly, professional voice on the other end — following up quickly, building trust, answering questions, and booking those leads directly onto the clinic’s calendar.



This is a fast-paced, conversation-driven role where speed, consistency, and follow-through are everything.



-----



## What You’ll Do



- Respond to inbound leads from paid advertising campaigns 
 Lead Ads, Google Lead Ads, and similar) as quickly as possible

- Follow up with prospects via **phone calls and SMS** until contact is made or the lead is fully worked

- Qualify leads against the specific offer they claimed and confidently answer their questions

- **Book qualified appointments directly onto each clinic’s calendar**

- Manage all activity inside our white-labeled **HighLevel (GoHighLevel) CRM**

- Maintain organized notes and a consistent communication cadence across multiple client pipelines simultaneously



-----



## What We’re Looking For



- **At least 2 years of experience** in appointment setting, business development, inside sales, lead conversion, or a similar phone-based role

- **Fluent English** — you must speak, read, and write at a professional level. You’ll be on calls and texting U.S.-based prospects every day

- **Strong multitasking ability** — you can comfortably juggle multiple conversations, clients, and pipelines at once

- **Calm under pressure** — high-volume days don’t rattle you. You stay organized, focused, and on-task

- **Health and wellness industry experience is a major plus** (med spas, chiropractic, weight loss, hormone clinics, dental, aesthetics, etc.)

- **HighLevel (GoHighLevel) experience is a plus**

- A **long-term mindset** — we’re building a team, not filling a temporary seat



-----



## Schedule & Work Setup



- **Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Central Time (US)** — this is a night shift in the Philippines

- No weekend work currently required

- 100% remote



-----



## What You’ll Need



- A reliable working computer

- A working cell phone

- A stable, high-speed internet connection *(in some cases, 62 Digital will contribute toward internet costs)*

- A quiet workspace suitable for taking calls



-----



## Compensation & Benefits



- **Starting pay:** ?40,000 PHP per month, with the opportunity for more based on experience

- **Performance bonuses** throughout the year

- **Paid Sick Leave** — eligible after 90 days

- **Paid Vacation** — eligible after 90 days

- **Half-Day Fridays** — every other week, workload permitting

- **Reliable, on-time pay** — direct deposit to your Philippines bank account, every pay period, no exceptions



-----



## Why 62 Digital



We don’t outsource — we build teams. Every person we hire is a valued member of our organization, not a line item on a cost sheet.



- **Work From Anywhere** — fully remote team, by design

- **Long-Term Roles** — we hire for the long run, not short-term gigs

- **Competitive, Region-Benchmarked Pay** — we pay fairly because we value your contribution

- **Direct Collaboration** — you’ll work directly with leadership and clients, not through layers of middlemen



We’re looking for someone who wants stability, growth, and a team that values them — not their next short gig.



-----



## How to Apply



Apply **only through our OnlineJobs.ph posting**. Applications submitted through other channels will not be reviewed.



We look forward to meeting you.

title: TikTok Shop Performance Specialist
description:
About the Role



We are not looking for someone to “manage” a TikTok Shop.

We are looking for someone to own it.



This means full responsibility for the performance of multiple TikTok Shop brands, from product visibility to creator output to revenue. If something is not working, don’t wait for instructions. Look into it, figure it out, fix it, and improve it.



You will need to immerse yourself in the TikTok Shop ecosystem (US market), understand how all moving pieces connect (creators, affiliates, ads, listings, campaigns), and continuously push for better results while keeping up with new features and changes.



This is not a maintenance role.

This is a growth and accountability role.

The role is supported by a Catalog section, an Inventory section and Customer messaging section so that you can truly focus on promotional and other tools to scale sales and profit.



?



Important



You are expected to:

* Think in terms of GMV, ROI, and conversion

* Identify problems before they are pointed out

* Act fast when opportunities appear (new features, trends, creators, formats, campaigns, etc.)



TikTok changes constantly; we expect you to adapt quickly, test aggressively, and share learnings with the team.



If you need step-by-step instructions for everything, this is not the role.



?



Key Responsibilities



* Fully own TikTok Shop performance for assigned brands

* Actively manage all in-platform promotional tools (timing, stacking, testing, etc.)

* Define and deploy Affiliate efforts

* Monitor everything that can affect sales velocity (account health, inventory, customer experience, etc.) and coordinate with rest of the team on handling issues

* Track and react to daily sales velocity changes (spikes, drops, anomalies)

* Improve conversion rate at product level (identify weak SKUs and fix positioning, pricing, or offers)

* Test different pricing strategies and discount structures to maximize profitability

* Identify and capitalize on TikTok Shop trends, seasonal opportunities, and campaign windows

* Analyze competitor activity inside TikTok Shop and adjust promotional strategy accordingly

* Work with Ads to amplify winning products and campaigns

* Identify what is working and scale it, cut what is not

* Provide clear weekly and monthly reporting with proactive recommendations





?



Qualifications



* Extreme ownership mindset: you take responsibility, not instructions

* Fast learner who applies knowledge immediately

* Proven experience inside TikTok Shop Seller Center (US REQUIRED)

* Strong understanding of how creators + affiliates + ads work together

* Comfortable working with KPIs (GMV, ROI, CTR, CVR)

* Excellent English communication (internal + client-facing)

* Highly organized and able to manage multiple brands at once



?



Bonus



* Experience with tools like Cruva, Kalodata, or similar

* Background in Amazon or other e-commerce platforms

* Experience scaling TikTok Shop brands past early-stage growth



?



How to Apply (Important – only serious applicants)



Reply with:



1. Your current resume

2. A brief example of a TikTok Shop you directly impacted: what was the problem, what did you do, and what was the result

3. A short paragraph (3–5 sentences) describing a time you identified an opportunity (campaign, creator, listing, or strategy) before being told, and executed on it



?



If you are someone who wants full ownership, moves fast, and enjoys figuring things out rather than waiting to be told what to do; this is the role for you!

title: Marketing Manager
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a creative and organized Marketing Manager to help plan, manage, and grow our marketing efforts. This role is responsible for improving brand awareness, generating leads, managing campaigns, and helping the company attract new customers.



The ideal candidate is someone who understands digital marketing, can manage projects, and is comfortable working across multiple marketing channels.



Responsibilities



- Create and manage marketing campaigns

- Develop strategies to increase brand awareness and customer leads

- Manage social media content and posting schedules

- Help create website content, landing pages, blog posts,
s, and ads

- Plan and manage
 marketing campaigns

- Work on SEO improvements and website traffic growth

- Manage paid advertising campaigns, such as Google Ads, Meta Ads, or other platforms

- Track marketing performance and prepare reports for management

- Research competitors, market trends, and customer needs

- Coordinate with designers, writers, vendors, or internal tea
mbers

- Help improve branding, messaging, and promotional materials

- Identify new marketing opportunities to support company growth



Requirements



- Previous experience in marketing, digital marketing, advertising, or a similar role

- Strong writing and communication skills

- Good understanding of social media,
 marketing, SEO, and paid ads

- Ability to plan campaigns and manage deadlines

- Comfortable using marketing tools, analytics platforms, spreadsheets, and project management software

- Creative mindset with strong attention to detail

- Ability to review results and make improvements based on data

- Strong organization and problem-solving skills

Preferred Qualifications

Schedule



This is a full-time position with a schedule of 9 AM to 5 PM, Monday to Friday. Some flexibility may be available depending on experience and business needs.



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who can take ownership of our marketing efforts and help grow the business. The right person should be creative, dependable, organized, and able to turn ideas into real campaigns that produce results.



How to Apply



Please send your resume and a short message explaining your marketing experience, the types of campaigns you have managed, and any marketing tools or platforms you have used.

title: Lead Generation Specialist eCommerce Brand Scraping
description:

2. Health & Supplements (protein, collagen, gut health, wellness)

3. Beauty & Skincare (DTC skincare, hair care, men's grooming)

4. Functional Food & Beverage (brands like Liquid IV, LMNT, Olipop)

WHO WE NEED

NO generic
s 
 
 
s only.

 or similar prospecting tool

 or NeverBounce for

contacts first for quality review?

s or are from brands not running active ads will be rejected. Quality is more important than speed on this project.



Looking forward to working with someone detail-oriented and reliable.

title: Commercial Real Estate Accountant
description:
Job description:



Job Title: Bookkeeper / Property Accountant (Must have Experience. Please do not Apply if you do not have the Required Experience)



Job Type: Full-time



About Us:



Join our thriving and growing commercial real estate firm specializing in property management. We manage a diverse portfolio of properties, focusing on optimizing property performance and fostering long-term client relationships. We are dedicated to maintaining financial records, analyzing data, and providing valuable financial insights to property management and owners. We seek a detail-oriented and experienced Bookkeeper/Property Accountant who is proficient in QuickBooks Enterprise and has a solid understanding of commercial real estate leasing.



Key Responsibilities:



Manage all bookkeeping and property accounting functions using QuickBooks Enterprise, ensuring accurate and timely financial data.

Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records for each property managed, including recording rent payments, tracking expenses, and processing invoices from vendors.

Analyze various transactions and identify appropriate accounting treatment, including month-end accruals and tenant billings.

Prepare comprehensive financial reports such as profit and loss statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements to provide insights into the financial performance of the properties.

Work closely with property manager to develop annual budgets and financial forecasts based on historical data and market trends.

Reconcile monthly bank statements and complete monthly balance sheet reconciliations.

Assist in the collection of tenant rents and manage accounts payable and receivable.

Handle the setup of ACH bill payments, ensuring they are approved by management and processed.

Participate in financial audits by providing necessary documentation and explanations to auditors.

Maintain vendor relationships and ensure timely payments.

Abstract management agreements to allow for appropriate billing of management fees.

Collaborate with the real estate team, property managers, owners, and other stakeholders to reconcile accounts and address financial inquiries.

Review tax returns to ensure compliance and accuracy in financial reporting.

Assist management with special projects and other tasks as assigned.



Requirements:



Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field preferred.

Proven experience (3-5 years) in bookkeeping or accounting, and Must be in property management or Commercial Real Estate for the United States.

Strong proficiency in QuickBooks Enterprise and Microsoft Excel.

Solid understanding of commercial leasing agreements, specifically NNN leases and Gross leases.

Demonstrated ability to review and understand tax returns.

Excellent organizational, analytical, and time management skills.

Effective communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to adapt to changing priorities and maintain high levels of confidentiality.

Must be able to pass a background check.



Your
 must also include a required rate of hourly pay, plus your past three hourly wages of your last jobs with your resume.



Job Type: Full-time



Experience:



Bookkeeping: 3 years Minimum in doing bookkeeping for a Commercial Real Estate United States Company (Required)



You must also
 
 a PDF copy of your resume along with applying for the job through this job add on onlinejobs.ph to be considered for this job.

title: E-Commerce Product Sourcing & Purchasing Assistant
description:
Overview:

I'm looking for a detail-oriented, fast-moving assistant to help identify and purchase profitable sneaker opportunities from private 
 groups and online retailers. You will be fully trained on the process.



Responsibilities:

* Monitor a private 
 channel for sneaker links and buying instructions during assigned hours

* Analyze whether a product is profitable using a private Chrome extension

* Execute purchases quickly and accurately when a good opportunity appears

* Apply discount codes, select correct sizes, and complete checkout efficiently

* Create retail accounts when needed following a structured process

* Log all purchases into our internal tracking system called ShipNinja



Work Structure & Pay:

* You will be assigned a daily monitoring window of approximately 7 AM to 7 PM EST, Monday - Saturday (U.S. Time, Flexible)

* Links are sent sporadically throughout the day. You are being paid to be present and ready, not for constant work

* When a link is posted, you must be able to act within 1 to 2 minutes

* Pay is a $120 monthly retainer for availability, plus a $1 bonus per successful purchase completed. Expect to be purchasing < 300 units a month.



Training Process:

* You will start by reviewing real opportunities and telling me what you would buy and why

* I will give feedback until your judgment is consistent

* Once approved, you will begin executing purchases with oversight



Requirements:

* Strong attention to detail as small mistakes are costly

* Ability to act fast under time pressure

* Reliable internet and ability to access U.S. websites without issues

* Comfortable with 
, multiple browser tabs, and online tools at once

* Follows processes exactly without skipping steps

* Honest, professional, and trustworthy



How To Apply:

You must complete ALL of the following or your application will not be reviewed.



* 1. Record a short Loom or similar screen video showing how you would figure out if a product is worth buying to resell, your step-by-step thought process as you evaluate it, and what you would do if you are unsure.



* 2. Include your availability and timezone.



Note: You do not need to know sneaker reselling. Full training is provided. This application tests how you think, not what you already know. Applications without a screen recording will be ignored.

title: Property Management & Accounting Assistant
description:
Company Overview:

Merlynn Real Estate Partners is a vertically integrated real estate investment and development firm focused on renovating and developing residential homes and multifamily buildings in the United States.



Position Overview:

The Property Operations & Accounting Assistant will serve as an assistant in day-to-day operations of a growing self-managed portfolio, ensuring that property operations run smoothly, efficiently, and without requiring constant oversight from leadership.

This role requires the applicant to have a background of property management operations-first, with responsibility for coordinating maintenance, managing vendors, tracking property performance, supporting tenant-related workflows and accounting. In addition, this role will require oversight of financials, bookkeeping, bill pay, and basic financial reporting.

The ideal candidate is highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive—someone who can own execution, maintain structure, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks. The Property Operations & Accounting Assistant will serve as an integral part of the monitoring property operations of the portfolio and will be responsible for accurate bookkeeping, producing reliable financial reporting, and supporting operational property performance across the portfolio.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Accounting, Bookkeeping & Financial Management

- Maintain accurate books across all entities (property-level and corporate)

- Manage accounts payable and receivable, including vendor bills, payments and rent collections

- Perform monthly bank and credit card reconciliations across all entities (property-level and corporate)

- Prepare monthly financial statements (P&L, balance sheet, cash flow)

- Track budgets vs. actuals across properties and construction projects

- Support tax preparation by coordinating with CPA and organizing financials

- Ensure proper expense categorization and cost allocation across entities

- Monitor cash balances and flag liquidity concerns proactively

- Analyze and monitor trends in expenses, income across all entities



2. Asset Management Support

- Tracking key performance metrics (Occupancy, Delinquency, Income, Expenses)

- Monitor tenant payment behavior and flag risks early

- Support eviction tracking and payment plan monitoring

- Perform general property management tasks and communication with residents

- Vendor management and work order dispatch and monitoring

- Assisting with operational reporting for investor updates

- Help identify opportunities to improve property performance through expense reduction or revenue growth



3. Process Improvement & Systems:

- Create and refine SOPs for property management and accounting workflows

- Ensure data integrity across accounting systems (Buildium, Xero, Waves, spreadsheets)

- Improve efficiency in billing, collections, reconciliations, reporting processes

- Assist in implementing scalable financial and asset management systems as the portfolio grows



Qualifications Required:

- 2–5+ years of property management experience

- Technical experience with accounting or bookkeeping 

- High attention to detail and accuracy (non-negotiable)

- Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets

- Experience with developing accounting systems and reconciliations processes

- Ability to manage multiple entities and accounts



Qualifications Preferred:

- Experience with Buildium or similar property management software

- Experience with Xero or similar property accounting software

- Real estate accounting experience



Core Competencies:

- Detail-Oriented: Catches errors others miss

- Ownership Mentality: Treats company finances like their own

- Self-Starter: Ability to handle accountability and work independently

- Analytical Thinking: Can interpret numbers, not just record them

- Organized & Systematic: Builds repeatable systems and processes

- Proactive Communicator: Flags issues early (tenant issues, maintenance, delinquency)

- Trustworthiness: Can be relied on with complete transparency and integrity

title: Executive Assistant - Remote, Full-Time
description:
Executive Assistant - Remote, Full-Time



About the Role





We are hiring an Executive Assistant for an entrepreneur and partner in a fast-growing neuroscience and manifestation coaching business. Our program helps people rewire their brains, reprogram their subconscious minds, and become the best versions of themselves.







You will be the founder's right hand and "second brain," taking ownership of lower-leverage operational tasks, inbox management, customer support, and the dozens of small threads that keep the business running smoothly.





We need someone sharp, structured, and proactive enough to chase the founder when he forgets things, not the other way around. You must execute with a high level of precision and pay very close attention to detail.





Hours





Mon–Fri standard business hours (US time zone overlap preferred)

Light weekend coverage if needed: brief inbox check for emergencies, not full days







Key Responsibilities





Inbox & Community Management





Take full ownership of the founder's daily
 triage.

Handle community management inquiries and respond to prospective students wanting to join our program.

Draft replies for routine items, flag the urgent, and filter out the noise so the founder does not have to live in the inbox.







Refund Request Processing & Refutation

Manage incoming refund requests and treat them as structured projects.

Pull attendance data from Zoom to verify if students met contract stipulations (e.g., attending scheduled coaching calls with our CSMs).

Compile evidence and draft response guidelines explaining why a refund is denied based on the data.







Dispute Resolution Prep





Compile all necessary data and evidence when a chargeback or dispute occurs.

Create the final dispute response document for the founder to simply review and submit.





App Support & Troubleshooting

Handle support tickets from users experiencing issues with the app (e.g., unable to access videos or general usage problems).

Help users troubleshoot and resolve their technical issues promptly.





Access Management (Offboarding)

Track students reaching the end of their program term.

Cross-reference systems to ensure students who do not extend have their access to the app and community properly revoked.





Content Uploads

Regularly upload our coaching calls into our AI platform to train the model and improve its responses.

Manage this process consistently and help set up automations where possible.





Task & Project Tracking

Maintain a single source of truth for everything the founder delegates.

Chase him on items he forgets; be the safety net.

Ensure no task gets lost on your watch.







Tools & Tech Stack

You will be expected to be comfortable with, or willing to learn, the following tools:





Gmail / Google Workspace 
, docs, sheets, drive)

Zoom (pulling attendance reports, managing recordings)

Uscreen (our app and community platform)

Zapier (automations and workflow management)

Stripe (basic payment and dispute management)

Calendly (booking and scheduling management)

Delphi (our AI platform; full training provided)









Who You Are

Sharp: Has a brain, uses it, and does not need babysitting.

Structured: Builds clean systems so nothing falls through the cracks.

Proactive: Chases the boss, not the other way around.

Detail-obsessed: Pays very close attention to detail and executes flawlessly.

Trustworthy: Will have access to sensitive accounts, student data, and systems. An NDA will be required upon hiring.

Reliable: When it is done, it is done; when it is not, you flag it early.

title: Social Media Digital Marketer (Sales)
description:
Please do not reply if you don’t have the experience requested



Role Essence: The Primary Revenue-Driving Link & Trusted Advisor



Primary Focus: Identifying Prospects, Nurturing Relationships, and Closing Deals



Work Hours: 12:00 PM – 8:30 PM EST, 30 minute unpaid lunch (Monday – Friday)



Starting Rate: $6.00 / hour



Performance Escalation: Upon successfully meeting all primary production and revenue targets in Month 1, you will receive a $100.00/month raise starting in Month 2.



Ongoing Incentive: An additional $1.00/hour bonus for every week you meet your specific production and revenue targets.



1. The Mission

At Sheila M Coaching, we don’t just "post content"—we change lives. As our Social Media Digital Marketer, you represent the Sheila M brand, gathering market intelligence and acting as a trusted advisor to help clients solve problems. You are identifying prospects and nurturing relationships until they are ready for a breakthrough.



2. Core Responsibilities & Partnership

Prospect Identification & Research: Use social platforms (LinkedIn, Pinterest, TikTok) to research and identify women navigating toxic loops and identity crises.



Relationship Cultivation: Act as a trusted advisor in the DMs and online communities, providing empathetic, faith-inspired guidance.



Total Brand Sales Authority: Working in partnership with Sheila M, you drive revenue across the entire ecosystem: RRRT, Private Coaching, Empowerment Hub, and Ecommerce.



The Digital Handshake: Own the GoHighLevel (CC360) Conversations Tab. Greet every lead with professional gravitas and ensure no woman is left waiting.



Pipeline Management: Maintain accurate records in the CRM, tagging leads to ensure the technical architecture is optimized.



3. Performance, Pay & Benefits

The "Until It's Done" Ethic: You take full ownership of your revenue and production goals.

Payment Terms: Bi-weekly pay (paid in arrears). Period ends Friday; payment clears by Wednesday.

Probationary Period: This role has a 90-day probationary period. Part-time workers are not paid for holidays. No paid holidays will be granted until the probationary period is successfully completed.



4. How to Apply

Lead Identification: What is your specific experience identifying and qualifying potential customers on platforms like LinkedIn or TikTok?



Conversion Example: Provide a specific example of how you have engaged on social media within groups or communities and successfully converted that interaction into a paying client/customer.



The Trusted Advisor: How do you balance being a "trusted advisor" who helps solve problems with the practical need to close a sale?



Logistics: Can you commit to the 12:00 PM – 8:30 PM EST window? 



What is your backup plan for internet or power outages?



Vision: Where do you aspire to be professionally in 5 years?



If you are interested in applying, please write sunshine on the top of your response. 



Best wishes,

Sheila M

title: Online Arbitrage Sourcer (Amazon FBA, EU Markets, Remote) | Part-Time
description:
We are an established Amazon FBA business based in Germany and are currently expanding our sourcing team.

Our focus is Shop-to-Amazon sourcing (no Amazon flips) across multiple EU marketplaces.



Responsibilities:

– Find profitable online arbitrage deals for Amazon FBA

– Focus on sourcing from German online shops

– Source deals from newsletters and special shop campaigns



Requirements

– Proven experience in Online Arbitrage sourcing (required)

– Strong experience sourcing from German online shops (mandatory)

– Experience with EU marketplaces (DE, FR, IT, ES)

– Experience with SellerAmp / ProfitGO & Keepa  

– Nice to Have: Experience with Profitpath



Benefits

– Work with an experienced Amazon team, including a sourcing VA and a coach VA focused on improving sourcing 

– Access to premium tools (Keepa, SellerAmp, Profitpath)

– Performance-based bonuses

– Salary increases based on performance



Working Hours

– Part-Time: 20 hours per week

– Preferred: 8:00 – 17:00 (German time)



Trial Phase

– 2–4 day paid trial period to evaluate the collaboration

– During the trial: 4 hours per day at $3/hour



How to Apply: Please include:

– Your experience with Amazon Online Arbitrage (years + marketplaces: DE, FR, IT, ES)

– Tools you have used (SellerAmp / BuyBot / ProfitGO)

– How many profitable deals you can realistically find per day

– 3–5 German or EU shops you have sourced from



Test Task (IMPORTANT):

Find 2 profitable Online Arbitrage products from German or EU online shops.



Mandatory Video

– 5–10 minute screen recording

– Show how you source from German online shops

– Explain your process and decision-making



Applications without video and test task will not be considered.



We are not looking for beginners.

We need someone who can consistently deliver profitable deals and understands the Amazon FBA ecosystem.

In this role, you will listen to conversations between AI systems and customers in a drive-thru setting and ensure that all spoken content is transcribed clearly and precisely. The ideal candidate has strong listening skills and can understand fast-paced dialogue, unclear audio, and background noise while maintaining high accuracy.





Tasks:

Ensure transcripts are accurate, complete, and reflect the exact wording



Capture tone, context, and nuances of each conversation

Manage workload independently and submit tasks on time







Qualifications:



Excellent listening and comprehension skills



Strong attention to detail and accuracy



Ability to understand different accents and speech patterns



Good command of written English (spelling, grammar, punctuation)



Ability to work independently and manage time effectively



Basic computer skills and familiarity with transcription tools (preferred but not required)

title: Full-time YT Story Script Writer, Fast Learner
description:
Nobody nails our style on day one. But when we give you a note, we expect it applied across all future scripts, we don't repeat the same correction twice. If you tend to need the same feedback multiple times, this role isn't for you. If clients have told you you're "easy to give notes to" and you actually apply them, keep reading.



This is not a traditional writing role. The actual writing is done by Claude (AI) using our internal SOPs. Your job is editorial judgment: read what the AI produces, spot the issues, and direct Claude to fix them. AI does the cooking, you're the chef making sure it actually tastes good. This is not a "send prompt and save output" task, your judgment as a writer is strongly needed.



You won't write prose from scratch. You'll read, judge, push back on the AI, and iterate until the script meets our quality bar. Strong editorial instinct and YouTube retention understanding are what matter — not typing speed or creative writing skill.



Setup: Full-time, 40 hrs/week, Hubstaff + NDA required. High volume, repeatable workflow, strong systems already in place.

Compensation: $900/month base + performance bonuses ($5.6/h). Long-term role with growth potential as we scale.



Must have:

Solid grasp of YouTube retention (hook, pacing, AVD, open loops, reveal structure)

Strong editorial judgment — you can read a script and immediately spot what's not working

Comfort with AI writing tools and following detailed SOPs

Background in writing, editing, or content review (YouTube scripts, articles, fiction, or other long-form)



In your application, please answer:



1. In 2–4 sentences: what keeps viewers watching past the first 30 seconds of a story video, and how do you maintain retention throughout a 10-minute script?

2. How do you track and apply client feedback so the same notes don't come up repeatedly?

3. Confirm you can commit to 40 hrs/week full-time.

4. A short description of what your most recent job was (summarize it in 1-4 sentences what you worked on)

5. Share 1–2 writing samples (links or attachments)



Generic or AI-copy-paste applications will be ignored.

title: **High-Precision Futures Trading Algorithm Developer (Look Back Strategy | NY Session | Advanced Smart Money Concepts)**
description:
Looking for a developer to build a high-precision futures trading algorithm based on a Look Back strategy using 15-minute historical candles.



The strategy includes New York session timing, True Opens, Premium / Discount / Dead Zone logic, liquidity sweeps, SMT correlation, and strict risk management.



The system must identify the closest valid Look Back zone, define wick/body-based entries, and execute mainly through limit orders.



Trades are allowed only during the 9:30–10:00 AM New York session.



It also requires 1-minute trade management, daily trade limits, automatic stop rules, and accurate backtesting.



Build difficulty: high — this requires precise time-based logic, multi-symbol comparison, market-structure understanding, and strong backtesting experience.
